### [1] [Performance and Energy Trade-Off Analysis of Hierarchical Federated Learning for Plant Disease Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08121)
*Athanasios Papanikolaou,Athanasios Tziouvaras,Pavlos Stoikos,Apostolos Xenakis,Shameem A Puthiya Parambath,George Floros,Enrica Zereik,Ivan Petrovic,Fabio Bonsignorio*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文探索了分层联邦学习架构在植物病害分类中的设计空间，提出了功耗感知优化框架，评估多种CNN模型与聚合策略组合的性能-能耗权衡，发现某些配置能在保持诊断精度的同时显著降低系统资源消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 早期植物病害检测对提高作物产量和实现精准农业至关重要，但大规模分布式深度学习在IoT环境中面临计算成本高、能耗大、系统效率低等挑战。

Method: 提出分层联邦学习架构（引入中间聚合层减少通信与计算开销），结合功耗感知优化框架，系统评估EfficientNet-B0、ResNet-50、MobileNetV3-Large与FedAvg、FedProx、FedAvgM等聚合策略的组合配置。

Result: 不同模型-聚合器组合表现出不同的性能-能耗权衡，存在能同时实现竞争性诊断精度并显著降低系统资源需求的配置。

Conclusion: 分层联邦学习架构结合功耗感知优化可有效平衡植物病害分类任务中的预测性能与能源效率，为大规模IoT部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Early detection of plant diseases is critical for improving crop productivity, while it also facilitates the foundations of precision agriculture. Recent advances in distributed deep learning have enabled plant disease classification models to be trained across geographically distributed agricultural sensing infrastructures. However, deploying such systems in large-scale Internet of Things (IoT) environments, introduces significant challenges related to computational cost, energy consumption, and system efficiency. In this paper, we present a design-space exploration of hierarchical federated learning architectures for plant disease classification, with a particular focus on the trade-offs between predictive performance and energy efficiency. We further introduce a power- and energy-aware optimization framework that enables the systematic evaluation and selection of model-aggregator configurations under varying deployment constraints. The hierarchical federated architecture organizes distributed clients through intermediate aggregation layers, reducing communication and computational overhead. We evaluate multiple convolutional neural network architectures, including EfficientNet-B0, ResNet-50, and MobileNetV3-Large, in combination with different federated aggregation strategies such as FedAvg, FedProx, and FedAvgM. Experimental results demonstrate that different model-aggregator combinations exhibit distinct performance-energy trade-offs. Consequently, we highlight configurations that achieve competitive diagnostic accuracy and significantly reduce system resource requirements.

</details>


### [2] [Scaling Mobile Agent Systems: From Capability Density to Collective Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08124)
*Bowei He*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出通过提升单个智能体的能力密度和实现多智能体集体智能两个维度，来扩展移动智能体系统的可扩展性，以应对边缘设备和AIoT场景中的计算和智能碎片化挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动智能体系统受限于边缘设备的有限计算能力和设备间的智能碎片化，现有系统缺乏统一的扩展思路，亟需系统性方案来突破这一瓶颈。

Method: 提出一个统一的研究路线图，包含两个互补维度：(1) 通过紧凑型基础模型设计与压缩提升单个智能体的能力密度；(2) 通过多智能体协作与丰富通信实现集体智能。

Result: 提出了一个愿景框架，将孤立的移动智能体转变为高效、可扩展的分布式智能系统。

Conclusion: 基于近期模型和基础设施的进展，该研究路线有望实现移动智能体系统从孤立个体向分布式集体智能的范式转变。

Abstract: Mobile agent systems are emerging as a key paradigm for enabling intelligent applications on edge devices and in AIoT ecosystems. However, their scalability is fundamentally constrained by limited on-device computation and fragmented intelligence across devices. In this work, we propose a unified research agenda for scaling mobile agent systems along two complementary dimensions: (1) improving capability density of individual agents through compact foundation model design and compression, and (2) enabling collective intelligence via communication-rich multi-agent collaboration. Building on recent model and infrastructure advances, this vision aims to transform isolated mobile agents into a distributed intelligent system that is efficient and scalable.

</details>


### [3] [OrbitBFT: Enabling Scalable and Robust BFT Consensus in LEO Constellations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08132)
*Tianyi Sun,Shuo Liu,Minghui Xu,Xiuzhen Cheng*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出OrbitBFT，一种面向低轨卫星星座的两阶段分层拜占庭容错共识协议，通过利用轨道面内拓扑稳定性进行局部共识、设计拜占庭容错旁路机制和逐跳传输协议，实现了线性消息复杂度，在Starlink仿真环境中显著提升了可扩展性、吞吐量和延迟性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低轨卫星星座正从通信中继演变为自主平台，运行在日益拥挤和对抗的环境中。上行链路可能被切断或干扰，需要自主的拜占庭容错共识来保证卫星间可靠协调。然而传统BFT协议难以应用于动态拓扑、稀疏连接和有限带宽的LEO星座。

Method: 1) 利用轨道面内拓扑稳定性进行分区，实现局部面内共识，降低通信开销；2) 设计拜占庭容错旁路机制和逐跳传输协议，确保可靠消息传递并缓解拥塞；3) 针对LEO场景适配优化PBFT和HotStuff，实现线性消息复杂度，同时保证安全性和活跃性。

Result: 在基于Starlink的真实仿真环境中，OrbitBFT相比原始设计在可扩展性、吞吐量和延迟方面均有显著提升，成为一种实用且高效的大规模卫星网络BFT解决方案。

Conclusion: OrbitBFT通过巧妙利用LEO星座轨道面内的拓扑稳定性，结合层级化共识设计和拜占庭容错传输机制，成功将传统BFT协议适配到卫星网络这一特殊场景，为未来大规模自主卫星星座的可靠协调提供了可行的技术路径。

Abstract: Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellite constellations are evolving from communication relays into autonomous platforms operating in increasingly congested and contested environments. Since uplinks to ground stations can be severed or jammed, ensuring reliable coordination among satellites requires autonomous Byzantine Fault-Tolerant (BFT) consensus. However, applying conventional BFT protocols to LEO constellations is challenging due to their dynamic topology, sparse connectivity, and limited communication bandwidth. In this paper, we present OrbitBFT, a novel two-stage hierarchical BFT consensus protocol tailored to the unique characteristics of LEO constellations. First, OrbitBFT exploits the topological stability within orbital planes to partition the constellation and perform localized intra-plane consensus, which reduces communication overhead. Second, we design a Byzantine-resilient bypass mechanism and a hop-by-hop transmission protocol to ensure reliable message delivery and mitigate congestion, even in the presence of adversarial behavior. Third, we adapt and optimize PBFT and HotStuff to the LEO context, achieving linear message complexity while preserving safety and liveness. Extensive evaluations in a realistic Starlink-based simulation demonstrate that OrbitBFT significantly improves scalability, throughput, and latency compared to its original designs, making it a practical and efficient BFT solution for large-scale satellite networks.

</details>


### [4] [Intelligent Autonomous Orchestration for Distributed Cloud Resources using Complex-Stability Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08139)
*Gopal Krishna Shyam,Priyanka Bharti*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出C-SAS框架，利用复分析方法（Argument Principle和Rouché's Theorem）将遥测噪声转化为s平面上的"安全包络"，通过实时计算分析稳定性指数（ASI）抑制振荡性扩缩容操作，相比PID和ML方法减少94%的VM抖动并达到96%的资源效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统云环境中的资源扩缩容机制因网络延迟导致"云抖动"（cloud thrashing），现有启发式模型无法有效应对振荡性扩缩容带来的性能退化问题。

Method: 提出C-SAS框架，作为稳定性感知智能体：利用复变函数的Argument Principle和Rouché's Theorem将遥测噪声映射到s平面形成确定性"安全包络"（Safety Envelope），实时计算Analytic Stability Index (ASI)来抑制振荡性扩缩容操作。

Result: C-SAS减少VM抖动（flapping）94%，资源效率达到96%，显著优于标准PID和基于ML的自主代理方法。

Conclusion: 未来弹性的自主云基础设施需要内置形式化稳定性约束的AI驱动编排器。

Abstract: In modern distributed cloud environments, efficient resource allocation is required as traditional scaling mechanisms are often subject to cloud thrashing due to network-induced latencies. In this paper, we propose C-SAS (Complex-Stability Aware Scaling), an intelligent autonomous orchestration framework that leverages complex analytic methods to achieve system-wide equilibrium. In contrast to heuristic-based models, C-SAS acts as a stability-aware agent, converting telemetry noise into a deterministic "Safety Envelope" on the $s$-plane using the Argument Principle and Rouché's Theorem. The algorithm smartly suppresses oscillatory scaling operations that would otherwise degrade performance, by computing a real-time Analytic Stability Index (ASI). The experimental results show that C-SAS reduces VM flapping by 94\%, and achieves 96\% resource efficiency, significantly outperforming standard PID and ML-based autonomous agents. Our results suggest that future resilient autonomous cloud infrastructures will require AI-driven orchestrators with built-in formal stability constraints.

</details>


### [5] [Adaptive DNN Partitioning and Offloading in Heterogeneous Edge-Cloud Continuum](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09623)
*Akuen Akoi Deng,Eimantas Butkus,Alfreds Lapkovskis,Praveen Kumar Donta*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 提出了一种动态神经网络分割框架，在真实边缘-雾-云异构测试平台上实现自适应分区，相较静态基线方法可降低能耗27-36%和延迟6-23%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DNN分区与卸载方法多采用静态策略，忽略运行时动态变化，且通常在模拟环境中评估而非真实硬件，缺乏对实际环境适应性的考量。

Method: 框架在启动时对模型进行性能分析，测量节点间网络链路状况，并定期重新评估分区方案以适应环境变化。在包含树莓派（边缘）、笔记本电脑（雾）、高性能台式机（云）的物理测试平台上进行实验。

Result: 在VGG16、AlexNet和MobileNetV2三个CNN上测试，相比静态分区基线，能耗降低27.09-35.82%，端到端延迟降低6.34-22.92%。

Conclusion: 自适应分区策略优于静态分区方法，能够有效适应边缘-云连续体中的动态环境变化。

Abstract: In recent years, the use of artificial intelligence on resource-constrained IoT devices has grown significantly. However, existing approaches to DNN partitioning and offloading across the edge-cloud continuum typically rely on static methods that ignore runtime dynamics. Furthermore, they are often evaluated in simulated environments rather than on real hardware. To address this gap, we propose a framework that dynamically splits neural network layers across the heterogeneous continuum. The framework profiles the model at startup, measures network link conditions between nodes, and periodically re-evaluates the partition to adapt to environmental changes. We created a physical testbed comprising a Raspberry Pi edge device, a laptop fog, and a high-performance desktop PC as the cloud. We evaluated the framework over three widely adopted convolutional neural networks: VGG16, AlexNet, and MobileNetV2. Our results show that the framework achieves reductions in energy and end-to-end latency of 27.09--35.82% and 6.34--22.92%, respectively, compared to a static partitioning baseline. These findings confirm the superiority of adaptive to static partitioning.

</details>


### [6] [On defining and modeling context-awareness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08141)
*Panteleimon Rodis*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文基于计算理论（扩展图灵机模型）和分布式计算，提出了一种用于定义和建模上下文感知的数学框架，并通过云案例验证了其实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文感知系统缺乏统一的数学理论基础，导致系统间交互定义模糊，难以构建鲁棒、可扩展的模型。

Method: 利用扩展的交互式计算模型（超越经典图灵机）来定义上下文和上下文感知，该模型嵌入了交互和网络能力，并结合分布式计算建模方法。

Result: 建立了上下文感知的数学框架，能够构建鲁棒、可扩展的系统模型，并详细描述应用与上下文及外部源的交互过程。通过云上下文感知应用案例展示了该方法的实际可行性。

Conclusion: 将上下文感知与计算理论及分布式计算理论相连接是本框架的原创性贡献，为上下文感知系统的形式化建模提供了坚实的理论基础。

Abstract: Purpose - This paper presents a methodology for defining and modeling context-awareness and describing efficiently the interactions between systems, applications and their context. Also the relation of modern context-aware systems with distributed computation is investigated.
  Design/methodology/approach - On this purpose, definitions of context and context-awareness are developed based on the theory of computation and especially on a computational model for interactive computation which extends the classical Turing Machine model. The computational model proposed here, encloses interaction and networking capabilities for computational machines.
  Findings - The definition of context presented here develop a mathematical framework for working with context. Also the modeling approach of distributed computing enables us to build robust, scalable and detailed models for systems and application with context-aware capabilities. Also enables us to map the procedures that support context-aware operations providing detailed descriptions about the interactions of applications with their context as well as with other external sources.
  Practical implications - A case study of a cloud based context-aware application is examined using the modeling methodology described in the paper so as to demonstrate the practical usage of the theoretical framework that is presented
  Originality/value - The originality on the framework presented here relies on the connection of context-awareness with the theory of computation and distributed computing.

</details>


### [7] [Cloud Performance Decomposition for Long-Term Performance Engineering: A Case Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09787)
*Shimul Debnath,William Hart,Lori Pollock,Donald Lien,Wei Wang*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出两种时间序列分解技术（混合/手动方法和全自动方法），用于分离云性能中的趋势、季节性周期等混合因素。通过11个无服务器函数的案例研究，分解后预测MAPE仅1.8%-2.1%，且基于分解的资源分配将延迟变异性降低60%以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 云性能因资源竞争、工作负载变化等因素波动，这些影响相互交织，现有分解方法过于基础，难以捕捉复杂或间歇性模式，限制了跨云部署的适用性。

Method: 提出混合/手动与全自动两种时间序列分解技术，将性能轨迹分解为趋势、季节性（如周、季度周期）等分量，并利用分解结果进行性能预测与资源分配优化。

Result: 在11个无服务器函数上，混合方法预测MAPE仅1.8%，自动方法为2.1%，优于基本时间序列方法和深度学习。基于分解的资源分配在AWS上将延迟变异性降低60%以上，最大延迟降低10%。

Conclusion: 单一性能轨迹即蕴含丰富的可操作信息，时间序列分解能有效指导云管理决策，且季节性模式具有泛化性。

Abstract: Cloud performance fluctuates due to factors such as resource contention and workload changes. These factors can be short-term, seasonal, or long-term. Their effects are often intertwined in performance traces, making performance management difficult. Prior work on cloud performance engineering used time-series decomposition to separate these factors. However, existing approaches rely on basic decomposition methods that may miss key variation patterns and fail on traces with complex or intermittent patterns, limiting their usefulness across diverse cloud deployments.
  To address this limitation, we propose two time-series decomposition techniques for cloud performance engineering: a hybrid/manual method and a fully automatic method. Through a case study of 11 serverless functions, we show that both approaches can successfully and consistently reveal trends and seasonal cycles, such as weekly and quarterly patterns, which are otherwise obscured.
  As an evaluation and application of the decomposition, we used the decomposed components to predict future performance, yielding mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) values of only 1.8\% (hybrid) and 2.1\% (automatic), significantly outperforming basic time-series methods and deep learning. We further show that decomposition insights can guide practical resource allocation. Using decomposition-informed scaling on AWS, we reduced latency variability by over 60\% and maximum latency by 10\%. Similar experiments on benchmarks on AWS confirmed that seasonal patterns and performance gains generalize beyond our case study. Notably, our findings demonstrate that even a single performance trace contains rich actionable information for guiding cloud management decisions.

</details>


### [8] [SPECTRE: Hybrid Ordinary-Parallel Speculative Serving for Resource-Efficient LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08151)
*Jincheng Xie,Yawen Ling,Qi Xiao,Feiyu Zhang,Zhongyi Huang,Wen Hu,Yu Zheng*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: SPECTRE 是一个面向多模型 LLM 云服务系统的推理框架，通过复用未被充分利用的尾模型作为远程草稿模型，结合并行推测解码技术，显著提升大模型的服务吞吐量，最高可达 2.28 倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模型 LLM 云系统中，用户请求呈长尾分布——少数热门大模型承载大部分请求，而大量小尾模型利用率低。现有方案未能有效利用这些闲置的尾模型资源来加速大模型推理。

Method: 提出 SPECTRE 框架，核心创新包括：(1) 复用尾模型作远程草稿模型进行推测解码，草稿生成与目标验证并行执行；(2) 混合 ordinary-parallel 推测解码策略，基于吞吐分析阈值动态选择；(3) 推测优先级调度，在多租户流量下保持草稿-目标重叠；(4) 草稿侧提示压缩以减少延迟。基于 SGLang 实现。

Result: 在多种模型对、推理基准、长上下文工作负载和批次大小下评估，SPECTRE 一致提升大模型服务吞吐量，对尾模型原生负载干扰较小。在 Qwen3-235B-A22B (TP=8) 部署中，相比自回归解码实现 2.28 倍加速，相比最强推测解码基线额外提升 66%。

Conclusion: SPECTRE 通过将闲置尾模型转化为远程草稿模型，并设计并行推测解码及相关优化技术，有效提升了多模型 LLM 云系统的资源利用率和推理效率，且实现已在 SGLang 中开源。

Abstract: LLM serving platforms are increasingly deployed as multi-model cloud systems, where user demand is often long-tailed: a few popular large models receive most requests, while many smaller tail models remain underutilized. We propose \textbf{SPECTRE} (Parallel \textbf{SPEC}ulative Decoding with a Multi-\textbf{T}enant \textbf{RE}mote Drafter), a serving framework that reuses underutilized tail-model services as remote drafters for heavily loaded large-model services through speculative decoding. SPECTRE enables draft generation and target-side verification to run in parallel, and makes such parallelism effective through three techniques: a hybrid ordinary-parallel speculative decoding strategy guided by a threshold derived from throughput analysis, speculative priority scheduling to preserve draft--target overlap under multi-tenant traffic, and draft-side prompt compression to reduce draft latency. We implement SPECTRE in \texttt{SGLang} and evaluate it across multiple draft--target model pairs, reasoning benchmarks, real-world long-context workloads, and a wide range of batch sizes. Results show that SPECTRE consistently improves large-model serving throughput while causing only minor interference to the native workloads of tail-model services. In large-model deployments, including Qwen3-235B-A22B with TP=8, SPECTRE achieves up to \textbf{2.28$\times$ speedup} over autoregressive decoding and up to an additional \textbf{66\% relative improvement} over the strongest speculative decoding baselines. Talk is cheap, we show you the code: https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/22272.

</details>


### [9] [An Uncertainty-Aware Resilience Micro-Agent for Causal Observability in the Computing Continuum](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10718)
*Suvi De Silva,Alfreds Lapkovskis,Alaa Saleh,Sasu Tarkoma,Praveen Kumar Donta*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出AURORA框架，一种基于自由能原理和因果do-calculus的轻量级微代理系统，用于计算连续体中灰故障的诊断与缓解，在边缘层实现高精度、零破坏性修复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 计算连续体中的灰故障会产生模糊重叠症状，现有方法由于缺乏因果意识或在高度认知不确定性下采取行动，导致诊断不可靠且存在破坏性干预风险。

Method: 采用并行微代理架构，整合自由能原理、因果do-calculus和局部因果状态图，在马尔可夫毯内进行反事实根因分析；引入双门控执行机制，仅在因果置信度高且预测认知不确定性有界时才授权修复，否则将诊断任务升级到雾层。

Result: AURORA达到0%破坏性动作率，62.0%修复准确率，平均修复时间3ms，优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 将因果推断限制在因果相关变量可在降低计算开销的同时保持诊断保真度，不确定性感知的干预机制有效避免了边缘环境中的破坏性操作。

Abstract: Grey failures in the computing continuum produce ambiguous overlapping symptoms that existing approaches fail to diagnose reliably, either due to a lack of causal awareness or acting under high epistemic uncertainty, risking destructive interventions. This paper presents an uncertainty-aware resilience micro-agent for causal observability (AURORA), a lightweight framework for diagnosing and mitigating grey failures in edge-tier environments. The framework employs parallel micro-agents that integrate the free-energy principle, causal do-calculus, and localized causal state-graphs to support counterfactual root-cause analysis within each fault's Markov blanket. Restricting inference to causally relevant variables reduces computational overhead while preserving diagnostic fidelity. AURORA further introduces a dual-gated execution mechanism that authorizes remediation only when causal confidence is high and predicted epistemic uncertainty is bounded; otherwise, it abstains from local intervention and escalates the diagnostic payload to the fog tier. Our experiments demonstrate that AURORA outperforms baselines, achieving a 0% destructive action rate, while maintaining 62.0% repair accuracy and a 3ms mean time to repair.

</details>


### [10] [Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning: Integrating Zero-Knowledge Proofs in Scalable Distributed Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08152)
*Divya Gupta*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合零知识证明（ZKP）和分布式大数据处理框架的联邦学习架构，通过将损失函数转化为R1CS约束系统实现密码学验证，在1000个分布式节点上达到94.2%的对抗条件下准确率保持，有效抵御模型投毒攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准联邦学习面临两大核心挑战：（1）对抗性梯度更新导致的模型投毒攻击；（2）聚合层的计算瓶颈。现有FL实现无法在保护数据隐私的同时有效抵御攻击，亟需一种既能验证节点计算完整性又不暴露原始梯度的安全架构。

Method: 提出混合架构：（1）设计零知识证明（ZKP）包装器，在全局聚合前对节点计算进行密码学验证，无需检查原始梯度即可中和模型投毒攻击；（2）采用极端梯度提升（XGBoost）模型优化分布式边缘执行；（3）将机器学习损失函数形式化转换为Rank-1约束系统（R1CS），实现简洁验证。

Result: 实验结果显示：在对抗条件下达到94.2%的准确率保持；支持1000个并行分布式节点的可扩展吞吐量；成功在密码学安全与高性能分布式AI之间取得平衡。

Conclusion: 本文证明了ZKP与分布式大数据处理框架的融合能够有效桥接严格的密码学安全与高性能分布式AI之间的鸿沟，为联邦学习提供了一种兼具安全性和可扩展性的端到端解决方案。

Abstract: The intersection of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and distributed systems has given rise to Federated Learning (FL), a paradigm that enables decentralized model training without compromising local data privacy. As organizational data silos grow, deploying complex machine learning models across highly distributed edge networks becomes a critical infrastructural challenge. Standard FL implementations suffer from severe vulnerabilities related to adversarial gradient updates and computational bottlenecks at the aggregation layer. This paper presents a novel, end-to-end distributed architecture that hardens FL pipelines using advanced cryptographic verification and optimized big data processing frameworks. We introduce a Zero-Knowledge Proof (ZKP) wrapper that cryptographically validates node computations before global aggregation, neutralizing model poisoning attacks without inspecting raw gradients. Additionally, we evaluate the system's performance using extreme gradient boosting models optimized for distributed edge execution. We formalize the mathematical transformation of the machine learning loss functions into Rank-1 Constraint Systems (R1CS) suitable for succinct verification. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our hybrid architecture achieves a 94.2\% accuracy retention under adversarial conditions while maintaining scalable throughput across 1,000 parallel distributed nodes, effectively bridging the gap between rigorous cryptographic security and high-performance distributed AI.

</details>


### [11] [parHSOM: A novel parallel Hierarchical Self-Organizing Map implementation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08164)
*Rebekah Lane,Logan Cummins,Andy Perkins,George Trawick,Ioana Banicescu,Sudip Mittal*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一種並行層級自組織映射（parHSOM）架構，用於加速基於HSOM的入侵檢測系統訓練，實驗證明其在不損失性能的前提下顯著提升訓練速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 傳統HSOM在大型數據集上訓練速度緩慢，限制了其在入侵檢測系統中的應用效率。

Method: 提出並行HSOM架構（parHSOM），透過平行計算加速訓練過程。

Result: parHSOM在兩個測試平台、四種輸出網格大小、五個網絡安全數據集上均一致比Sequential HSOM訓練更快，且無顯著性能損失。

Conclusion: 並行計算能有效加速HSOM訓練，且不影響模型性能，為後續平行HSOM研究提供了基礎。

Abstract: The digital age has completely transformed the way that information is processed and stored, which makes cybersecurity a crucial field of research. Cybersecurity contains many different domains, but this work focuses on Intrusion Detection Systems (IDSs). Within the literature, Hierarchical Self-Organizing Maps (HSOMs) have been used to create trustworthy, explainable, and AI-based IDSs. However, HSOMs are trained sequentially, which means that training HSOMs on large datasets is slow. This work presents a novel parallel HSOM architecture, called parHSOM. The purpose of this research is to investigate the effect that parallel computation has on the HSOM training time. parHSOM is tested on two different testbeds, four different output grid sizes, and five different cybersecurity datasets. Performance metrics collected from these experiments show that parHSOM consistently trains faster than the Sequential HSOM algorithm without any significant loss in performance. Additionally, this work provides a platform for further investigation into parallel HSOM implementations.

</details>


### [12] [Unleashing Scalable Context Parallelism for Foundation Models Pre-Training via FCP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08524)
*Yilong Zhao,Xiaonan Nie,Kan Zhu,Shuang Ma,Zhichao Lai,Hongxiang Hao,Yang Zhou,Baris Kasikci,Ion Stoica*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: FCP是一种灵活的上下文并行范式，通过块级粒度的分片和调度，以及任意点对点通信，有效处理训练数据中序列长度的巨大变化，在256块NVIDIA GPU上实现了近线性可扩展性，注意力MFU提升1.13-2.21倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文并行方法无法有效处理训练数据集中序列长度的剧烈变化，对短序列过度分片导致计算效率低下和通信开销过大，或者将长短序列分开处理缺乏合理的装箱策略，造成工作负载不均衡。

Method: 提出FCP范式，采用块级粒度对序列进行分片和调度；摒弃刚性通信拓扑（如环结构），支持任意点对点通信，实现序列块在工作节点间的灵活放置；通过装箱策略将长短序列的块混合放置，兼顾计算效率与负载均衡。

Result: 在多达256块NVIDIA GPU上实现近线性可扩展性，注意力模型利用率（MFU）提升1.13倍至2.21倍。

Conclusion: FCP通过块级灵活调度有效解决了序列长度变化带来的并行效率问题，显著提升了大规模GPU集群上的训练性能。

Abstract: Context parallelism (CP) has been widely adopted to support the growing context length in foundation model pretraining. However, existing designs fail to handle the large variation in sequence length from training datasets, resulting in suboptimal performance. These methods often over-shard short sequences, leading to compute inefficiency and excessive communication, or process long and short sequences separately without proper bin-packing, causing workload imbalance. In this paper, we propose FCP, a flexible context parallelism paradigm that shards and schedules sequences at block-level granularity. Instead of relying on rigid communication topologies such as ring, FCP enables arbitrary peer-to-peer communication, allowing flexible placement of sequence blocks across workers. By bin-packing blocks from both short and long sequences, FCP achieves both high compute efficiency and balanced workload distribution. Extensive evaluations show that FCP attains near-linear scalability on up to 256 NVIDIA GPUs, with 1.13x-2.21x improvement in the attention MFU.

</details>


### [13] [MARLaaS: Multi-Tenant Asynchronous Reinforcement Learning as a Service](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08527)
*Timothy Tin Long Yu,Gursimran Singh,Ge Shi,Hanieh Sadri,Yong Zhang,Zhenan Fan*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 提出MARLaaS，一种多租户异步强化学习即服务系统，通过共享基础模型、LoRA适配器和解耦异步架构，实现多用户多任务并发的RLVR微调，在32个并发任务下达到单任务SOTA性能，加速器利用率提升4.3倍，训练时间减少85%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLVR显著提升LLM推理能力，但微调模型计算成本过高，限制了其可及性。现有方法无法高效支持多用户多任务的并发RL微调。

Method: (1) 跨租户共享基础模型，使用轻量级LoRA适配器；(2) 采用解耦异步架构，将rollout生成、环境交互和策略训练解耦为独立调度阶段，支持事件驱动、各任务按自身节奏推进RL流水线。

Result: 在最多32个并发任务的多任务设置下，实现单任务SOTA性能，加速器利用率提升4.3倍，端到端训练时间减少85%。

Conclusion: MARLaaS通过资源高效的多租户异步架构，大幅降低了RLVR微调的成本门槛，使更广泛的用户群能够进行LLM推理能力的强化学习微调。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has significantly improved the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs), particularly in multi-turn agentic settings involving environment interaction like tool use. However, fine-tuning such models remains prohibitively expensive due to high computational requirements, limiting accessibility. We propose MARLaaS (Multi-tenant Asynchronous RL as a Service), a system for concurrent RL fine-tuning across multiple users and tasks. Our approach is based on two key ideas: (1) sharing a base model across tenants using lightweight LoRA adapters, and (2) a disaggregated asynchronous architecture that decouples rollout generation, environment interaction, and policy training into independently scheduled stages. This design enables tasks to progress through the RL pipeline at their own pace in an event-driven manner, reducing cross-task interference, idle time, and end-to-end latency. In multi-task settings (we report up to 32 concurrent tasks), MARLaaS achieves single-task state-of-the-art performance while improving accelerator utilization by up to 4.3x and reducing end-to-end training time by 85%.

</details>


### [14] [QUANTAS 2 An Abstract, Concrete and Byzantine Simulator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08547)
*Mikhail Nesterenko,Joseph Oglio*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: QUANTAS 2 是一个扩展的分布式算法模拟器，支持抽象回合制模拟和具体套接字执行模式，并引入可复用的拜占庭故障接口，用于模拟崩溃、模棱两可、自私挖矿等恶意行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原有 QUANTAS 仅支持抽象、回合制模拟，无法进行具体部署验证，且缺乏灵活的可复用拜占庭故障注入机制，研究者需重写算法来测试对抗行为。

Method: QUANTAS 2 在原有抽象模拟基础上增加了基于套接字的具体执行模式，使同一算法实现可在本地或分布式机器上运行；并设计了可组合拜占庭故障策略接口，将恶意行为编码为可替换的发送、接收和本地计算策略。

Result: 在区块链、共识、分布式哈希表、可靠数据链路等算法上进行了演示，包括 PoW 区块链的寄生虫链扫描、PBFT 模棱两可实验、Raft 崩溃实验、Chord/Kademlia 扩展实验，覆盖抽象和具体两种模式。

Conclusion: QUANTAS 2 提供了一个紧凑且灵活的实验平台，既能进行快速的抽象探索，又能进行具体的验证和对抗性故障注入，有助于分布式算法研究。

Abstract: We present QUANTAS 2: a new distributed algorithm simulator and quantitative performance analysis tool. We use the original QUANTAS as a foundation. QUANTAS 2 can perform fast abstract exploration, concrete validation, and adversarial fault injection while preserving a compact implementation model for distributed algorithm researchers. The original QUANTAS was designed as an abstract, round-based simulator, which allows researchers to separate algorithmic behavior from the artifacts of a particular operating system, network stack, or physical deployment. QUANTAS 2 extends that design in two directions. First, QUANTAS 2 supports a concrete socket-based execution mode, allowing the same algorithm implementations and JSON experiment descriptions to run across local or distributed computers. Second, QUANTAS 2 adds a reusable Byzantine-fault interface in which Byzantine behavior is encoded as composable fault strategy that substitutes correct sends, receives, and local computation. This allows researchers to simulate crash, equivocation, selfish-mining, and other adversarial behaviors without rewriting the simulated algorithm. We demonstrate the resulting platform on blockchain, consensus, distributed hash table, and reliable data link algorithms. We perform parasite-chain sweeps for proof-of-work blockchains, PBFT equivocation experiments, Raft crash experiments, and Chord/Kademlia scale experiments over both abstract and concrete modes.

</details>


### [15] [Transforming the Use of Earth Observation Data: Exascale Training of a Generative Compression Model with Historical Priors for up to 10,000x Data Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08633)
*Jinxiao Zhang,Runmin Dong,Xiyong Wu,Xihan Huang,Shenggan Cheng,Yunkai Yang,Zheng Zhou,Yunpu Xu,Zhaoyang Luo,Miao Yang,Fan Wei,Mengxuan Chen,Yang You,Juepeng Zheng,Weijia Li,Yutong Lu,Haohuan Fu*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于历史先验的生成式压缩框架，利用地球观测数据重复测量同一颗行星的特性，在Armv9超算上实现100倍至10,000倍的数据压缩，训练峰值达2.16 EFLOP/s，将压缩从存储工具转变为主动、任务自适应的数据处理基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 地球观测已成为最大的数据产生活动之一，但现有处理流程仅将压缩视为存储和传输工具，未能充分利用其数据价值。作者希望利用地球观测数据重复测量同一颗行星（时间序列强相关）这一独特特性，实现极端压缩的新范式。

Method: 1) 提出历史先验生成式压缩框架（historical-prior generative compression），利用历史地球观测档案进行学习；2) 在LineShine Armv9 CPU超算上训练大规模生成式压缩模型，跨模型设计、内核、内存层次、运行时和并行性进行协同优化；3) 实现端到端训练持续1.54 EFLOP/s、峰值2.16 EFLOP/s。

Result: 实现了跨下游任务100倍至10,000倍的按需数据缩减；在Armv9超算上训练持续1.54 EFLOP/s，峰值达2.16 EFLOP/s。

Conclusion: 历史先验生成式压缩能够将地球观测数据转变为主动的、任务自适应的基础，服务于数据采集、传输、存储和科学使用。

Abstract: Earth observation is becoming one of the largest data-producing activities in science, yet current pipelines still treat compression as a storage and transmission tool rather than a new way to use data. We present a generative compression framework that learns from historical Earth observation archives and enables on-demand 100x to 10,000x data reduction across downstream tasks. Unlike general visual data, Earth observation repeatedly measures the same evolving planet, making historical-prior learning feasible for extreme compression. To realize this paradigm, we train large generative compression models at exascale on the LineShine Armv9 CPU supercomputer, with co-optimization across model design, kernels, memory hierarchy, runtime, and parallelism. Our implementation sustains 1.54 EFLOP/s and peaks at 2.16 EFLOP/s in end-to-end training. This work shows that historical-prior generative compression can turn Earth observation data into an active, task-adaptive foundation for acquisition, delivery, storage, and scientific use.

</details>


### [16] [TS-Verkle: A TypeScript Native Verkle Library With On-chain Verifier](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08682)
*Zhikai Li,Xuekai Liu,Boyuan Xu,Eric Chen,Bhaskar Krishnamachari*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出并实现了首个TypeScript原生的Verkle树（TS-verkle），并配套Solidity链上验证器。实验发现，未经优化的Verkle树实现成本高于Merkle树，挑战了以往文献的假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 区块链面临可扩展性挑战，现有数据结构和验证机制效率不足。Verkle树理论上能通过紧凑证明优化存储和扩展性，但其在智能合约层面的实际实现尚属空白。

Method: 首次实现TypeScript原生Verkle树（TS-verkle），配合Solidity链上验证器，并在web3后端环境下进行实证评估。

Result: 实证评估表明，基础Verkle树实现的实际成本高于Merkle树，并未优于后者，与以往文献的理论预期相悖。

Conclusion: Verkle树在未采用高级优化技术时并不优于Merkle树，为区块链开发者和研究者提供了重要的实践洞察。

Abstract: Blockchain systems face significant scalability challenges due to growing data volumes and increasing transaction demands, necessitating more efficient data structures and verification mechanisms. Verkle trees, a novel data structure combining the efficiency of Merkle trees with the compactness of vector commitments, have gained attention for their potential to optimize blockchain storage and improve scalability. However, their practical implementation, especially at the smart contract level, has remained unexplored. To address these challenges, we present TS-verkle, the first known TypeScript-native implementation of Verkle trees designed for web3 backend compatibility, coupled with a corresponding on-chain verifier written in Solidity. Our work bridges this gap by providing a concrete implementation of Verkle trees and demonstrating their feasibility for on-chain verification. While previous literature suggests Verkle trees should outperform Merkle trees due to their succinct proof size, our empirical evaluation reveals that basic implementations of Verkle trees actually incur higher costs than Merkle trees without advanced optimization techniques. This finding represents a crucial insight for blockchain developers and researchers considering Verkle tree adoption. The paper discusses implementation strategies and performance characteristics while exploring implications for scaling and data availability in decentralized blockchain systems.

</details>


### [17] [MegaScale-Omni: A Hyper-Scale, Workload-Resilient System for MultiModal LLM Training in Production](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08962)
*Chunyu Xue,Yangrui Chen,Jianyu Jiang,Ningxin Zheng,Junda Feng,Jingji Chen,Shixiong Zhao,Shen Yan,Yi Lin,Lei Shi,Zanbo Wang,Lishu Luo,Faming Wu,Haibin Lin,Xin Liu,Yanghua Peng,Quan Chen*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: MegaScale-Omni是一个工业级MLLM训练系统，通过编码器-LLM复用方案，结合解耦并行策略、统一表示与工作负载均衡技术，实现了对动态工作负载的高效适应，在数千GPU规模下吞吐量提升1.27倍至7.57倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM训练系统在面对动态多模态数据集（模态混合比例和样本长度分布动态变化）时效率低下，因为资源分配和模型并行化的决策是静态耦合的。

Method: 提出编码器-LLM复用训练方案，包含三个关键技术：(1) 解耦并行策略——编码器采用长-短序列并行，LLM主干采用完整5D并行，两者在通信高效布局下组织；(2) 统一编码器-LLM表示实现灵活共置，以及具有工作负载弹性的编码器-LLM联合流水线新范式；(3) 工作负载平衡技术——数据加载器中分散式分组重排序和从编码器到LLM ranks的自适应重分片。

Result: 在数千GPU的生产级动态工作负载下，与四种最先进系统相比，吞吐量提升1.27倍至7.57倍。

Conclusion: MegaScale-Omni通过解耦编码器与LLM的并行策略、统一表示和负载均衡技术，有效解决了动态多模态训练场景下的效率瓶颈，验证了在大规模部署中的可行性。

Abstract: As the foundational component of versatile AI applications, training an multimodal large language model (MLLM) relies on multimodal datasets with dynamic modality mixture proportions and sample length distributions. However, existing MLLM systems remain inefficient under dynamic workloads, due to statically coupled decisions of resource allocation and model parallelization between encoders and the LLM backbone. This paper presents MegaScale-Omni, an industrial-grade MLLM training system tailored for dynamic workload adaption and hyper-scale deployment. MegaScale-Omni is built upon the training scheme of encoder-LLM multiplexing with three key innovations: (1) Decoupled parallelism strategies with long-short sequence parallelism for encoders to process variable-length samples, and full-fledged 5D parallelism for the LLM backbone, both organized under a communication-efficient parallelization layout. (2) Unified encoder-LLM representations for flexible, extensible colocation, and a new paradigm of encoder-LLM joint pipeline with workload resilience. (3) Workload balancing techniques via decentralized grouped reordering in data loaders and adaptive resharding from encoder to LLM ranks. MegaScale-Omni is deployed as the foundation of our in-house large-scale MLLM training tasks with thousands of GPUs. Our experimental results demonstrate $1.27\times$-$7.57\times$ throughput improvement under production-grade dynamic workloads, as compared to four state-of-the-art systems.

</details>


### [18] [Light Cone Consistency: Toward a Unified Theory of Consistency in Message-Passing Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09114)
*Rob Landers,Kaben Kramer*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出Light Cone Consistency (LCC)框架，将50+种一致性模型统一描述为因果闭包、分支解析、时效性三个约束的配置，并发现CAP、FLP、AFC三个不可能性结果各自约束一对参数，且三者构成完全纠缠的三角形——任何分布式系统必须放松至少一个参数才能工作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的一致性模型数量庞大且关系混乱，缺乏一个统一的描述框架来理解它们之间的本质联系和不可能性结果的根本来源。

Method: 提出LCC框架：每个观察者的可见子DAG由三个约束（因果闭包C、分支解析O、时效性R）和一个返回值函数F配置；通过映射Viotti和Vukolic分类法中的85种配置来验证框架的表达力；分析CAP、FLP、AFC三个不可能性结果在参数空间中的对应关系。

Result: 1）LCC框架能覆盖50+种命名的一致性模型；2）CAP、FLP、AFC各自约束恰好一对参数，且这些约束是极小且独立的；3）三个参数完全纠缠，违反任何一个都会级联到另外两个；4）三个不可能性表面构成一个完全连通的三角形，任何系统必须退出该三角形。

Conclusion: 所有分布式系统都在因果闭包、分支解析、时效性构成的不可能性三角形中运作，必须放松至少一个参数。系统在使用中（任何约束非平凡）就会暴露于这些表面。提出了开放问题：可能存在第四个表面（日志局部性）、未被发现的约束，以及安全-活跃分叉的普适性。

Abstract: Every distributed system -- databases, networks, postal services, CPU caches -- is a message-passing system. Every message-passing system is a growing causal log observed by a set of observers. We present Light Cone Consistency (LCC), a framework that describes every known consistency model as a configuration of three constraints on each observer's visible sub-DAG: causal closure $C(\mathrm{deps})$, fork resolution $O(π)$, and timeliness $R(δ)$, plus an orthogonal return-value function $F$. We map 85 configurations, covering all 50+ named models from Viotti and Vukolic's taxonomy, with caveats for fork-based and probabilistic models.
  We show that three impossibility results of distributed computing -- CAP, FLP, and AFC -- each constrain exactly one pair of parameters, and prove they are minimal and independent. Our central result is the observation that these three constraints are fully entangled: violation of any one surface cascades to the other two, because restoring any parameter requires messages -- and those messages are subject to all three constraints. The three parameters and their pairwise impossibility surfaces form a fully connected triangle. Every distributed system must exit the triangle by relaxing at least one parameter. The triangle activates only when the system is in use: $C \neq \mathrm{none}$, $O \neq \mathrm{trivial}$, or $R \neq \mathrm{absent}$ each introduces a constraint that exposes the system to the surfaces. A system that demands nothing -- or writes far slower than its propagation delay -- is trivially linearizable. We identify open problems including a conjectured fourth surface (log locality), undiscovered constraints, and the universality of the safety-liveness fork as the consequence of crossing any boundary.

</details>


### [19] [Split CNN Inference on Networked Microcontrollers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09357)
*Junyu Lu,Shashwath Suresh,Hao Liu,Qi Hong,Qing Wang*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向网络化MCU的细粒度分裂推理系统，通过在子层级（kernel/neuron粒度）拆分CNN模型，将参数和中间激活分布到多个MCU上，从而突破单MCU的峰值RAM瓶颈，使原本无法运行的模型得以协作执行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在MCU上运行DNN受限于极小的内存资源，现有TinyML技术虽减小了模型大小，但推理过程中中间激活（中间特征图）导致的峰值RAM过高，使得许多模型仍无法在单MCU上独立运行。

Method: 提出细粒度分裂推理系统：1）在子层级（kernel-wise和neuron-wise）而非层边界拆分CNN模型；2）将模型参数和中间激活分布到多个MCU上；3）轻量级资源感知协调器负责在异构MCU设备间编排推理流程。

Result: 在最多8个MCU的实际实验平台上，使用MobileNetV2进行评估，结果表明原本无法在单MCU上运行的CNN模型可以在网络化MCU上成功执行，降低了每个MCU的峰值RAM使用，同时保持了实用的端到端推理延迟。

Conclusion: 细粒度（子层级）分裂推理是突破MCU内存瓶颈的有效途径，可显著扩展可在嵌入式设备上部署的CNN模型范围，代码已开源。

Abstract: Running deep neural networks on microcontroller units (MCUs) is severely constrained by limited memory resources. While TinyML techniques reduce model size and computation, they often fail in practice due to excessive peak Random Access Memory (RAM) usage during inference, dominated by intermediate activations. As a result, many models remain infeasible on standalone MCUs. In this work, we present a fine-grained split inference system for networked MCUs that enables collaborative inference of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) models across multiple devices. Our key insight is that breaking the memory bottleneck requires splitting inference at sub-layer granularity rather than at layer boundaries. We reinterpret pre-trained models to enable kernel-wise and neuron-wise partitioning, and distribute both model parameters and intermediate activations across multiple MCUs. A lightweight, resource-aware coordinator orchestrates the inference across MCU devices with heterogeneous resources. We implement the proposed system on a real testbed and evaluate it on up to 8 MCUs using MobileNetV2, a representative CNN model. Our experimental results show that CNN models infeasible on a single MCU can be executed across networked MCUs, reducing the per-MCU peak RAM usage while maintaining the practical end-to-end inference latency. All the source code of this work can be found here: https://github.com/shashsuresh/split-inference-on-MCUs.

</details>


### [20] [From Detection to Recovery: Operational Analysis on LLM Pre-training with 504 GPUs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09370)
*Daemyung Kang,Eunjin Hwang,Hanjeong Lee,HyeokJin Kim,Hyunhoi Koo,Jeongkyu Shin,Jeongseok Kang,Jihyun Kang,Joongi Kim,Junbum Lee,Jungseung Yang,Kyujin Cho,Youngsook Song*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文对63节点（504 GPU）NVIDIA B200生产集群进行了实证分析，基于55天Prometheus数据和73天运维日志，揭示了跨组织环境下的存储IO瓶颈、GPU故障检测（10/10检测率）、检查点带宽悖论（原因在于128槽NFS RPC层饱和）以及多节点故障恢复特性（前三节点占50%以上排除，自动重试成功率33.3% vs 手工12.5%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模AI训练中硬件故障已成为常态，但生产集群的公开运维证据极度匮乏；跨组织环境下单一团队难以隔离大规模现象，亟需基于实际生产数据的定量分析来指导故障检测与恢复策略设计。

Method: 在跨组织（SKT、Upstage等五方）共享监控管道的生产基础设施上，收集63节点B200集群的Prometheus时序数据（55天）和运维日志（73天，涵盖224个多节点训练任务），进行三项定量分析：统计751个Prometheus指标和10个XID GPU故障的检测性能、沿GPU VRAM到NFS路径剖析523个检查点事件、分析多节点故障排除与自动重试链。

Result: 1）10/10的故障检测率（XID前仅2/10），每日约0.84假阳性，无单一指标普适所有故障类型；2）200 Gbps RoCE利用率仅1.4-10.4%的"带宽悖论"归因于128槽NFS RPC层饱和；3）63节点中前3节点占50%以上排除，自动重试链成功率33.3%（12链73次尝试）优于手工恢复的12.5%，中位重试间隔11分钟。

Conclusion: 生产集群故障管理需采用多信号检测策略，NFS RPC层是检查点性能的关键瓶颈，自动重试机制显著优于人工恢复；跨组织共享监控对诊断大规模问题不可或缺。

Abstract: Large-scale AI training is now fundamentally a distributed systems problem, and hardware failures have become routine operating conditions rather than rare exceptions. Public operational evidence from production training clusters, however, remains scarce. This technical report presents an empirical analysis of a 63-node NVIDIA B200 production cluster (504 GPUs), using 55 days of Prometheus time-series data and 73 days of operational logs covering 224 multi-node training sessions. The cluster operates within a cross-organizational environment in which five parties (SKT, Upstage, Lablup, NVIDIA Korea, and VAST Data) share a unified monitoring pipeline. This arrangement enabled joint diagnosis of a 60-node-scale storage I/O bottleneck that did not appear at 2-4-node scale, a production-scale phenomenon no single team could isolate alone. Drawing on a months-long pre-training campaign, we perform three quantitative analyses yielding four findings. First, statistical analysis over 751 Prometheus metrics and 10 XID-identified GPU failures achieves a 10/10 detection rate (2/10 pre-XID) at ~0.84 false positives per day. No single metric is consistently dominant across failure types, motivating a multi-signal detection strategy. Second, profiling 523 checkpoint events along the GPU VRAM to NFS path attributes the "bandwidth paradox" (1.4-10.4% utilization of 200 Gbps RoCE) to saturation of the 128-slot NFS RPC layer. Third, multi-node failure response shows concentrated exclusions (top 3 of 63 nodes account for >50% of all exclusions) and an auto-retry chain success rate of 33.3% over 12 chains (73 attempts), 2.7x the 12.5% manual recovery rate; the median retry interval is 11 min (IQR 10-11). All analyses are grounded in production infrastructure providing session-level workload management, GPU-centric scheduling, and unified observability.

</details>


### [21] [ATLAS: Efficient Out-of-Core Inference for Billion-Scale Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09402)
*Pranjal Naman,Yogesh Simmhan*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: ATLAS是一个基于磁盘的GNN推理框架，通过广播执行模型、流式读取和层级内存管理，在单机上实现了对十亿级图的全图高效推理，相比现有方法提速约12-30倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OOC系统主要针对GNN训练设计，在全图推理场景下存在大量读放大、不规则I/O和内存压力问题，导致推理效率低下。

Method: 提出广播执行模型替代传统的gather模式，实现每层特征和嵌入的顺序单遍流式读取；设计分层内存-磁盘结构，采用最小待处理消息驱逐策略、图重排序和GPU加速流水线。

Result: 在拥有128GB RAM和2TB SSD的单机上，对最大40亿边、550GB特征的超大规模图，相比SOTA OOC基线提升约12-30倍；当特征可完全放入内存时，性能差距在5%以内。

Conclusion: ATLAS证明了在有限单机资源下高效处理十亿级图全图推理的可行性，为工业级大规模GNN推理提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Graph Neural Network (GNN) inference on billion-scale graphs is critical for domains like fintech and recommendation systems. Full-graph inference on these large graphs can be challenging due to high communication costs in distributed settings and high I/O costs in disk-backed Out-of-Core (OOC) settings. Existing OOC systems, operating across disk and memory, primarily focus on GNN training and perform poorly for full-graph inference due to massive read amplification, irregular I/O, and memory pressure. We present ATLAS, a disk-based GNN inference framework that enables efficient full-graph, layer-wise inference on graphs whose topologies, features and intermediate embeddings exceed the available memory on single machines. ATLAS replaces gather-based execution with a broadcast-based model that enables sequential, single-pass streaming reads of features and embeddings per layer. A tiered memory-disk hierarchy with minimum-pending-message eviction, graph reordering and a GPU-accelerated pipeline sustains high throughput within $128$ GiB RAM and $2$ TiB SSD. Across out-of-core graphs with up to $4$B edges and $550$ GiB features and multiple GNN architectures, ATLAS improves end-to-end inference time by $\approx12$--$30\times$ over State-of-the-Art (SOTA) OOC baselines on a single workstation, while remaining within $\approx5\%$ when features fit in memory.

</details>


### [22] [PoHAR: Understanding Hyperlocal Human Activities with Pollution Sensor Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09434)
*Prasenjit Karmakar,Karthik Reddy,Sandip Chakraborty*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 提出PoHAR框架，利用低成本空气质量传感器网络，通过无冲突复制数据结构、层次聚类和基于领导者的分组推理，实现隐私保护的室内活动检测，准确率达97.41%-99.68%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有室内活动检测依赖音视频、射频和惯性传感器，存在隐私问题、成本高、难以规模化部署的局限。空气质量传感器虽具隐私保护、低成本、易扩展优势，但受限于低算力、内存和能耗，难以在分布式网络中达成数据共识并准确识别活动影响传感器组。

Method: (i) 采用无冲突复制数据类型实现数据共享；(ii) 在ESP32上设计层次聚类算法，结合自监督距离度量检测受活动影响的传感器组；(iii) 基于领导者机制，使用现成ML分类器进行组内推理，实现超本地化室内活动协同检测。

Result: 室内活动检测准确率97.41%，烹饪活动检测准确率99.68%，推理延迟低于34微秒，在设备端实现高效活动检测。

Conclusion: PoHAR框架有效解决了低功耗空气质量传感器网络的分布式协作问题，在保护隐私的前提下实现了高精度、低延迟的室内活动识别，为智能家居和医疗应用提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Low-cost air quality sensors are becoming ubiquitous in our daily lives as public awareness of air pollution continues to grow, and people take measures to monitor and improve the air they breathe indoors. Besides the standard operation of these sensors, fluctuations in environmental parameters can be leveraged to understand human behavior and activities in indoor spaces. Unlike traditional audio-visual, Radio Frequency, and inertial sensors, air quality sensors are easily scalable to a household, are privacy-preserving, and more economical. Such distributed sensor networks must jointly make decisions to monitor indoor occupants for downstream smart home and healthcare applications. However, due to low processing power, memory, and energy, they often struggle to maintain distributed data consensus and identify activity-affected sensor groups for accurate on-device inference. In this paper, we propose PoHAR framework that implements: (i) a conflict-free replicated data primitive for data sharing, (ii) a hierarchical clustering for ESP32 to detect activity-affected sensor groups with a self-supervised distance metric, and (iii) a leader-based group inference with off-the-shelf ML classifiers, enabling the sensor network to collaboratively detect hyperlocal indoor activities. Our extensive experiments demonstrated on-device activity detection, achieving 97.41% accuracy for indoor activity and 99.68% for cooking activity, using off-the-shelf ML models with latency below 34 microseconds.

</details>


### [23] [Multi-Tier Labeling and Physics-Informed Learning for Orbital Anomaly Detection at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09790)
*Yong Fu*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多层级弱监督标注流水线，结合物理规则、IMM-UKF滤波器和补充校准步骤，对232M条TLE记录生成8.6M个带标签的轨道异常序列，并训练了一个650万参数的Transformer模型，在机动检测上达55.4%召回率、衰减检测达62.8%召回率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 轨道异常检测对于LEO卫星的避碰、衰减预测和合点筛查至关重要，但瓶颈在于缺乏公开的真实标注数据，人工标注无法扩展到约10^4颗活跃卫星，纯规则检测器为了精度牺牲召回率，导致无法捕捉大多数行为异常。

Method: 构建三阶段弱监督标注流水线：1) 快速物理规则集 (rule_v1)；2) IMM-UKF滤波器组；3) 补充元素校准步骤 (supGP)。对60年232M条TLE记录生成8.6M个长度为50的标注序列。训练一个6.5M参数的Transformer，采用两阶段训练策略。

Result: IMM-UKF发现的异常量是rule_v1的42.6倍。Transformer在测试集上实现机动召回率55.4%、衰减召回率62.8%。时间差特征消融实验使衰减召回率相对提升107%。

Conclusion: 该模型定位为高召回率的三级分类器，用于筛选候选事件供下游过滤，而非最终归因。未来方向是构建基于神经ODE的轨道世界模型。

Abstract: Detecting orbital anomalies, such as maneuvers, atmospheric decay, and attitude upsets, across the rapidly growing population of low-Earth-orbit (LEO) satellites is a prerequisite for collision avoidance, decay forecasting, and conjunction screening. The bottleneck is not modeling capacity but labels: there is no public ground-truth corpus of orbital anomalies, manual review does not scale to approximately 10^4 active satellites, and pure rule-based detectors trade recall for precision so aggressively that they are blind to most behavioral anomalies. We present a multi-tier labeling cascade that composes three weak supervision sources of increasing fidelity: a fast physics rule set (rule_v1), an Interacting Multiple Model Unscented Kalman Filter (IMM-UKF) bank, and a supplemental-element calibration step (supGP), to produce labels at a scale unavailable from any single source. Applied to 232M Two-Line Element (TLE) records spanning 60 years, the cascade yields 8.6M labeled sequences of length 50 (430M timesteps) over 11 features that include explicit time encoding and full mean-element state. On overlapping satellites, IMM-UKF surfaces 42.6x more anomalies than rule_v1 alone. We train a 6.5M-parameter Transformer in two stages, achieving a maneuver recall of 55.4% and decay recall of 62.8% on a held-out test set. An ablation on the time-delta feature alone yields a 107% relative improvement in decay recall. We frame the resulting model as a high-recall triage classifier whose role is to surface candidate events for downstream filtering, not to issue final attributions, and discuss the path toward a Neural-ODE-based orbital world model.

</details>


### [24] [Population Protocols over Ordered Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09937)
*Michael Blondin,Michaël Cadilhac,Benjamin Courchesne,Lucie Guillou,Corto Mascle,Isa Vialard*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文研究了带有序标识符的群体协议（PP[<]）及其变体，证明IO-PP[<]可识别无歧义星自由语言，并探讨了共识稳定性判定问题的可判定性边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际中的群体协议允许每个代理携带唯一标识符并在交互前进行比较，但现有理论模型缺乏对这种能力的系统刻画。本文旨在建立带序标识符群体协议的计算能力理论。

Method: 定义了基于有序代理的群体协议形式化模型PP[N]及其即时观测片段IO-PP[N]，通过逻辑、自动机理论等工具刻画其表达能力，并利用归约方法研究判定问题。

Result: (1) IO-PP[<]精确识别无歧义星自由语言；(2) 当N包含后继谓词且可NSPACE(n)计算时，IO-PP[N]=PP[N]=NSPACE(n)；(3) 共识稳定性判定：对无序协议可判定，对PP[<]和IO-PP[+1]不可判定，对IO-PP[<]条件可判定。

Conclusion: 带有序标识符的群体协议具有丰富的表达能力，其计算能力与逻辑和自动机理论中的经典类紧密关联；但实际中增加交互条件也会导致关键判定问题的不可判定性。

Abstract: Population protocols are a distributed computation model in which a collection of anonymous, finite-state agents interact in randomly chosen pairs and update their states according to a fixed transition function. The computation is defined by the eventual stabilization of the population to a consensus that represents the output. In practice, it is natural to allow each agent to carry a unique identifier and compare it with that of another agent before interacting. We model this extension by having agents be totally ordered and interactions between two agents to be fireable only if their pair of identifiers falls in some condition set. For instance, $\mathsf{PP}[<]$ allows for two agents to interact only if the first one appears before the second one.
  We study population protocols over ordered agents $\mathsf{PP}[N]$ where $N$ is a set of predicates available to restrict transition firing. We also study $\textsf{IO-PP}[N]$, the immediate observation fragment of $\mathsf{PP}[N]$ where only one agent changes state per interaction. Our main result is that $\textsf{IO-PP}[<]$ recognizes exactly the unambiguous star-free languages, which admits many other characterizations, such as two-variable first-order logic or two-way deterministic partially-ordered automata. We also provide a logic and an automaton model that fits in $\mathsf{PP}[<]$. We further show that if the successor predicate appears in a set $N$ of $\mathsf{NSPACE}(n)$-computable predicates, then $\textsf{IO-PP}[N]=\mathsf{PP}[N]=\mathsf{NSPACE}(n)$. Finally, we investigate the problem of deciding whether a given population protocol always stabilizes to a consensus. While this problem is decidable for unordered population protocols, we show that this is undecidable already for $\mathsf{PP}[<]$ and $\textsf{IO-PP}[+1]$, but conditionally decidable for $\textsf{IO-PP}[<]$.

</details>


### [25] [Lakestream: A Consistent and Brokerless Data Plane for Large Foundation Model Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09994)
*Ting Sun,Junjie Zhang,Xiao Yan,Songxin Zhang,Zhuoyang Song,Jingyi Xi,Zunyao Mao,Bingyi Jing,Jiaxing Zhang,Zejian Xie*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: Lakestream 是一个基于对象存储的免代理训练数据平面，通过事务性全局批次、存储层内联恢复机制和去中心化自适应提交算法，解决了大规模基础模型训练中数据管道的语义缺失和性能瓶颈问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大规模基础模型训练系统在数据管道方面存在不足：共置数据加载器缺乏故障隔离，而基于消息队列的解耦数据加载器仅支持记录/偏移量抽象，无法表达分布式训练所需的批次级语义。因此需要一种新的数据平面设计来支持训练流程的动态协同演化。

Method: Lakestream 提出了三个核心设计：1) 事务性全局批次（TGB），基于湖仓ACID存储语义扩展训练特定的一致性保证；2) 存储层内联恢复与保留机制，将生产者状态嵌入清单并关联回收与检查点状态；3) 去中心化自适应提交（DAC）算法，在清单增长时仍维持稳定的摄取吞吐量且无需生产者间通信。

Result: 在64 GPU的大规模多模态预训练和SFT工作负载上，Lakestream 在吞吐量上优于共置数据加载器且提供完全的故障隔离，在摄取吞吐量上优于Apache Kafka，并且消费者读取延迟低于Kafka。

Conclusion: Lakestream 通过将训练数据管道的语义与分布式训练需求对齐，同时利用对象存储原生特性实现高性能和故障隔离，为大模型训练数据基础设施提供了新的设计范式。

Abstract: Modern Large Foundation Model (LFM) training has transformed the data pipeline from a static ingestion layer into a dynamic component that must co-evolve with the training process. Existing systems are ill-equipped: colocated dataloaders offer no failure isolation, while message queue-based disaggregated dataloaders operate on a record/offset abstraction that cannot express the batch-level semantics required by distributed training.
  We present Lakestream, a brokerless, object-store-native training data plane with three key properties. First, it introduces the Transactional Global Batch (TGB), which builds on lakehouse-style ACID storage semantics and extends them with training-specific consistency, including atomic all-rank batch visibility, a globally ordered step sequence, checkpoint-aligned lifecycle management, and end-to-end exactly-once recovery. Second, it realizes recovery and retention directly in the storage layer, by inlining producer state in the manifest and tying reclamation to distributed checkpoint state. Third, its Decentralized Adaptive Commit (DAC) algorithm sustains stable ingestion throughput as the manifest grows, without any inter-producer communication.
  Evaluations on large-scale multimodal pre-training and SFT workloads using 64 GPUs show that Lakestream outperforms colocated dataloader throughput while providing full failure isolation, outperforms Apache Kafka in ingestion throughput, and achieves lower consumer read latency than Kafka.

</details>


### [26] [Edge-Cloud Collaborative Pothole Detection via Onboard Event Screening and Federated Temporal Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10055)
*Yingjie Wu,Kongyang Chen,Tiancai Liang*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于车载振动事件筛选与联邦时序分割的边缘-云协同坑洞检测框架，通过GMM自适应筛选异常事件和1D Attention U-Net进行时序分割，在降低通信开销的同时提升坑洞检测精度，并支持联邦学习以处理多车非独立同分布数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有车载振动检测方案存在两个主要问题：一是连续传输原始加速度数据导致高通信开销；二是坑洞引起的振动模式容易与窨井盖、减速带等道路结构混淆，检测精度不足。

Method: 提出边缘-云协同框架：车辆端使用高斯混合模型(GMM)自适应建模背景振动并筛选候选异常事件，仅上传紧凑的候选事件片段及其上下文信息；服务器端将坑洞检测建模为逐点时序分割任务，开发1D Attention U-Net通过多尺度时序特征捕获和事件边界信息保持来区分坑洞与相似振动事件；整体在联邦学习框架下训练以利用多车分布式数据。

Result: 在多车振动传感数据上的实验表明，该框架减少了平滑路段的无效数据传输，并在集中式和联邦式设置下均提升了细粒度坑洞检测性能。

Conclusion: 边缘-云协同机制有效平衡了通信效率与检测精度，联邦学习框架能够适应多车数据的非独立同分布特性，为大规模城市道路坑洞检测提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Road potholes threaten driving safety and increase infrastructure maintenance costs, while large-scale and timely pothole detection remains challenging in urban road networks. Vehicle-mounted vibration sensing offers a low-cost and scalable solution, however, continuous transmission of raw acceleration streams causes high communication overhead. Also, vibration patterns induced by potholes are often confused with those caused by manholes, speed bumps, and other local road structures. To address these challenges, this paper proposes an edge-cloud collaborative pothole detection framework based on onboard vibration event screening and federated temporal segmentation. At the vehicle side, a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM)-based module adaptively models background vibration and screens candidate abnormal events from continuous acceleration streams. The onboard module acts as a lightweight high-recall filter and uploads only compact candidate event segments with their contextual information. At the server side, pothole detection is formulated as a point-wise temporal segmentation task. A 1D Attention U-Net is developed to distinguish potholes from vibration-similar road events by capturing multi-scale temporal features and preserving event boundary information. Furthermore, the model is trained under a federated learning framework to exploit distributed multi-vehicle data while accommodating non-IID vehicle data distributions. Experiments on multi-vehicle vibration sensing data show that the proposed framework reduces unnecessary data transmission from smooth road segments and improves fine-grained pothole detection under both centralized and federated settings.

</details>


### [27] [Amortized Asynchronous Byzantine Reliable Broadcast with Optimal Resilience](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10372)
*Michael Yiqing Hu,Alvin Hong Yao Yan,Jialin Li*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于摊销技术的多轮异步拜占庭可靠广播（BRB）协议，在保持最优容错性（f=n/3）的同时实现了亚二次通信复杂度。通过多轮结构，每个后续BRB实例仅需额外一轮，在消息足够大时达到O(n|m|)的消息复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有异步BRB协议实现亚二次通信通常需要牺牲最优容错性（f=n/3），而同步网络中已有较多优化工作，异步环境下的高效BRB仍缺乏关注。

Method: 采用摊销技术，将BRB组织为多轮结构：初始轮次提供增量式加法保证，完成后每个后续BRB实例仅需额外一轮。同时设计了乐观路径，在有利条件下将轮复杂度降低到Ω(1)。

Result: 在消息足够大时实现渐近最优的O(n|m|)消息复杂度，最坏情况下轮复杂度为Ω(n)，乐观情况下轮复杂度降为Ω(1)。

Conclusion: 首次在保持最优f=n/3容错性的前提下，通过摊销技术实现了异步BRB的亚二次通信复杂度，为异步网络中高效可靠的广播协议提供了新思路。

Abstract: Byzantine Reliable Broadcast (BRB) is a fundamental primitive in distributed computing and cryptographic systems. Reducing the communication complexity of BRB protocols remains an important research direction. However, most work focuses on synchronous networks, with limited attention to the more challenging setting of network \textit{asynchrony}.
  Achieving sub-quadratic communication for asynchronous BRB typically requires probabilistic approaches that sacrifice optimal $f=\frac{n}{3}$ resilience. In this work, we present a multi-shot BRB algorithm for asynchronous networks that maintains optimal resilience through an underutilized technique: \textit{amortization}. Our protocol structures BRB across multiple rounds, where each round provides incremental additive guarantees. Once these initial rounds complete, each subsequent BRB instance requires only a single additional round.
  This amortization strategy achieves asymptotic optimal $O(n|m|)$ message complexity when messages are sufficiently large, with $Ω(n)$ round complexity in the worst case. Under favorable conditions, an optimistic delivery path reduces the round complexity to $Ω(1)$.

</details>


### [28] [FractalSortCPU: Bandwidth-Efficient Compressed Radix Sort on CPU](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10390)
*Michael Dang'ana*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本论文针对云数据库环境中基数排序算法存在的分布依赖性和并行度有限等问题，提出了一种基于CPU的直方图压缩方案，结合SIMD加速和全并行键值更新，实现了任意精度键的排序，并在带宽效率上比现有CPU、GPU和FPGA方案分别提升6倍、3倍和2.5倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基数排序算法在云环境大规模数据集下存在两大核心问题：一是分布依赖性，导致算法性能随数据分布波动；二是并行度有限，多pass分桶、随机采样等方法虽有一定缓解，但引入了预处理开销和更大的内存占用，不适合云环境的大规模工作负载。此外，原地基数排序随精度增加pass数增多，延迟上升。

Method: 提出一种CPU适配的直方图压缩方案，支持任意精度键的基数排序。核心创新包括：(1) 全并行键直方图更新，消除输入分桶和数据预处理；(2) SIMD加速操作的并行排序架构，降低延迟；(3) 直方图增长受控，避免传统方案的内存膨胀问题。

Result: 在512MB至32GB数据集、16位精度下，带宽效率相比现有CPU、GPU和FPGA方案分别提升6倍、3倍和2.5倍，达到最先进的执行时间。

Conclusion: 所提出的CPU适配直方图压缩基数排序算法有效解决了分布依赖性和并行度问题，在云环境大规模数据集上展现出显著性能优势，且具有更好的可访问性和可扩展性。

Abstract: Cloud database systems, particularly their middleware and query execution layers, use sorting as a core operation in query processing, indexing and join execution. Distribution-dependence and limited parallelism are key issues inherent in state-of-the-art radix sort which is preferred for large datasets due to performance advantages over comparison-based algorithms. Multi-pass bucketing, stochastic sampling and dependence graph structures are common solutions to these problems that incur the cost of data pre-processing and increased memory footprint hence they are less appropriate for large-scale workloads common in cloud environments. In-place radix sort schemes increase the number of passes as precision increases, which negatively impacts latency.
  Our work solves these problems by introducing a CPU-adapted histogram compression scheme for radix sorting for arbitrary-precision keys implemented on the CPU for increased accessibility, providing state-of-the-art execution time, while limiting histogram growth. Fully parallel key-based histogram updates eliminate the need for input bucketing and data pre-processing further lowering latency, mitigating distribution-dependence and reducing complexity. With a parallelized sorting architecture utilizing SIMD-accelerated operations for low latency, the algorithm demonstrates improvement over the state-of-the-art on the CPU, GPU, and FPGA by 6x, 3x and 2.5x in bandwidth efficiency on 512MB to 32GB data sets at 16-bit precision.

</details>


### [29] [HiRL: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for Coordinated Resource Management in Heterogeneous Edge Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10443)
*Jianyong Zhu,Hao Chen,Juan Zhang,Fangda Guo,Albert Y. Zomaya,Renyu Yang*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: HiRL是一个分层强化学习框架，通过TD3进行连续功率控制、DDQN进行离散任务分配，并采用五维队列状态表示和失效惩罚自适应采样，在异构边缘计算环境中实现延迟降低28%、任务完成率接近100%、能耗降低最高51%的资源编排效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘计算面临设备架构、任务类型（CPU/GPU/I/O密集型）和网络条件等多维异构性带来的资源编排挑战，传统方法难以在满足截止时间和能耗约束的同时处理混合连续-离散优化问题。

Method: 提出HiRL分层强化学习框架：上层用TD3进行连续功率管理，下层用DDQN进行离散任务放置，两者通过五维队列状态表示的统一协调引擎联动，并引入资源兼容性异构评估、截止时间导向优先级排序和失效惩罚自适应采样机制。

Result: 相比Single-DDQN延迟降低28%；所有负载条件下任务完成率接近100%；低负载下能耗降低最高51%；高负载下延迟比静态优化方法改善24%。

Conclusion: HiRL通过分层解耦连续-离散决策，在异构边缘环境中实现了延迟、能耗和任务完成率之间的有效均衡，为资源编排提供了一种实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Edge computing faces unprecedented resource orchestration challenges from multi-dimensional heterogeneity across device architectures, diverse task requirements in CPU-intensive, GPU-intensive, I/O-intensive, and dynamic network conditions. The edge environments demand real-time task processing within strict energy budgets, yet conventional approaches struggle with mixed continuous-discrete optimization while meeting deadline and energy constraints. This paper presents HiRL, a hierarchical reinforcement learning framework that decomposes complex resource orchestration into coordinated power control and task allocation decisions. Our approach separates continuous power management using the Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (TD3) and discrete task placement using Double Deep Q-Network (DDQN), unified through a coordination engine with five-dimensional queue state representation. We propose a heterogeneous assessment of resource compatibility with deadline-oriented prioritization and failure-penalized adaptive sampling to enhance decision quality under resource constraints. To improve practical applicability, the framework models comprehensive system dynamics including device mobility, queue congestion patterns, infrastructure heterogeneity, and priority-sensitive scheduling demands. Experimental results show that HiRL achieves effective latency-energy trade-offs with 28% latency reduction compared to Single-DDQN and maintains nearly 100% task completion rates under all load conditions. Compared to baseline algorithms, HiRL reduces energy consumption by up to 51% under low load while achieving 24% better latency performance than static optimization approaches under high load, establishing effective resource orchestration in heterogeneous edge environments.

</details>


### [30] [Privacy-preserving Chunk Scheduling in a BitTorrent Implementation of Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10499)
*Naicheng Li,Javad Dogani,Rui Wang,Kaitai Liang,Nikolaos Laoutaris*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: FLTorrent 提出了一种基于 BitTorrent 的去中心化联邦学习分发层，通过预热阶段（预轮次混淆、随机延迟、非拥有者优先调度）实现轮内源不可链接性，同时保持 FedAvg 聚合语义和高效分发。实验表明，在 100-500 节点下，该方案可实现约 92% 的带宽最优上限，属性推断成功率接近随机猜测，且在大模型（最高 70B）上仅增加 6-10% 的端到端开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统联邦学习依赖中心聚合服务器，存在性能瓶颈和隐私风险；去中心化设计虽移除服务器，但局部混合会衰减全局信息，且 P2P 邻居关系暴露了隐私攻击面。现有方法难以同时保证 FedAvg 聚合语义、扩展性和轮内源不可链接性。

Method: FLTorrent 采用 BitTorrent 分发协议，通过三个技术实现预热阶段的源不可链接性：(i) 预轮次混淆，(ii) 随机延迟，(iii) 协调器仅协调、不参与数据路径的非拥有者优先调度。预热后切换为标准 BT  swarm 模式。理论上界定了每传输的属性推断后验概率，并推导了依赖于早期非拥有者块数量的高概率紧界。采用 GreedyFastestFirst 启发式算法优化带宽利用。

Result: GreedyFastestFirst 达到约 92% 的带宽最优最大流上界；预热时间稳定在轮次时长的约 12%（100-500 节点）。在仅观察本地流量的对手模型下，属性推断成功率接近邻域随机猜测水平，随网络规模增大而改善，且在合谋攻击下保持鲁棒。在大模型（Gemma-7B 至 Llama-3.3-70B，7-10 Gbps 链路）上，仅增加约 6-10% 的端到端开销。

Conclusion: FLTorrent 证明了轮内不可链接性与 BitTorrent 级别的高效分发可以共存，且在大规模场景下开销可预测、低增长，为去中心化联邦学习提供了实用的隐私保护分发层。

Abstract: Traditional federated learning (FL) relies on a central aggregator server, which can create performance bottlenecks and privacy risks. Decentralized mix-and-forward designs remove the server, but repeated local mixing can attenuate global information under heterogeneity and exposes peer-to-peer neighborhoods as a privacy attack surface. To preserve FedAvg-style aggregation semantics (over updates reconstructable by the round deadline) while scaling dissemination, we present FLTorrent, a BitTorrent-based dissemination layer for serverless FL with a short warm-up. Warm-up hardens within-round source unlinkability -- a dissemination-layer goal orthogonal to content protections (e.g., DP or secure aggregation) -- via (i) pre-round obfuscation, (ii) randomized lags, and (iii) coordination-only non-owner-first scheduling (tracker off the data path), before switching to vanilla BitTorrent swarming. We upper-bound the per-transfer attribution posterior by the fraction of owner chunks in a sender's eligible cover set, and derive a tighter high-probability bound that improves with early non-owner mass. A simple heuristic, GreedyFastestFirst, attains approximately 92% of a bandwidth-optimal max-flow upper bound, while warm-up remains a stable approximately 12% share of a round across 100--500 peers. Under an observation-only local adversary, FLTorrent drives attribution success close to neighborhood-level random guessing for typical nodes, improves with network size, and remains robust under collusion. In LLM-scale stress tests (Gemma-7B, DeepSeek-R1-14B, Qwen2.5-32B, and Llama-3.3-70B) over 7--10 Gbps access links, FLTorrent adds only approximately 6--10% end-to-end overhead relative to BitTorrent-only. Overall, FLTorrent shows that within-round unlinkability and BitTorrent-level efficiency can co-exist with predictable, low overheads at scale.

</details>


### [31] [Accelerating Compound LLM Training Workloads with Maestro](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10501)
*Xiulong Yuan,Hongqing Chen,Jiaxuan Peng,Fan Zhou,Zhixiang Ruan,Zekun Wang,Bo Zheng,Rui Men,Haiquan Wang,Zhipeng Zhang,Langshi Chen,Man Yuan,Jiaqi Gao,Zhengping Qian,Junyang Lin,Yong Li,Wei Lin,Junhua Wang,Jingren Zhou*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: Maestro是一个面向复合LLM训练工作负载（如知识蒸馏和多模态LLM训练）的section-centric训练框架，通过细粒度section图重构和wavefront调度算法，分别解决静态异构性（组件间差异）和动态异构性（运行时不规则性），在生产环境中部署数百万GPU小时后，将GPU消耗降低约40%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有框架针对单一同质模型设计，无法处理复合LLM训练中的双重异构性：静态异构性（组件间参数规模、执行模式、序列长度不同）和动态异构性（运行时数据依赖导致的计算路径动态变化），导致吞吐量次优和GPU利用率低下。

Method: 1) 将工作负载重构为粗粒度的section图，每个section独立配置并行策略、微批大小和数据并行度，实现细粒度组件感知的资源分配；2) 提出wavefront调度算法，动态重排序输入样本以协调并发section执行，同时保持跨section数据依赖关系，最大化并行度并减少停顿。

Result: 在生产环境中部署数百万GPU小时，在知识蒸馏和多模态LLM训练等关键工作负载上，GPU消耗降低约40%。

Conclusion: Maestro通过section-centric设计和wavefront调度有效解决了复合LLM训练中的双重异构性挑战，显著提升了资源利用率和系统吞吐量，并经过大规模生产环境验证了其实用价值。

Abstract: Compound LLM training workloads-such as knowledge distillation and multimodal LLM (MLLM) training-are gaining prominence. These typically comprise heterogeneous components differing in parameter scale, execution mode (forward-only or full forward-backward), and sequence length. Besides, component activation can be data-dependent: in MLLM training, modality-specific parts activate only when inputs contain corresponding modalities, causing dynamic computational paths and irregular runtime workloads. Conventional frameworks, designed for monolithic models, cannot handle the dual heterogeneity-static (across components) and dynamic (runtime). By enforcing one-size-fits-all training configurations across components and ignoring input-induced variations, they suffer suboptimal throughput and poor GPU utilization. In this paper, we introduce Maestro, a section-centric training framework that addresses both challenges. Maestro first restructures the workload into a coarse-grained section graph. Each section independently configures its parallelism strategy, micro-batch size, and data-parallel degree-enabling fine-grained, component-aware resource allocation to tackle static heterogeneity. To tackle runtime irregularity, Maestro introduces a wavefront scheduling algorithm that dynamically reorders input samples to orchestrate concurrent section execution while preserving cross-section data dependencies. This maximizes inter-section parallelism and minimizes stalls, boosting hardware utilization. Deployed in production for millions of GPU hours, Maestro reduces GPU consumption by ~40% on key workloads-including knowledge distillation and MLLM training-validating its real-world impact.

</details>


### [32] [Surviving Partial Rank Failures in Wide Expert-Parallel MoE Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10670)
*Xun Sun,Shaoyuan Chen,Pingchuan Ma,Yue Chen,Ziwei Yuan,Zhanhao Cao,Han Han,Shangming Cai,Teng Ma,Xuchun Shang,Xinpeng Zhao,Ke Yang,Junlin Wei,Lianzhi Lin,Yuji Liu,Feng Ren,Haoran Hu,Cheng Wan,Yingdi Shan,Yongwei Wu,Mingxing Zhang*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: EEP提出将混合专家（MoE）推理中的专家并行（EP）成员关系视为可变运行时状态，从而在不重启整个实例的情况下处理部分故障，实现故障恢复与秩重新整合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MoE服务依赖固定成员关系的专家并行，一旦某个GPU秩故障，整个服务中断，且无法动态收缩或恢复。

Method: 将EP成员关系建模为显式、可变的运行时状态；故障时修复通信可达性（不重建通信子层）、通过带宽感知层次修复专家覆盖、重新整合修复的秩（不强制健康秩重捕CUDA图）。

Result: 稳态性能保持在DeepEP基线的4.4%以内；单秩故障时恢复暂停11秒、重新整合暂停8秒，52秒内吞吐量恢复到故障前的95%，而基线需要348秒才能恢复。

Conclusion: 显式可变成员关系在保持稳态高效的同时，将局部秩故障从整个实例停机转变为两次有限中断，大幅提升MoE服务的可用性。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) serving relies on wide expert parallelism (EP) to aggregate the memory capacity and bandwidth of many GPUs within one inference instance. This efficiency comes with a systems cost: every decoding step depends on token dispatch and combination across all active EP ranks, so even one rank failure can disrupt the entire service. Existing EP stacks handle such failures poorly because they treat membership as a fixed configuration established at initialization. The same rank set determines communicator state, expert placement, and the routing metadata baked into CUDA execution graphs, leaving the system with no way to shrink around a failure while keeping the instance valid.
  This paper argues that partial-failure tolerance should instead be formulated as a live EP validity problem. We present EEP, a communication and runtime substrate that represents membership as explicit, mutable runtime state. EEP repairs the specific state invalidated by a fault: it restores peer reachability without rebuilding the communication substrate, repairs lost expert coverage through a bandwidth-aware hierarchy, and reintegrates repaired ranks without forcing healthy ranks to recapture their CUDA graphs.
  We implement EEP in an EP serving stack integrated with SGLang and evaluate it under steady-state serving, failure recovery, and rank reintegration. The results show that explicit mutable membership preserves the steady-state fast path, staying within 4.4% of a fixed-membership DeepEP baseline under static serving, while turning a local rank fault from whole-instance downtime into two bounded interruptions. On a single-rank failure workload, EEP incurs an 11s recovery pause and an 8s reintegration pause, and restores throughput to within 95% of the pre-fault level within 52s, whereas a fixed-membership full-restart baseline remains unavailable until 348s.

</details>


### [33] [Closer in the Gap: Towards Portable Performance on RISC-V Vector Processors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10860)
*Ruimin Shi,Maya Gokhale,Pei-Hung Lin,Xavier Teruel,Ivy Peng*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 本文通过汇编微基准测试和代理应用评估了RVV 1.0硬件的性能上限与编译器自动向量化能力，发现GCC 15在多数HPC/ML应用中优于LLVM 21，但LLVM在矩阵乘中通过激进的指令削减更优；同时揭示了谓词开销、跨步加载等编译器成本模型的不足，并在Qsim量子模拟器评估中指出当前RVV编译器在处理复杂内存访问模式时仍不成熟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RVV是科学计算和机器学习负载的关键支撑，但编译器支持和性能监控在真实RVV 1.0硬件上仍在演进，当前缺乏对RVV硬件性能上限和编译器自动向量化能力的系统评估。

Method: 设计一套汇编微基准测试来建立性能上限并校准性能计数器；在HPC和ML代理应用中对GCC 15和LLVM 21的自动向量化进行对比评估；并基于Qsim量子模拟器评估手动RVV内建函数与编译器自动向量化的差异。

Result: GCC 15在6个应用中的4个优于LLVM 21；LLVM 21仅在SGEMM和DGEMM上通过更激进的指令削减胜出；默认LMUL选择接近最优；谓词开销和跨步加载是编译器尚未很好解决的性能挑战。

Conclusion: 当前RVV编译器在处理复杂内存访问模式时仍不成熟，需要改进成本模型以更好地处理谓词开销和跨步加载等挑战。

Abstract: The RISC-V Vector Extension~(RVV) is a cornerstone for supporting compute throughout in scientific and machine learning workloads. Yet compiler support and performance monitoring on real RVV~1.0 hardware are still evolving. In this work, we design a suite of assembly microbenchmarks to establish performance ceilings and calibrate performance counters on RVV hardware. Leveraging the assembly benchmarks, we find that predication overhead and stride load pose performance challenges that current compiler cost models do not yet fully address. Moreover, we present the first evaluation of GCC~15 and LLVM~21 autovectorization in HPC and ML proxy applications. GCC~15 outperforms LLVM~21 in four out of six applications. LLVM~21 only outperforms GCC~15 in SGEMM and DGEMM, driven by more aggressive instruction reduction confirmed through validated \texttt{perf} counters on the RVV hardware. We further show that the default LMUL selection in compilers performs close to the optimal. To study the RVV support for product-level application, we also evaluate the state-vector quantum simulator, Google's Qsim, with both manual RVV intrinsics and compiler auto-vectorization, revealing immaturity in current RVV compiler for complicated memory access pattern.

</details>


<div id='cs.ET'></div>

# cs.ET [[Back]](#toc)

### [34] [Bayesian Optimization of Crossbar-Based Compute-In-Memory System Design for Efficient DNN Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08461)
*Arnob Saha,Bibhas Manna,Nikhil Kotikalapudi,Md Zesun Ahmed Mia,Rahul Kumar,Madhavan Swaminathan,Abhronil Sengupta*

Main category: cs.ET

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多目标贝叶斯优化框架，用于协同优化CIM交叉架构DNN加速器的硬件和算法参数，在VGG8/CIFAR-10和VGG16/Tiny-ImageNet-200任务上，实现了与基线相当的精度，同时显著提升了芯片面积、读取延迟、动态能耗和内存利用率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CIM交叉架构DNN加速器的设计空间探索高度复杂，模型规模增大导致非凸设计空间急剧扩展，且异构层工作负载使逐层参数分配效率更高但复杂度剧增，现有方法难以高效处理高维、超大规模的多目标优化问题。

Method: 提出多目标贝叶斯优化框架，协同优化硬件与算法参数。采用BO方法有选择性地查询昂贵的CIM仿真器，有效处理26维和50维的高维设计空间，应对$O(10^{12})$和$O(10^{27})$的超大搜索复杂度。

Result: 在VGG8/CIFAR-10上达到91.72%精度，芯片面积减少65.52%、读取延迟降低9.52%、动态能耗减少31.23%、内存利用率提升13.41%；在VGG16/Tiny-ImageNet-200上达到57.2%精度，面积减少50.7%、延迟降低13.27%、能耗减少52.07%、内存利用率提升2.67%。

Conclusion: 多目标BO框架能有效解决CIM加速器中高维、大规模设计空间的优化问题，在保持精度的前提下显著提升能效和资源利用率，为复杂AI工作负载的硬件设计提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: Leveraging the high density and energy efficiency of Compute-In-Memory (CIM) crossbar-based Deep Neural Network (DNN) accelerators requires optimal Design Space Exploration (DSE), which becomes increasingly challenging as complex models for advanced AI workloads expand the highly non-convex design space. Moreover, heterogeneous layer workloads (e.g., memory- vs. compute-bound) and learning representations make layer-wise NN parameter allocation beneficial for efficiency but severely exacerbate the design space complexity by expanding the number of parameters to be tuned for simultaneous multi-objective optimization. Among existing DSE approaches, multi-objective Bayesian Optimization (BO) is promising, as it explores high-quality design solutions while querying costly CIM simulators selectively. In this work, we propose a multi-objective BO framework that holistically co-optimizes hardware and algorithm parameters of a CIM crossbar-based hardware accelerator for various DNN inference tasks. Depending on NN model depth, our framework handles high-dimensional design spaces (with $26$ and $50$ dimensions) and extremely large search complexities on the order of $O(10^{12})$ and $O(10^{27})$ for VGG8/CIFAR-10 and VGG16/Tiny-ImageNet-200. Our method attains $91.72 \%$ and $57.2 \%$ accuracy, respectively, comparable to baseline designs, while improving chip area ($65.52 \%$ and $50.7 \%$), read latency ($9.52 \%$ and $13.27 \%$), read dynamic energy ($31.23 \%$ and $52.07 \%$) and increasing memory utilization ($13.41 \%$ and $2.67 \%$).

</details>


<div id='cs.AR'></div>

# cs.AR [[Back]](#toc)

### [35] [REPTILES: Repeated Tiles of Sargantana, a RISC-V multicore based on OpenPiton](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08229)
*Noelia Oliete-Escuín,Arnau Bigas,Narcís Rodas,Albert Aguilera,Sajjad Ahmad,Jonathan Balkind,Xavier Carril,Max Doblas,Ivan Díaz,Roger Figueras,Alireza Foroodnia,Cesar Fuguet,Ignacio Genovese,Raúl Gilabert,Abbas Haghi,Alexander Kropotov,Neiel Leyva,Oscar Lostes-Cazorla,Lorién López-Villellas,Davy Million,Alireza Monemi,Sérik Pérez,Juan Antonio Rodríguez,Víctor Soria-Pardos,Behzad Salami,Francesc Moll,Oscar Palomar,Miquel Moretó,Lluc Alvarez*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: REPTILES是一个基于RISC-V的开源多核框架，结合了Sargantana核心和OpenPiton内存层次结构，在4核配置下实现平均3.1倍加速，向量加法基准测试性能提升9.3倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 芯片行业持续推进复杂多核处理器发展，但学术项目因资源有限面临可扩展性挑战，亟需开源框架来促进创新和知识共享。现有开源方案性能无法满足现代HPC应用需求。

Method: 基于OpenPiton框架，互联多个Sargantana核心与OpenPiton的内存层次结构，并针对HPC应用在Sargantana和OpenPiton设计中加入新特性以提升性能。

Result: 4核配置下平均加速比达3.1倍；Sargantana新特性使向量加法基准测试性能提升9.3倍，展示了良好的可扩展性。

Conclusion: REPTILES框架成功实现了开源RISC-V多核处理器的可扩展设计，能够满足HPC应用性能需求，为学术界提供了有效的创新平台。

Abstract: Chip industry continues advancing and expanding modern computing systems, resulting in more complex multi-core processors. Conversely, academic projects face scalability challenges due to limited resources, highlighting the need for open-source frameworks that enable innovation and knowledge sharing. Recently, several open-source proposals have emerged, offering flexible and scalable designs, but fail to meet the performance demands of modern High-Performance Computing (HPC) applications. In this project, we present REPTILES, an open-source RISC-V multicore framework based on OpenPiton\thanks. REPTILES interconnects multiple Sargantana cores with the memory hierarchy of OpenPiton. Moreover, we present the new features incorporated in Sargantana and OpenPiton designs to improve the performance of HPC applications. We demonstrate that REPTILES presents suitable scalability, achieving a speedup of 3.1x on average with 4 cores. Additionally, we show that Sargantana's new features increase the performance of vector addition benchmark in a 9.3x.

</details>


### [36] [FLARE: One-Shot PE-Level Fault Localization in Systolic Arrays via Algebraic Test Vectors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08594)
*Logashree Venkatasubramanian,Zishen Wan,Viveck Cadambe*

Main category: cs.AR
