TL;DR: 本文提出基于互质测试向量的轻量级算法，用于在脉动阵列中定位故障行（PE级），无需硬件冗余。通过单次测试即可高概率定位INT16算术下256×256阵列中的行级故障，测试开销低于一次推理GEMM块的1%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作虽能有效检测列级故障，但行级（PE级）故障定位仍需硬件冗余。核心障碍在于统一测试输入会破坏每行特征签名——任何均匀激活所有行的测试无法区分偏差来源行。

Method: 提出基于互质测试向量的轻量级算法：将两两互质的整数分配为测试输入条目，永久权重寄存器故障产生的偏差具有可唯一标识故障行的整除性签名。采用有界误差模型，单次测试可高概率定位故障行；一轮不足时，第二次通过比率计算实现精确定位；对于单比特错误，奇数互质条目可保证一轮内精确定位。

Result: 对于INT16算术，单次测试覆盖256×256阵列，定位概率高于0.98，测试成本低于一次推理GEMM块的1%。

Conclusion: 提出的互质测试向量方法以纯算法方式解决了行级故障定位难题，覆盖比先前数据流感知测试工作更广泛的故障类别，且开销极低，适合实际部署。

Abstract: Systolic arrays are the dominant compute fabric for neural network inference. Prior work has addressed column-level fault detection efficiently with uniform test patterns, but row-level (PE-level) fault localization within a faulty column remains open without resorting to hardware redundancy. The fundamental obstacle is that uniform test inputs destroy per-row signatures: any test that activates every row equally cannot distinguish which row is the source of an observed deviation.
  In this paper, we propose a lightweight, purely algorithmic remedy based on coprime test vectors. By assigning pairwise coprime integers as test-input entries, a permanent weight-register fault produces a deviation whose divisibility signature uniquely identifies the faulty row. Under a general bounded error model, a single test pass localizes the faulty row with high probability. This error model covers a broader class of faults than what prior dataflow-aware testing work has primarily emphasized. When one round is insufficient, a second pass using a ratio computation achieves exact localization; for the special case of single-bit errors, odd coprime entries guarantee exact localization in one round.
  For INT16 arithmetic, a single test pass covers array sizes up to $256{\times}256$ with localization probability above $0.98$, at a test cost under $1\%$ of one inference GEMM tile.

</details>


### [37] [Single 32-bit Sub-Channel DDR5 DIMMs: Architecture, Performance Bounds, and Standardisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08725)
*Chih-Hua Ke*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文研究了DDR5 SDRAM将64位内存通道拆分为两个32位子通道的设计，分析了单子通道配置（仅使用一个32位子通道）的性能影响、生态兼容性及标准化现状。研究表明，这种配置虽能降低模块成本（如用16Gbit颗粒实现8GB模块），但会导致带宽受限工作负载吞吐量下降40-60%，并存在与AMD AM5平台的架构不兼容问题。同时指出JEDEC SPD规范已原生支持该配置，但整个生态系统存在标准化缺口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DDR5 SDRAM将每个64位内存通道划分为两个独立的32位子通道，这种设计允许DIMM仅填充一个子通道，从而在给定模块上减少所需die数量。例如，使用当前16Gbit颗粒即可实现标准拓扑无法达成的8GB模块。该配置自2021年起被超频社区用于在三代Intel平台上创下DDR5频率世界纪录，并在DRAM供应紧张背景下被视为低成本量产模块的候选方案。研究者旨在量化其性能影响、分析平台兼容性并识别生态标准化缺口。

Method: 推导出事务宽度恒等式：32位 x BL16（突发长度16）恰好传输一条x86缓存线（64字节）。运用屋顶线模型（Roofline Model）量化不同工作负载类别的性能影响。进行AMD AM5平台兼容性分析，检查统一64位UMC训练模型带来的架构不兼容问题。审查JEDEC SPD规范（JESD400-5D.01）第235字节的编码支持情况。

Result: 带宽受限工作负载吞吐量下降40-60%，延迟主导型工作负载下降<10%。DDR5-4800单子通道配置出现带宽倒挂现象，性能低于DDR4-3200。AMD AM5平台因统一64位UMC训练模型而存在架构不兼容问题。JEDEC SPD规范已在Byte 235原生编码支持单子通道模块，但缺乏完整的生态系统标准化支持。

Conclusion: 单子通道DDR5配置在特定成本敏感场景具有应用价值，但存在显著的性能折衷（尤其带宽密集型任务）和平台兼容性限制。虽然JEDEC规范已提供底层编码支持，但整个生态系统（包括主板、CPU内存控制器、SPD编程等）的标准化仍存在缺口，需要行业协同推进以形成完整生态支持。

Abstract: DDR5 SDRAM partitions each 64-bit memory channel into two independent 32-bit sub-channels. A DIMM populating only one sub-channel halves the die count required for a given module, enabling 8 GB modules with current 16 Gbit dies that the standard topology cannot achieve. The configuration has been used by the enthusiast overclocking community since 2021 to set DDR5 frequency world records on three successive Intel platform generations, and has recently received attention as a candidate for cost-reduced volume modules under the contemporaneous DRAM supply constraints. We derive the transaction-width identity grounding the JEDEC sub-channel design: 32-bit x BL16 transfers exactly one 64-byte x86 cache line per burst. Using a roofline model we quantify performance impact across workload classes (40-60% throughput degradation in bandwidth-bound workloads, < 10% in latency-dominated workloads), and identify a bandwidth inversion at DDR5-4800 below DDR4-3200. Platform analysis shows architectural incompatibility with AMD AM5 as a consequence of the unified 64-bit UMC training model. We further show that the JEDEC SPD specification (JESD400-5D.01) already encodes single sub-channel modules natively in Byte 235, and identify the surrounding ecosystem standardisation gap.

</details>


### [38] [DSPE: An Energy-Efficient Edge Processor for DeepSeek Inference with MerkleTree-based Incremental Pruning, Multi-Stage Boothing Lookup and Dynamic Adaptive Posit Processing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08615)
*Yuhan Zhang,Zhou Wang,Zhou Shu,Jiuren Zhou,Yanqing Xu,Xiaonan Tang,Shushan Qiao,Tianchun Ye,Yang Liu,Anil A. Bharath,Emm Mic Drakakis*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文提出了DSPE，一种面向边缘设备的DeepSeek推理架构，通过MIPS、MBLM和DAPPM三种技术，在TSMC 28nm工艺下实现了109.4 TFLOPS/W的能效比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DeepSeek模型推理性能强但计算和能耗需求高，难以部署在能量受限的边缘设备上，因此需要设计一种高效的边缘端架构。

Method: 1) MIPS: 基于Merkle树的增量剪枝方案，用于安全的冗余向量缩减；2) MBLM: 多级布尔查找方法，实现位翻转感知的近似乘法；3) DAPPM: 动态自适应Posit处理机制，提出DA-Posit格式及其硬件乘法架构。

Result: 在TSMC 28nm CMOS下实现109.4 TFLOPS/W的能效比，优于现有最先进设计。

Conclusion: DSPE为DeepSeek模型在边缘设备上的高效部署提供了可扩展的架构基础。

Abstract: In recent years, DeepSeek has achieved strong inference performance but remains hard to deploy on energy-constrained edge devices. This paper presents the DeepSeek Processing Element (DSPE), an edge-oriented architecture that alleviates the model's heavy computational and energy demands. DSPE introduces three techniques: the MerkleTree-based Incremental Pruning Scheme (MIPS) for secure redundant-vector reduction, the Multi-Stage Boothing Lookup Method (MBLM) for bit-flip-aware approximate multiplication, and the Dynamic Adaptive Posit Processing Mechanism (DAPPM), which introduces a new DA-Posit format and its corresponding hardware multiplication architecture. Implemented in TSMC 28nm CMOS, DSPE achieves 109.4 TFLOPS/W energy efficiency compared with state-of-the-art designs and offers a scalable foundation for edge deployment.

</details>


### [39] [A Reconfigurable Multiplier Architecture for Error-Resilient Applications in RISC-V Core](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08785)
*Pragun Jaswal,L. Hemanth Krishna,B. Srinivasu*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文提出一种运行时可重构乘法器架构，集成在RISC-V核心中，支持精确与近似计算的多级精度控制，在边缘AI推理中实现44%-68%的功耗降低和最高63%的能耗节省。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络在能效受限的嵌入式设备上部署时面临能源瓶颈，现有处理器缺乏运行时灵活调控精度与能耗的机制，亟需一种可在标准处理器流水线内实现细粒度能效控制的乘法器架构。

Method: 设计一种运行时可重构乘法器，通过专用控制寄存器（mulscr）支持精确与近似计算模式下的多级精度配置，集成到RISC-V处理器流水线中，实现精度与能耗的细粒度权衡控制。

Result: 精确模式功耗降低44%-52%，近似模式降低62%-68%；计算性能达1.89 DMIPS/MHz；2D卷积和矩阵乘法任务中能耗最高降低63%，矩阵乘法能耗为1.21 pJ/指令。

Conclusion: 该可重构乘法器有效解决了边缘AI设备能效约束问题，通过运行时精度调节实现了显著的功耗与能耗优化，适合部署在能量受限的边缘AI场景中。

Abstract: Neural Networks (NNs) have been widely adopted due to their outstanding efficacy and adaptability across computer vision and deep learning applications. The optimization of NNs is necessary to enable their deployment on energy constrained embedded devices, where the limited available energy poses a significant challenge for efficient inference. This paper presents a runtime reconfigurable multiplier architecture integrated into the RISC-V core, targeting energy efficient neural network inference and edge AI applications. The proposed multiplier supports adaptability for exact and approximate computation with multiple configurable accuracy levels via a dedicated mulscr, enabling fine-grained energy accuracy control within a standard processor pipeline. The proposed design achieves 44%-52% and 62%-68% power reduction in exact and approximate modes respectively, while maintaining the computational performance of 1.89 DMIPS/MHz. Evaluations on error-tolerant workloads including 2d convolution and matrix multiplication demonstrate up to 63% reduction in energy consumption, with the proposed design achieving 1.21 pJ/instruction for matrix multiplication, confirming its effectiveness for energy-constrained edge AI deployments.

</details>


### [40] [HyDRA: Deadline and Reuse-Aware Cacheability for Hardware Accelerators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08908)
*Ayushi Agarwal,Anannya Mathur,Preeti Ranjan Panda*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文提出基于聚类的LERN方法预测加速器重用行为，并设计HyDRA策略，通过感知截止时间和重用性来管理异构SoC中的共享缓存，以提升系统吞吐量并降低加速器截止时间错过率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 异构SoC中，加速器对共享缓存的访问模式与处理器核差异大，现有缓存管理技术主要针对处理器核（如重用感知旁路），未充分考虑加速器的架构差异（如深层缓存层次）及严格QoS要求（截止时间），导致加速器性能受限、核性能下降。

Method: 1) LERN：基于聚类的学习方法，预测加速器在共享缓存层的重用行为；2) HyDRA：结合截止时间和重用感知的缓存管理策略，利用LERN动态预测加速器访问的重用性，做出旁路决策，在最大化系统吞吐量的同时满足加速器截止时间。

Result: 在不同工作负载和加速器配置下，HyDRA显著提升了系统性能，并有效降低了加速器的截止时间错过率。

Conclusion: 通过探索重用感知与截止时间感知之间的新权衡，LERN+HyDRA能够高效管理异构SoC共享缓存，为混合关键性系统提供了一种有效的缓存资源分配方案。

Abstract: The system-level cache is a critical resource shared by processor cores and domain-specific accelerators in heterogeneous systems on chips (SoCs). The strict QoS requirements of accelerators, such as deadlines, can lead to severe performance degradation of processor cores. Thus, managing the shared cache efficiently between cores and accelerators becomes crucial. State-of-the-art cache management techniques perform reuse-aware bypassing of accesses from cores with the help of reuse predictors to improve performance. However, architectural differences between accelerators and processor cores (often associated with deep cache hierarchies) can lead to significantly different reuse patterns at the shared cache. We propose a novel clustering-based methodology, LERN, for learning and predicting the reuse behavior of hardware accelerators at the shared cache. We then propose a deadline and reuse-aware cache management strategy, HyDRA, which explores a novel tradeoff between reuse and deadline awareness for performance efficiency. It uses LERN to dynamically predict the reuse behavior of the accelerator accesses and make bypass decisions to maximize the system throughput while meeting accelerator deadlines. We evaluate HyDRA across different workloads and varied accelerator configurations. It significantly improves the system performance and reduces the accelerator deadline miss rate.

</details>


### [41] [31.1 A 14.08-to-135.69Token/s ReRAM-on-Logic Stacked Outlier-Free Large-Language-Model Accelerator with Block-Clustered Weight-Compression and Adaptive Parallel-Speculative-Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09375)
*Pingcheng Dong,Yonghao Tan,Xuejiao Liu,Peng Luo,Yu Liu,Di Pang,Songchen Ma,Xijie Huang,Shih-Yang Liu,Dong Zhang,Zhichao Lu,Luhong Liang,Chi-Ying Tsui,Fengbin Tu,Liang Zhao,Kwang-Ting Cheng*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于55nm制程的投机解码LLM加速器，采用bumping-based face-to-face ReRAM-on-logic堆叠技术，通过局部旋转单元、堆叠感知PNM架构和自适应并行投机解码方案，实现了14.08-135.69 token/s的吞吐量和4.46-7.17倍的加速效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM推理加速器面临量化精度损失、权重EMA开销大、资源带宽利用率低等问题，需要一种高效的硬件加速方案。

Method: 1) 局部旋转单元实现无离群值的低比特量化；2) 堆叠感知PNM架构结合分块向量量化减少权重EMA开销；3) 自适应并行投机解码配合乱序调度器提高资源与带宽利用率。

Result: 芯片实现14.08-135.69 token/s的推理速度，相比标准投机解码获得4.46-7.17倍加速。

Conclusion: 该工作通过创新的硬件-算法协同设计，在LLM加速器领域取得了显著的性能提升。

Abstract: This work presents a 55nm speculative decoding-based LLM accelerator with bumping-based face-to-face ReRAM-on-logic stacking technology. It features a local rotation unit for outlier-free low-bit quantization, a stacking-aware PNM architecture co-designed with blockwise vector quantization to reduce weight EMA overheads, and an adaptive parallel speculative decoding scheme with an out-of-order scheduler for high resource and bandwidth utilization. Our chip achieves 14.08-to-135.69token/s and 4.46-to-7.17x speedup over vanilla speculative decoding.

</details>


### [42] [Emerging 2D Materials for Beyond von Neumann Computing: A Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09695)
*Yaser Banad*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文综述了利用二维材料（石墨烯、过渡金属硫族化物等）突破冯·诺依曼瓶颈的三种汇聚技术路径：石墨烯晶体管、氧化物/二维集成忆阻器、硅兼容二维光子结构，并指出下一个十年的关键不是创造纪录器件，而是将三者集成在同一半导体晶圆上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 登纳德缩放失效导致冯·诺依曼架构成为结构性瓶颈，亟需新型计算范式。二维材料因其原子级厚度、电可调载流子密度和大光学响应，为存算一体、事件驱动计算和光计算提供了统一平台。

Method: 综述性方法，梳理三条技术路线：1) 石墨烯/石墨烯纳米带晶体管作为可扩展沟道材料；2) 氧化物与二维集成忆阻器用于模拟存内计算；3) 硅兼容的二维光子与热发射器结构用于光学计算基元。

Result: 发现二维材料领域过去十年主要产出的是"创纪录器件"，但真正的突破在于将这些分立器件集成在单一晶圆上。

Conclusion: 下一个十年的胜负手是谁能率先将石墨烯晶体管、忆阻器和光子结构三者集成在同一硅基晶圆上，从而实现真正的后冯·诺依曼计算。

Abstract: The end of conventional Dennard scaling and the widening gap between memory bandwidth and arithmetic throughput have made the von Neumann partition a structural bottleneck rather than a transient one. Two-dimensional (2D) materials, with atomically thin geometries, electrically tunable carrier densities, and large optical responses, offer a unified platform on which to build devices that compute where they store, process events rather than clock cycles, and shift workload into the optical domain. This perspective surveys progress along three converging thrusts, graphene and graphene nanoribbon transistors as scalable channel materials, oxide and 2D-integrated memristors for in-memory analog compute, and silicon-compatible 2D photonic and thermal-emitter structures for optical computing primitives. Our central argument is that the 2D-materials community has spent a decade producing record devices, and the next decade will be decided by who first integrates three of them on a single semiconductor wafer.

</details>


### [43] [KV-RM: Regularizing KV-Cache Movement for Static-Graph LLM Serving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09735)
*Zhiqing Zhong,Zhijing Ye,Jian Zhang,Weijian Zheng,Bolun Sun,Xiaodong Yu*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: KV-RM 是一种在静态图LLM解码器下通过解耦逻辑与物理KV缓存、分页管理和合并传输路径来吸收KV缓存不规则性的运行时设计，提升混合长度解码的吞吐量和尾延迟，减少内存预留，消除突发延迟尖峰。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 静态图LLM解码器虽然提供可预测的启动和低提交开销，但其在线解码过程中KV缓存行为高度不规则（请求长度不同、EOS事件异步到达、逻辑历史随时间碎片化），导致过度预留内存和突发延迟异常。现有动态运行时通过分页管理和逐步调度恢复灵活性，但静态图执行器仍受此困扰。本文旨在研究能否在固定解码接口之下吸收这种可变性。

Method: KV-RM 提出一种运行时设计：(1) 将逻辑KV历史与物理存储解耦；(2) 通过块分页器跟踪活跃KV状态；(3) 每个解码步骤通过单个提交描述符实现；(4) 采用合并分阶段的传输路径，将非连续KV映射合并为少量大传输组，再供固定形状注意力内核消费；(5) 可选启用有界远距离历史摘要功能。

Result: 在2-GPU NVIDIA A100节点上，KV-RM相比静态图基线：提升了混合长度解码的吞吐量，改善了尾延迟，减少了各类工作负载的预留KV内存，并消除了生产轨迹回放下严重的突发延迟尖峰。

Conclusion: 结果表明，KV缓存移动性（而非内核形状）可以作为静态图LLM服务中恢复运行时灵活性的有效边界。

Abstract: Static-graph LLM decoders provide predictable launches, fixed tensor shapes, and low submission overhead, but online decoding exposes highly irregular KV-cache behavior: request lengths differ, EOS events arrive asynchronously, and logical histories fragment over time. Dynamic runtimes recover flexibility through paged KV management and step-level scheduling, while static-graph executors often over-reserve memory and suffer burst-time latency outliers. This paper studies whether much of this variability can be absorbed below a fixed decode interface. We present KV-RM, a runtime design that regularizes KV-cache movement beneath a static-graph LLM decoder. KV-RM decouples logical KV histories from physical storage, tracks active KV state through a block pager, and materializes each decode step through a single committed descriptor. A merge-staged transport path coalesces non-contiguous KV mappings into a small number of large transfer groups before a fixed-shape attention kernel consumes them. Optional bounded far-history summaries can be enabled under the same interface, but the core design does not depend on them. On a 2-GPU NVIDIA A100 node, KV-RM improves mixed-length decoding throughput and tail latency relative to a static-graph baseline, reduces reserved KV memory across workload families, and removes severe burst-time latency spikes under production-trace replay. These results suggest that KV-cache movement, rather than kernel shape, can be an effective boundary for recovering runtime flexibility in static-graph LLM serving.

</details>


### [44] [RFAmpDesigner: A Self-Evolving Multi-Agent LLM Framework for Automated Radio Frequency Amplifier Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10093)
*Hang Lu,Guochang Li,Qianyu Chen,Huiyan Gao,Shaogang Wang,Xuanyu He,Yiwei Liu,Gaopeng Chen,Nayu Li,Xiaokang Qi,Chunyi Song,Zhiwei Xu*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文提出RFAmpDesigner，一个基于多智能体LLM的射频放大器自动设计框架，通过资源分配中间件降维、RAG记忆复用和并行搜索，实现从10GHz到50GHz、10%到80%分数带宽的低噪声放大器自动合成，是首个基于设计概念而非网表文本的LLM驱动方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有射频放大器自动化设计方法面临维度灾难、领域知识利用不足、迁移性差等数据效率低下的问题；而直接应用大语言模型（LLM）到射频尺寸设计中，因电路优化的数值特性和对领域设计流程的依赖而难以实现。

Method: 提出RFAmpDesigner多智能体框架：(1) 资源分配中间件将高维参数调优重构为低维资源分配问题；(2) 遵循标准设计实践，使LLM区分高/低成本动作并支持并行搜索；(3) 采用检索增强生成（RAG）复用记忆库中的知识和经验，实现自进化优化过程。

Result: 在不同复杂度的低噪声放大器实验中，能够自动合成中心频率10GHz至50GHz、分数带宽10%至80%的设计。

Conclusion: 这是首个基于设计概念（而非将网表视为文本）的LLM驱动射频放大器尺寸设计方法，为缓解射频设计中的数据稀缺问题提供了新方案。

Abstract: Automating radio frequency (RF) amplifier design remains challenging because existing methods suffer from the curse of dimensionality, weak use of domain knowledge, and poor transferability, leading to low data efficiency. Meanwhile, although large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in many scientific domains, applying them directly to RF sizing is nontrivial due to the numerical nature of circuit optimization and the reliance on domain-specific design flows. To address this, this paper proposes RFAmpDesigner, a multi-agent framework that automates RF amplifier sizing. It introduces a resource-allocation middleware that reframes high-dimensional parameter tuning as a low-dimensional resource distribution problem, making it easier to inject sizing knowledge into general-purpose LLMs. The framework also follows standard design practice, enabling LLMs to distinguish between high- and low-cost actions and search in parallel. To realize a self-evolving optimization process, the framework employs retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to reuse past knowledge and experience from memory base. As a proof of concept, we apply RFAmpDesigner to low noise amplifiers of varying complexity. The experimental results show that it can automatically synthesize designs with fractional bandwidths ranging from 10\% to 80\% and center frequencies from 10 GHz to 50 GHz. To the best of our knowledge, this work develops the first LLM-driven approach for RF amplifier sizing that operates on design concepts instead of treating netlists as text, offering a novel solution to mitigate data scarcity in RF design.

</details>


### [45] [Towards an End-To-End System for Real-Time Gesture Recognition from Surface Vibrations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10110)
*Florian Hettstedt,Cedric Giese,Tianheng Ling,Keiichi Yasumoto,Gregor Schiele,Andreas Erbslöh*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一套完整的端到端表面振动手势识别系统，包括定制压电传感器和可配置数据处理流水线，使用紧凑的1D-CNN模型在办公桌上实现了高精度的六种手势识别，在15名参与者数据集上展现了强用户独立性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究通常只处理感知硬件或离线识别等部分环节，缺乏从传感器到模型评估的完整端到端系统。本文旨在填补这一空白，提供一套完整的表面振动手势识别方案。

Method: 使用压电传感器实现低噪声振动感知；构建模块化信号处理框架，包含连续记录、可变预处理到模型数据集的全流程；采用紧凑的深度可分离1D-CNN模型；联合搜索预处理和模型超参数，最终选定带通滤波、固定长度窗口、最小-最大归一化的配置，模型仅8,722个参数。

Result: 在15名参与者、6种手势的自采数据集上，该方法在不同数据拆分方式下均取得高准确率，特别是在留一法交叉验证中表现出强用户独立性。

Conclusion: 本文证明了端到端表面振动手势识别系统的可行性，为智能家居中非侵入式交互提供了实用方案，且模型轻量、用户无关泛化能力强。

Abstract: Sensing surface vibrations promise unobtrusive interaction for smart home systems by enabling gesture recognition on existing everyday surfaces without disturbing living-space design. Existing approaches typically address only parts of the processing chain, such as sensing hardware or offline gesture recognition, rather than providing an end-to-end system from surface-mounted sensors to the evaluation of the prediction model. This paper presents a custom sensor system and a configurable data-to-model pipeline for gesture recognition on a standard office desk. Our hardware enables a low-noise sensing of the vibrations using piezoelectric sensors. Building on a modular signal-processing framework, we model the full chain from continuous recordings through variable pre-processing to a model-ready dataset, and process the resulting data with compact depthwise separable 1D-CNNs. We conduct a joint search over pre-processing and model hyperparameters and identify a configuration with 8,722 parameters that uses band-pass filtering, fixed-length windows, and min-max normalization. On a self-recorded dataset with 15 participants performing six gestures this configuration achieves high accuracies across different data splitting methods, including strong user-independent performance in a leave-one-subject-out cross-validation.

</details>


### [46] [ObfAx: Obfuscation and IP Piracy Detection in Approximate Circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10355)
*Lukas Sekanina,Vojtech Mrazek*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文针对近似计算电路的知识产权保护问题，提出了一种新的对抗性威胁模型——近似混淆（approximate obfuscation），并开发了通过统计误差特征比较来检测IP盗用的自动化框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 近似电路在计算精度与硬件效率之间取得了优异平衡，可作为可复用IP核部署，但其盗版保护问题尚未得到充分研究，亟需有效的IP保护与盗版检测方法。

Method: 提出近似混淆威胁模型（攻击者通过结构混淆和功能修改使混淆电路与原IP具有几乎相同的误差特性和硬件指标），并构建自动化框架，通过提取和比较受保护IP核与可疑电路的统计误差分布来实现盗版检测。

Result: 在多种近似乘法器上进行了广泛实验，分析了不同近似乘法器对近似混淆攻击的鲁棒性，揭示了混淆、近似与IP保护之间的相互作用关系。

Conclusion: 该工作为近似计算场景下的IP保护提供了新思路，所提出的检测框架能有效识别近似混淆导致的IP盗用行为。

Abstract: Approximate circuits often achieve exceptional trade-offs between computational accuracy and hardware efficiency, making them attractive for deployment as reusable Intellectual Property (IP) cores. However, safeguarding such circuits against piracy is critical for enabling sustainable commercialization of approximate computing. This work addresses the emerging challenge of IP protection and piracy detection in the context of approximate hardware. We introduce a novel adversarial threat model, approximate obfuscation, in which an attacker not only conceals the design through structural obfuscation but also introduces functional modifications to ensure that the resulting circuit exhibits nearly identical error characteristics and hardware metrics as the original IP. To counter this threat, we propose an automated framework that extracts and compares statistical error profiles of protected IP cores and suspicious circuits, enabling systematic detection of potential IP theft. Through extensive experiments on a diverse set of approximate multipliers, we analyze the resilience of different approximate multipliers against approximate obfuscation. Our results provide new insights into the interplay between obfuscation, approximation, and IP protection.

</details>


### [47] [Reconfigurable Computing Challenge: Real-Time Graph Neural Networks for Online Event Selection in Big Science](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10612)
*Marc Neu,Frank Baptist,Thomas Lobmaier,Fabio Papagno,Torben Ferber,Jürgen Becker*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在AMD Versal VCK190上部署动态图神经网络用于Belle II电磁量能器硬件触发系统的端到端方案，利用FPGA逻辑和AI Engine tile实现2.94M事件/秒的吞吐量和7.15微秒的延迟，相比纯FPGA方案吞吐量提升53%，DSP使用率从99%降至19%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对撞机实验触发系统需要严格满足延迟和吞吐量约束，而探测器向更高粒度发展导致输入数量增加，纯FPGA方案面临资源瓶颈，因此需要探索结合FPGA fabric与AI Engine tile的异构部署方案。

Method: 提出基于Python的半自动化设计流程，涵盖算子融合、分区、映射、空间并行化和内核级优化，在AMD Versal VCK190上同时利用FPGA逻辑和AI Engine tile实现动态GNN的端到端部署。

Result: 吞吐量2.94M事件/秒，端到端延迟7.15微秒；相比纯FPGA基线，吞吐量提升53%，DSP使用率从99%降至19%，AI Engine tile使用率为29%。

Conclusion: 异构计算方案能有效突破纯FPGA的资源瓶颈，实现高吞吐低延迟的GNN推理部署，并为实时监控提供了交互式可视化管道。

Abstract: Graph neural networks are increasingly adopted in trigger systems for collider experiments, where strict latency and throughput constraints render deployment on embedded platforms challenging. As detectors move towards higher granularity, the number of inputs per inference increase and FPGA-only solutions face resource bottlenecks. This work presents an end-to-end demonstrator for the real-time deployment of a dynamic Graph Neural Network for the Belle II electromagnetic calorimeter hardware trigger on the AMD Versal VCK190, leveraging both FPGA fabric and AI Engine tiles. We develop a Python-based semi-automated design flow covering operator fusion, partitioning, mapping, spatial parallelization, and kernel-level optimization. Our design achieves a throughput of 2.94 million events per second at an end-to-end latency of 7.15 microseconds. Compared to the FPGA-only baseline, this represents a 53% throughput improvement while reducing DSP utilization from 99% to 19% at 29% AI Engine tile utilization. To validate the deployment, an interactive visualization pipeline enables real-time monitoring of inference results on the physical demonstrator.

</details>


### [48] [TLX: Hardware-Native, Evolvable MIMW GPU Compiler for Large-scale Production Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10905)
*Yue Guan,Hongtao Yu,Peng Chen,Daohang Shi,Karthik Manivannan,Nicholas J Riasanovsky,Manman Ren,Lei Wang,Shane Nay,Partha Kanuparthy,Zaifeng Pan,Zhengding Hu,Yufei Ding*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: TLX（Triton低级语言扩展）通过MIMW（多指令、多线程束）机制在warp-group粒度表达编排，在保留Triton高效块编程模型的同时，解决现代GPU编程中硬件专业化与编程抽象之间的张力问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代GPU越来越依赖专用硬件单元和异步协调机制，性能瓶颈已从线程级并行转向数据移动、张量核心计算和同步的编排。然而现有编程模型面临两难：隐藏过多执行结构导致编译器无法跟上新硬件机制，暴露过多则把编排负担转嫁给程序员。

Method: 提出TLX，以MIMW为核心，在warp-group粒度上表达编排。TLX作为Triton的嵌入式扩展，引入多线程束执行、本地内存编排、异步操作和集群感知控制等显式接口。

Result: TLX以有限开发成本支持大量自定义优化，性能与最先进实现相当，其编写的内核已部署于大规模训练和推理生产系统。

Conclusion: TLX通过引入warp-group级别的显式编排接口，在不牺牲Triton高效块编程模型的前提下，有效弥合了现代GPU硬件复杂性与编程抽象之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Modern GPUs increasingly rely on specialized hardware units and asynchronous coordination mechanisms, so performance depends on orchestrating data movement, tensor-core computation, and synchronization rather than exposing more thread-level parallelism. This creates a programming-model tension: if too much execution structure is hidden, the compiler must catch up to new hardware mechanisms; if too much is exposed, the burden of orchestration falls back onto the programmer. We present TLX (Triton Low-level Language Extensions), built around MIMW (Multi-Instruction, Multi-Warp), which expresses orchestration at warp-group granularity while preserving Triton's productive blocked programming model for regular computation. TLX realizes this idea as an embedded extension to Triton, exposing explicit interfaces for multi-warp execution, local-memory orchestration, asynchronous operations, and cluster-aware control. Our evaluation shows that TLX supports substantial customization with limited development effort while remaining competitive with state-of-the-art implementations. TLX-authored kernels have been deployed in large-scale training and inference production systems. Our code is open sourced at https://github.com/facebookexperimental/triton.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [49] [LLMSYS-HPOBench: Hyperparameter Optimization Benchmark Suite for Real-World LLM Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08305)
*Siyu Wu,Yulong Ye,Zezhen Xiang,Pengzhou Chen,Gangda Xiong,Tao Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了LLMSYS-HPOBench，首个面向真实世界LLM系统的超参数优化基准套件，包含364,450个超参数配置、12-23维搜索空间、多 fidelity 因素和多种成本指标，旨在为AutoML社区提供评估和发展HPO算法的新平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有HPO基准未能充分捕捉LLM系统特有的复杂超参数空间（包含AI和非AI组件）、fidelity因素的非线性影响以及多样化的测量成本，亟需一个专门针对LLM系统的HPO基准来推动该领域研究。

Method: 通过实际运行LLM系统来收集超参数配置的推理目标值数据，构建了一个包含高维搜索空间（12-23维）、多fidelity维度（3-5维）、多种推理指标（3-9个）和成本指标（2-10个）的系统化基准套件，并持续更新维护。

Result: 构建了包含364,450个超参数配置、932个设置、多种目标与成本指标的基准数据集，并生成了完整的测量日志。

Conclusion: 该基准不仅可用于重新验证现有HPO算法在LLM系统上的表现，更为AutoML社区探索新的研究方向提供了持续演进的平台。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) systems have been the frontier of AI in many application domains, leading to new challenges and opportunities for hyperparameter optimization (HPO) for the AutoML community. However, this type of system exhibits an unprecedented compound space of hyperparameter configuration from both the AI and non-AI components; rich and nonlinear implications from the fidelity factors; and diverse costs of measuring hyperparameter configurations, none of which have been fully captured in existing benchmarks. This paper presents the first (live) benchmark suite and datasets for HPO of real-world LLM systems, dubbed LLMSYS-HPOBench, covering data related to the inference objective values of hyperparameter configurations profiled from running the LLM systems. Currently, LLMSYS-HPOBench contains 364,450 hyperparameter configurations with a dimensionality of 12-23, 3-5 dimensions of fidelity factor leading to 932 settings, 3-9 inference objective metrics, and 2-10 cost metrics, together with generated logs from measuring the LLM systems. What we seek to advocate is not only a revalidation of the existing HPO algorithms over the frontier LLM systems, but also to provide an evolving platform for the AutoML community to explore new directions of research in this regard. The benchmark suite has been made available at: https://github.com/ideas-labo/llmsys-hpobench

</details>


### [50] [FlashSVD v1.5: Making Low-Rank Transformers Inference Actually Fast](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08314)
*Wenhao Wu,Zishan Shao,Kangning Cui,Jinhee Kim,Yixiao Wang,Hancheng Ye,Danyang Zhuo,Yiran Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FlashSVD v1.5是一个统一推理运行时，通过运行时协同设计（而非仅压缩算法）解决SVD压缩Transformer在LLM服务中理论FLOPs减少无法转化为实际加速的问题，在解码和端到端场景下分别实现最高2.55x和2.39x加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SVD低秩压缩虽然减少了Transformer参数量和名义FLOPs，但这些节省在实际LLM服务中很难转化为真正的加速，因为分解后的检查点会碎片化执行路径，且预填充和自回归解码阶段的开销差异显著。

Method: 提出FlashSVD v1.5统一推理运行时：将多种公开SVD压缩族映射到通用因子化表示，结合阶段特定内核、密集KV解码、打包MLP执行和逐层CUDA-graph重放，将低秩服务路径重组为轻量运行时。

Result: 在代表性解码器服务场景中，FlashSVD v1.5实现最高2.55x解码加速和2.39x端到端加速，在多种流行SVD压缩族上平均达到1.48x解码加速和1.44x端到端加速。

Conclusion: 实际低秩加速需要运行时协同设计，而非仅依赖压缩算法本身。

Abstract: SVD-based Low-rank compression reduces transformer parameters and nominal FLOPs, but these savings often translate poorly into real LLM serving speedups. We show that this gap is largely a runtime problem: factorized checkpoints fragment execution paths, and the resulting overhead differs substantially between prefill and autoregressive decode. We present FlashSVD v1.5, a unified inference runtime for serving SVD-compressed transformers. FlashSVD v1.5 maps diverse public SVD compression families to a common factorized representation and combines phase-specific kernels with dense-KV decode, packed MLP execution, and per-layer CUDA-graph replay to reorganize the low-rank serving path into a thin runtime. Across representative decoder-serving settings, FlashSVD v1.5 achieves up to 2.55x decode and 2.39x end-to-end speedup, and it attains 1.48x average decode and 1.44x average end-to-end speedup across multiple popular SVD compression families. These results suggest that practical low-rank acceleration requires runtime co-design, not compression algorithms alone. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Zishan-Shao/FlashSVD.

</details>


### [51] [CDS4RAG: Cyclic Dual-Sequential Hyperparameter Optimization for RAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08333)
*Pengzhou Chen,Tao Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CDS4RAG框架，通过循环双序列优化方法，全面优化RAG系统的检索器和生成器超参数，在多个基准测试中显著提升生成质量和收敛速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RAG系统对检索器和生成器的超参数高度敏感，但现有方法要么将RAG视为黑箱优化，要么只优化部分超参数，导致效果不佳且收敛缓慢。

Method: 提出循环双序列优化框架CDS4RAG，将检索器和生成器的超参数区分对待，循环交替优化；在生成器优化阶段设计细粒度的预算分配和跨周期种子加速机制。

Result: 在4个基准和2个LLM上的实验显示：在21/24个案例中显著提升基线算法，全面超越现有最优方法，生成质量提升高达1.54倍，且有更好的加速效果。

Conclusion: CDS4RAG是一种算法无关的框架，能有效且高效地优化RAG全超参数，适用于多种通用优化算法。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is sensitive to the vast hyperparameters of the retriever and generator, yet optimizing them using given queries is a challenging task due to the complex interactions and expensive evaluation costs. Existing algorithms are ineffective and slow in convergence, since they often treat RAG as a monolithic black box or only optimize partial hyperparameters. In this paper, we propose CDS4RAG, a framework that optimizes the full RAG hyperparameters using given queries via a new cyclic dual-sequential formulation. CDS4RAG is special in the sense that it distinguishes the hyperparameters of the retriever and generator, cyclically optimizing them in turn. Such a paradigm allows us to design fine-grained within-cycle budget provision and expedite the optimization via cross-cycle seeding when optimizing the generator. CDS4RAG is also an algorithm-agnostic framework that can be paired with diverse general algorithms. Through experiments on four common benchmarks and two backbone LLMs, we reveal that CDS4RAG considerably boosts the vanilla algorithms in 21/24 cases while significantly outperforming state-of-the-art algorithms in all cases with up to 1.54x improvements of generation quality and better speedup.

</details>


### [52] [G-Zero: Self-Play for Open-Ended Generation from Zero Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09959)
*Chengsong Huang,Haolin Liu,Tong Zheng,Runpeng Dai,Langlin Huang,Jinyuan Li,Zongxia Li,Zhepei Wei,Yu Meng,Jiaxin Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: G-Zero是一个无需外部验证器的共进化框架，通过Hint-δ内在奖励信号实现LLM在开放任务中的自主自我进化，理论证明其在理想条件下具有最优迭代保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自进化LLM在可验证领域表现优异，但在开放任务中依赖代理LLM评判者，存在能力瓶颈和奖励破解问题，亟需无需外部验证器的自主进化方法。

Method: 提出G-Zero框架：1) 核心创新Hint-δ，量化生成器无提示响应与自生成提示条件下响应之间的预测偏移作为内在奖励；2) Proposer模型通过GRPO训练，持续针对生成器盲点合成挑战性查询和有信息量的提示；3) 生成器通过DPO优化，内化提示引导的改进。

Result: 理论证明了理想化标准DPO版本G-Zero的最佳迭代次优性保证，条件为Proposer提供足够探索覆盖且数据过滤保持伪标签分数低噪声。

Conclusion: G-Zero通过完全从内部分布动力学中推导监督信号，绕过了外部评判者的能力上限，为不可验证领域中的持续LLM自我进化提供了可扩展、鲁棒的路径。

Abstract: Self-evolving LLMs excel in verifiable domains but struggle in open-ended tasks, where reliance on proxy LLM judges introduces capability bottlenecks and reward hacking. To overcome this, we introduce G-Zero, a verifier-free, co-evolutionary framework for autonomous self-improvement. Our core innovation is Hint-$δ$, an intrinsic reward that quantifies the predictive shift between a Generator model's unassisted response and its response conditioned on a self-generated hint. Using this signal, a Proposer model is trained via GRPO to continuously target the Generator's blind spots by synthesizing challenging queries and informative hints. The Generator is concurrently optimized via DPO to internalize these hint-guided improvements. Theoretically, we prove a best-iterate suboptimality guarantee for an idealized standard-DPO version of G-Zero, provided that the Proposer induces sufficient exploration coverage and the data filteration keeps pseudo-label score noise low. By deriving supervision entirely from internal distributional dynamics, G-Zero bypasses the capability ceilings of external judges, providing a scalable, robust pathway for continuous LLM self-evolution across unverifiable domains.

</details>


### [53] [Non-Monotonic Latency in Apple MPS Decoding: KV Cache Interactions and Execution Regimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08913)
*Willy Fitra Hendria*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现Apple MPS后端在自回归推理中存在非单调的延迟异常，某些配置下延迟可飙升21倍，而CPU和NVIDIA T4表现平稳，强调了硬件感知评估的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统观点认为自回归推理延迟随解码长度单调变化，KV缓存普遍有益。本文发现Apple MPS后端存在意外的非单调延迟行为，揭示硬件后端对推理性能有不可忽视的影响。

Method: 使用GPT-2、BLOOM、OPT等多族Transformer模型，在Apple MPS后端进行解码延迟测量，并与CPU、NVIDIA T4 (CUDA)对比，排除内存压力和预填充成本干扰，通过控制实验定位异常来源。

Result: Apple MPS后端在特定解码预算区间出现高达21倍的延迟尖峰，邻近配置下恢复正常；CPU和NVIDIA T4在同一条件下呈现平滑单调缩放，无异常波动。

Conclusion: 自回归推理性能并非始终单调可预测，硬件后端（尤其是MPS）可能引入非连续性能波动。研究强调需进行硬件感知的评估，避免依赖聚合解码预算基准，以防关键配置点的性能失真。

Abstract: Autoregressive inference is typically assumed to scale predictably with decoding length, and key-value (KV) caching is widely regarded as a universally beneficial optimization for accelerating decoding. In this work, we identify unexpected non-monotonic latency behavior in the Apple MPS backend, where latency changes abruptly across nearby decoding configurations. Using transformer models from multiple families (GPT-2, BLOOM, and OPT), we observe latency spikes of up to 21x within specific decoding-budget intervals, followed by recovery at neighboring configurations. Controlled experiments show that these anomalies are not explained by memory pressure or prefill cost, but are instead consistent with backend execution dynamics, while CPU and NVIDIA T4 (CUDA) exhibit smooth monotonic scaling under identical conditions. Our findings highlight the importance of hardware-aware evaluation for autoregressive inference and caution against relying on aggregated decoding-budget benchmarks, as performance can vary discontinuously across nearby configurations.

</details>


### [54] [TRAM: Training Approximate Multiplier Structures for Low-Power AI Accelerators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08231)
*Chang Meng,Hanyu Wang,Yuyang Ye,Mingfei Yu,Wayne Burleson,Giovanni De Micheli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TRAM方法，通过联合优化近似乘法器结构和AI模型参数，在保持精度的同时显著降低AI加速器的功耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI加速器功耗问题日益重要，而乘法器是其中的高功耗组件。现有方法将近似乘法器设计与AI模型训练分开进行，未能充分利用联合优化的潜力。

Method: 提出TRAM框架，联合优化近似乘法器（AxM）结构与AI模型参数，而非像以往工作那样分开设计。

Result: 在CIFAR-10上的CNN中实现最高25.05%的AxM功耗降低，在ImageNet上的视觉Transformer中实现最高27.09%的功耗降低。

Conclusion: 联合优化方法比分离设计能更有效地降低功耗，同时保持较小的精度损失，适用于不同AI模型架构。

Abstract: Reducing power consumption in AI accelerators is increasingly important. Approximate computing can reduce power consumption while keeping the accuracy loss small. Since multipliers are power-hungry components in AI models, this paper focuses on synthesizing low-power approximate multipliers (AxMs). Unlike prior works that design AxMs separately from AI model training, we present TRAM, which jointly optimizes the AxM structure and AI model parameters to lower power with small accuracy loss. Experiments show that compared to state-of-the-art AxMs, TRAM achieves up to 25.05% AxM power reduction on CNNs with CIFAR-10, and reduces power by up to 27.09% on vision transformers with ImageNet.

</details>


### [55] [Graph Computation Meets Circuit Algebra: A Task-Aligned Analysis of Graph Neural Networks for Electronic Design Automation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08291)
*Hyunmog Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了GNN在EDA各子任务（STA、布局、布线拥塞、IR压降等）中的应用，指出成功的关键在于GNN的传播/聚合/监督机制必须与任务本身的代数结构对齐（如max-plus、线性系统、概率递归等），并识别了当前方法的成功与失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 并非所有图结构问题都适用同一种GNN计算，GNN-for-EDA的成功关键在于架构代数与任务代数的对齐，而不是盲目使用通用GNN。

Method: 按任务逐一分析各EDA子问题的代数结构（如STA是max-plus递归、IR drop是线性系统、开关活动是概率递归等），并与对应的GNN架构（异步DAG-GNN、可微分布局器、消息传递等）进行对齐分析，同时形式化了电路图与通用图的区别（有向、异质、多尺度、有时钟结构）。

Result: 识别了各任务中成功对齐的方法及因代数-架构不匹配导致的局限性，指出了stage leakage、proxy-to-signoff gap、calibration、design-distribution shift等关键失败模式。

Conclusion: GNN-for-EDA应是一种任务对齐分析，而非泛泛的AI芯片设计综述；连续SE(3)-等变GNN通常不适合曼哈顿数字布局，LLM/RL/扩散等生成方法不在此文范围内。

Abstract: EDA problems are graph-structured, but not all graph-structured problems call for the same GNN computation. We argue that successful GNN-for-EDA methods are those whose propagation, aggregation, and supervision align with the native algebra of the target task. Concretely: static timing analysis is a max-plus/min-plus recurrence on a topologically ordered DAG, structurally aligned with asynchronous DAG-GNNs; placement is governed by hypergraph wirelength and density penalties and is exploited by differentiable placers rather than by message-passing GNNs alone; routing congestion is a sparse demand-supply field over a layout grid; switching-activity propagation is a probabilistic recurrence on a directed netlist; IR drop is a linear system on the power-delivery network; and analog symmetry extraction is a discrete constraint-prediction problem on schematic graphs. Through these task-by-task alignments we (i) review the GNN architectural toolkit relevant to circuits, (ii) formalize how circuit graphs differ from generic graphs (directed, heterogeneous, multi-scale, with sequential and clock structure), (iii) characterize where current methods succeed and where the algebra-architecture mismatch limits them, and (iv) identify failure modes--stage leakage, proxy-to-signoff gap, calibration, and design-distribution shift--that we believe are likely to dominate the next phase of work. We position the paper as a GNN-for-EDA, task-aligned analysis rather than a comprehensive AI-for-chip-design survey. Continuous SE(3)-equivariant geometric GNNs are usually mismatched to Manhattan digital layout, and LLM-for-RTL, HLS, and RL/diffusion-based topology generation are outside our scope.

</details>


### [56] [UMEDA: Unified Multi-modal Efficient Data Fusion for Privacy-Preserving Graph Federated Learning via Spectral-Gated Attention and Diffusion-Based Operator Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08288)
*Shih-Yu Lai,Hirozumi Yamaguchi,Shang-Tse Chen,Yu-Lun Liu,Bing-Yu Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: UMEDA是一个图联邦学习框架，通过谱信号处理聚合异构传感器（Wi-Fi、LiDAR等）的客户端更新，并结合各向异性差分隐私机制，在隐私预算紧张和模态高度异构的场景下显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习在处理异构无线与视觉传感器（不同模态、分辨率）时存在脆弱性，且数据分布漂移和隐私噪声会破坏定位所需的结构信号，亟需一种能对齐异构模态、适应分布漂移并平衡隐私与效用的框架。

Method: 将客户端构建为全局图节点，共享连续积分算子，聚合视为该算子上的谱信号处理；每个客户端使用线性注意力层（低秩滤波核谱）抑制模态特异性残差，对齐到公共低秩子空间；服务器通过核谱系数的扩散模型聚合更新，吸收图大小变化和缺失模态；添加各向异性差分隐私机制，将噪声优先投影到信号子空间的零空间，保留主特征方向。

Result: 在MM-Fi和RELI11D分布外基准测试中，UMEDA在准确率、收敛速度和通信效率上全面超越最先进的联邦基线，尤其在模态高度异构和隐私预算紧张时优势显著。

Conclusion: UMEDA通过谱域聚合和各向异性隐私机制，有效解决了联邦无设备定位中模态异构、分布漂移与隐私保护的矛盾，为异构传感器联邦学习提供了新范式。

Abstract: Device-free localization trains models from heterogeneous wireless and visual sensors (e.g., Wi-Fi, LiDAR) distributed across edge devices. Federated learning offers a privacy-respecting framework, but is brittle when clients differ in sensor modality and resolution, when their data distributions drift, and when privacy noise destroys the structural signal needed for localization. We propose UMEDA, a graph federated learning framework in which clients form nodes of a global graph that share a continuous integral operator, and aggregation is reformulated as spectral signal processing on this operator. Each client encodes its local sensors with a linear-attention layer whose kernel spectrum is low-rank filtered, suppressing modality-specific residuals so clients with different sensors align in a common low-rank subspace. The server then aggregates client updates via a diffusion model over the kernel's spectral coefficients, treating updates as discretizations of a shared operator rather than topology-bound weights -- this absorbs varying graph sizes and missing modalities without node-wise correspondence. To balance privacy and utility, we add an anisotropic differential-privacy mechanism that projects noise preferentially into the null space of the signal subspace, preserving dominant eigendirections while ensuring formal $(ε, δ)$-DP under gradient clipping. On MM-Fi and the RELI11D out-of-distribution benchmark, UMEDA outperforms state-of-the-art federated baselines in accuracy, convergence, and communication efficiency, particularly under high modality heterogeneity and tight privacy budgets.

</details>


### [57] [Private Vertical Federated Inference for Time-Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08343)
*Lucas Fenaux,Larris Xie,Aditya Bang,Alex Zhang,Kevin Wilson,Florian Kerschbaum*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PPHH-VFL通过将模型头部拆分为高效的明文公共头部和安全的轻量级MPC私有头部，结合对抗训练，在时间序列数据协作推理中实现了比端到端MPC快六个数量级的推理速度，同时相比标准VFL+MPC基线提升了准确率和通信效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在隐私保护与效率之间存在矛盾：MPC提供强隐私保证但计算开销大、扩展性差；VFL效率高但存在嵌入层隐私泄露风险；完全用MPC保护VFL模型头部又过于缓慢。亟需一种兼顾效率与隐私的实用大规模安全推理方案。

Method: 提出PPHH-VFL混合架构：将模型头部拆分为明文公共头部（Plaintext Public Head）和轻量级MPC私有头部（Private Head）。对公共嵌入进行对抗训练以缓解隐私泄露；小型私有头部通过MPC安全保护敏感信息流，保障下游任务效用。

Result: 在高达8600万参数的模型上：比端到端MPC推理加速高达六个数量级；相比标准VFL+MPC基线，WAN下加速44.4倍，通信成本从1.7GB降至19MB（降低91.2倍），下游分类准确率提升2.50%，回归RMSE改善40.7%。

Conclusion: PPHH-VFL通过巧妙的公私头部拆分设计，在隐私保护、计算效率和模型效用之间取得了优秀平衡，为大规模时间序列数据的协作推理提供了一种实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Institutions may benefit from collaborative inference on time-series data. In settings where privacy is necessary, multi-party computation (MPC) is a straightforward approach to providing strong guarantees, yet it remains prohibitively expensive and scales poorly with modern transformer architectures. Vertical Federated Learning (VFL) offers efficiency but suffers from privacy leakage at the embedding level, and securing the entire VFL model head via MPC remains prohibitively slow and communication-heavy for larger models. To enable practical, secure inference at scale, we propose "Public/Private Hybrid Head-VFL" (PPHH-VFL). This hybrid architecture splits the model head into an efficient plaintext public head and a secure, lightweight MPC private head. By applying adversarial training to the public embeddings, we mitigate privacy leakage; concurrently, the small private head securely preserves the flow of sensitive information needed for high downstream utility. Empirical evaluations on models ranging up to 86 million parameters demonstrate that PPHH-VFL accelerates inference by up to six orders of magnitude compared to end-to-end MPC. Compared to a standard VFL+MPC baseline, our approach scales significantly better, achieving a speedup of up to 44.4x in WAN and a 91.2x reduction in communication costs (dropping from 1.7 GB to 19 MB per batch), while simultaneously improving downstream classification accuracy by 2.50% and regression RMSE by 40.7%.

</details>


### [58] [FlashEvolve: Accelerating Agent Self-Evolution with Asynchronous Stage Orchestration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08520)
*Zhengding Hu,Mingge Lu,Zhen Wang,Jixuan Ruan,Chang Chen,Zaifeng Pan,Yue Guan,Ruiyi Wang,Zhongkai Yu,Chao Zhang,Yufei Ding*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FlashEvolve通过异步执行、版本追踪和语言空间的可检查可修复特性，将LLM-based agent进化框架的吞吐量提升3.5-4.9倍，同时解决数据陈旧性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM-based进化方法虽然能改进agent，但其同步执行和LLM-heavy阶段的不平衡导致wall-clock成本成为主要瓶颈。

Method: 用异步worker和队列替代同步执行实现阶段重叠；通过版本追踪和策略（更新/丢弃/修补）处理数据陈旧性；利用语言空间的可检查可修复特性将陈旧工件转化为进化信号；引入推测性阶段完成和自适应工作流控制提升吞吐量和token效率。

Result: 在GEPA workloads上，FlashEvolve相比同步GEPA在本地vLLM上提升3.5倍proposal吞吐量，在API serving上提升4.9倍。

Conclusion: FlashEvolve有效解决了LLM-based agent进化框架的同步瓶颈，其异步设计通用适用于GEPA、ACE和Meta-Harness等多种框架。

Abstract: LLM-based evolution has emerged as a promising way to improve agents by refining non-parametric artifacts, but its wall-clock cost remains a major bottleneck. We identify that this cost comes from synchronized stage execution and imbalance inside each LLM-heavy stage. We present FlashEvolve, an efficient framework that replaces synchronized execution with asynchronous workers and queues, allowing different stages and steps to overlap. To handle data staleness introduced by asynchrony, FlashEvolve tracks artifact versions and applies different policies to update, discard, or patch stale artifacts. Unlike weight-space staleness in asynchronous RL, language-space staleness is inspectable and repairable: a stale artifact is not just delayed work, but readable evidence that the LLM can reflect on, revise, and turn into useful evolution signal. FlashEvolve further improves throughput and token efficiency with speculative stage completion and adaptive workflow control. On GEPA workloads, FlashEvolve improves proposal throughput by $3.5\times$ on local vLLM and $4.9\times$ on API serving over synchronous GEPA. The same design also applies to ACE and Meta-Harness.

</details>


### [59] [PAAC: Privacy-Aware Agentic Device-Cloud Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08646)
*Liangqi Yuan,Wenzhi Fang,Shiqiang Wang,Christopher G. Brinton*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PAAC是一个隐私感知的智能体框架，通过将规划器-执行器分解与设备-云边界对齐，利用角色分工本身作为隐私机制。云智能体基于类型占位符进行推理（保留推理角色但丢弃内容），设备智能体负责识别敏感跨度并提取关键发现。在严格隐私设置下，PAAC在准确率上提升15-36%，泄漏量减少2-6倍，并在17个额外基准测试中表现一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体面临结构张力：云端智能体推理能力强但暴露用户数据，设备端智能体保护隐私但能力受限。现有设备-云设计仅视此边界为计算拆分而非信任边界，现有净化器则在策略灵活性与工具调用所需的结构保真度之间取舍。

Method: 提出PAAC框架，将规划器-执行器分解与设备-云边界对齐：云智能体使用类型占位符（保留推理角色、丢弃敏感内容）进行推理；设备智能体识别敏感跨度并将执行结果提炼为关键发现。净化过程将设备端LLM限制为仅提出需屏蔽的跨度，由确定性注册表执行所有替换和还原操作，确保动作可直接在设备端执行。

Result: 在三个智能体基准测试的严格隐私设置下，PAAC主导隐私-准确率的帕累托前沿，平均准确率提升15-36%，泄漏量减少2-6倍，在非固定实体分类的隐私目标上提升最大。在涵盖数学、科学、金融等10个领域的17个额外基准测试中表现一致。

Conclusion: PAAC通过将角色分工本身作为隐私机制，有效解决了LLM智能体在云端推理能力与设备端隐私保护之间的结构性矛盾，在保持高准确率的同时显著降低隐私泄漏。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents face a structural tension: cloud agents provide strong reasoning but expose user data, while on-device agents preserve privacy at the cost of overall capability. Existing device-cloud designs treat this boundary as a compute split rather than a trust boundary suited to agentic workloads, and existing sanitizers force a choice between policy flexibility and the structural fidelity tool calls require. In this work, we develop PAAC, a privacy-aware agentic framework that aligns planner--executor decomposition with the device-cloud boundary so that role specialization itself becomes the privacy mechanism. The cloud agent reasons over typed placeholder tokens that preserve each sensitive value's reasoning role while discarding its content, while the on-device agent identifies sensitive spans and distills each step's execution outcome into compact key findings. Sanitization confines the on-device LLM to proposing which spans to mask, while a deterministic registry performs all substitution and reversal, keeping actions directly executable on device. On three agentic benchmarks under strict privacy settings, PAAC dominates the Pareto frontier of privacy and accuracy, improving average accuracy by 15-36\% and reducing average leakage by 2-6$\times$ over state-of-the-art device-cloud baselines, with the largest margins on privacy targets outside fixed entity taxonomies. We find consistent improvements on 17 additional benchmarks spanning 10 domains, including math, science, and finance.

</details>


### [60] [FedGMI: Generative Model-Driven Federated Learning for Probabilistic Mixture Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08760)
*Qijun Hou,Yuchen Shi,Pingyi Fan,Khaled B. Letaief*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FedGMI框架，利用VAE估计客户端数据分布的混合成分，在保护隐私的同时实现结构化个性化联邦学习，有效处理数据异构性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CFL受簇内异构限制，PFL忽略客户端间结构相似性，缺乏对数据分布概率混合结构的建模方法。

Method: 将每个客户端本地数据分布建模为多个共享固有分布的凸组合，利用VAE作为生成密度估计器来表征固有分布并推断混合成分。

Result: 有效表征和区分固有分布，准确估计混合比例，在通信成本约束下仍保持鲁棒性能。

Conclusion: FedGMI实现了结构化个性化与协作学习优势的兼顾，为异构联邦学习提供了新范式。

Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) facilitates collaborative model training across decentralized clients while preserving data privacy by avoiding raw data exchange. Despite its potential, FL performance is often compromised by data heterogeneity across clients. To address this, Clustered Federated Learning (CFL) groups clients with similar data distributions to improve model performance, but constrained by intra-cluster heterogeneity. Conversely, Personalized Federated Learning (PFL) tailors models to individual clients, but usually neglects the underlying structural similarities among clients. In this work, we investigate a probabilistic mixture (PM) scenario, where each client's local data distribution is modeled as a convex combination of several shared inherent distributions. To effectively model this structure, we propose FedGMI, a framework that utilizes Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) as generative density estimators to represent these inherent distributions and infer the mixture components of clients' local data distributions. This approach enables structured personalization without sacrificing the benefits of collaborative learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedGMI effectively characterizes and discriminate the inherent distributions, as well as accurately estimates mixture proportions. Furthermore, FedGMI maintains robust performance even under communication cost constraints.

</details>


### [61] [Metal-Sci: A Scientific Compute Benchmark for Evolutionary LLM Kernel Search on Apple Silicon](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09708)
*Víctor Gallego*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Metal-Sci 是一个包含 10 个科学计算任务的 Apple Silicon Metal 内核基准测试，覆盖 6 种优化场景。该基准测试配套了轻量级自动搜索框架，利用 LLM 驱动的 (1+1) 进化搜索来自动优化 GPU 内核。作者在 M1 Pro 上测试了 Claude、Gemini 和 GPT 模型，发现分布内加速比可达 1.00× 到 10.7×。核心方法论贡献是提出了一个留出评分函数 Φ_𝒯，作为廉价的机械监督原语，能检测分布内评分无法发现的静默回归（如 GPT 的 FFT3D 在分布内 2.95× 加速但在 256³ 留出数据上降至 0.23×）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学计算中 GPU 内核的手动优化耗时且易错，现有自动优化方法缺乏标准化的跨领域基准和可扩展的验证机制，特别是难以检测在未见过的规模上性能崩溃的静默回归问题。

Method: 构建了 Metal-Sci 基准（10 个任务，6 个优化领域），配套 CPU 参考实现和基于 Roofline 模型的适应度函数。设计了轻量级搜索框架，通过 LLM 驱动 (1+1) 进化循环，运行时编译候选内核并用 Roofline 评分，同时将编译诊断和正确性信息反馈给 LLM。提出留出评分函数 Φ_𝒯 作为最终验证的机械监督机制。

Result: 在 M1 Pro 上对 Claude Opus 4.7、Gemini 3.1 Pro 和 GPT 5.5 进行评测，分布内自加速比范围为 1.00× 到 10.7×。留出评分成功检测到多个静默回归案例，包括 FFT3D 内核在留出规模上从 2.95× 加速比崩溃至 0.23×。

Conclusion: 留出评分函数 Φ_𝒯 是一种廉价且有效的机械监督原语，能够捕捉跨规模泛化失败的案例，弥补了仅依赖分布内评分的局限性，为 LLM 驱动的自动内核搜索提供了可靠的验证机制。

Abstract: We present Metal-Sci, a 10-task benchmark of scientific Apple Silicon Metal compute kernels spanning six optimization regimes (stencils, all-pairs in $n$-body problems, multi-field Boltzmann, neighbor-list molecular dynamics, multi-kernel PDE, FFT). Each task ships a CPU reference, a roofline-anchored fitness function, and a held-out generalization size. We pair the benchmark with a lightweight harness for automatic kernel search that runtime-compiles each candidate, scores it against the roofline across multiple sizes, and feeds structured compile and per-size correctness diagnostics back to a frozen LLM driving a $(1{+}1)$ evolutionary loop. We report matched single-model sweeps of Claude Opus 4.7, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT 5.5 on M1 Pro: in-distribution self-speedups span $1.00\times$ to $10.7\times$. Beyond raw speedup, our central methodological claim is structural: the held-out gate scoring function $Φ_\mathcal{T}$ (evaluated once at end-of-run on a configuration the agent never sees during search) functions as a cheap mechanical oversight primitive on this automatic search loop, catching e.g. an Opus template <uint D> HMC win that returns wrong samples at unseen dimensions, and a GPT FFT3D best that wins in-distribution at $2.95\times$ speedup but collapses to $0.23\times$ on a $256^3$ held-out cube, a silent regression that the in-distribution score alone cannot see. Code at https://github.com/vicgalle/metal-sci-kernels

</details>


### [62] [DP-LAC: Lightweight Adaptive Clipping for Differentially Private Federated Fine-tuning of Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10272)
*Haaris Mehmood,Jie Xu,Karthikeyan Saravanan,Rogier Van Dalen,Mete Ozay*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DP-LAC方法，通过私有直方图估计初始化裁剪阈值，并在训练中自适应调整阈值，无需消耗额外隐私预算或引入新超参数，相比现有方法平均准确率提升6.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习中的差分隐私SGD（DP-SGD）需要裁剪梯度阈值C，现有自适应裁剪方法需要繁琐的超参数调优，且会侵蚀隐私预算。因此需要一种无需额外隐私开销且能自动调整阈值的方法。

Method: DP-LAC首先利用私有直方图估计在最优阈值的一个数量级范围内估算初始裁剪阈值，然后在训练过程中自适应调整该阈值，且不消耗额外隐私预算，也不引入新的超参数。

Result: 相比现有最先进的自适应裁剪方法和原始DP-SGD，DP-LAC平均准确率提升6.6%。

Conclusion: DP-LAC在保护隐私的同时有效提升了模型性能，且避免了传统自适应裁剪方法的隐私预算消耗和超参数调优问题。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables the collaborative training of large-scale language models (LLMs) across edge devices while keeping user data on-device. However, FL still exposes sensitive information through client-provided gradients. Differentially private stochastic gradient descent (DP-SGD) mitigates this risk by clipping each client's contribution to a threshold $C$ and adding noise proportional to $C$. Existing adaptive clipping techniques dynamically adjust $C$ but demand tedious hyperparameter tuning, which can erode the privacy budget. In this paper, we introduce DP-LAC, a method that first estimates an initial clipping threshold within an order of magnitude of the optimum using private histogram estimation, and then adapts this threshold during training without consuming additional privacy budget or introducing new hyperparameters. Empirical results show that DP-LAC outperforms both state-of-the-art adaptive clipping methods and vanilla DP-SGD, achieving an average accuracy gain of $6.6\%$.

</details>


### [63] [Reinforcement learning for inverse structural design and rapid laser cutting of kirigami prototypes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08098)
*Milad Yazdani,Shahriar Shalileh,Dena Shahriari*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出RL-Kirigami框架，结合最优传输条件流匹配（OT-CFM）与强化学习（GRPO），实现可重构平行四边形四边剪纸超材料的逆设计。在程序生成的目标形状上，单次采样达到94.2% sIoU，GRPO提升至94.91%，同时正则化使TV(x)从0.95降至0.81。生成布局可直接用于激光切割制造。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 剪纸超材料虽然制造灵活，但其逆设计面临非线性展开、离散兼容性约束、避免重叠等难题，现有方法难以高效生成有效切割布局。

Method: 采用OT-CFM作为生成先验，结合GRPO强化学习优化不可微奖励（轮廓匹配、可行性、比率场正则性），并通过marching解码器保证全局几何兼容性。

Result: 单次采样达94.2% sIoU（远超求解器基线），GRPO提升至94.91%；加入正则化后TV(x)从0.95降至0.81，sIoU保持94.83%；原型制造仅需8.0±1.0分钟。

Conclusion: 证明了制造感知的逆设计工作流在硬几何可行性约束下的有效性，为剪纸超材料的自动化设计开辟了新路径。

Abstract: Kirigami is an increasingly useful fabrication method to produce shape-programmable metamaterial structures. However, inverse design remains difficult because deployment is nonlinear, and feasible cut layouts must satisfy discrete compatibility rules, avoid overlap, and map one target shape to valid designs. We present RL-Kirigami, an inverse design framework that combines optimal-transport conditional flow matching (OT-CFM) with reinforcement learning to generate compatible ratio fields for compact reconfigurable parallelogram quad kirigami. A marching decoder enforces global geometric compatibility, and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) aligns the generator with nondifferentiable rewards for silhouette matching, feasibility, and ratio-field regularity. Across procedurally generated target shape instances, a single sample from the pretrained OT-CFM prior reached $94.2%$ sIoU and outperformed solver baselines while reducing forward simulator evaluations from hundreds to 1. GRPO improved accuracy to $94.91%$ sIoU and, with regularity included, reduced $\mathrm{TV}(\mathbf{x})$ from 0.95 to 0.81 while maintaining $94.83%$ sIoU. Generated layouts were exported to DXF and laser-cut in $50~μ\mathrm{m}$ polymeric sheets to produce deployable prototypes in $8.0 \pm 1.0$ minutes per part. These results support a manufacturing-aware inverse design workflow for deployable kirigami metamaterials under hard geometric feasibility constraints.

</details>


### [64] [Path-Based Gradient Boosting for Graph-Level Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08102)
*Claudio Meggio,Johan Pensar,Riccardo De Bin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PathBoost是一种基于梯度树提升的图分类与回归方法，通过从图结构中直接学习判别性路径特征，在多个基准数据集上与图神经网络和图核方法相比表现出竞争力，尤其在节点数较多的图上性能更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对此前方法仅适用于特定化学应用场景的问题，提出一种通用的基于路径特征的梯度提升方法，使其适应二分类、多属性图以及自动锚点选择，以提升图级别预测任务的性能。

Method: 在梯度提升框架下，引入逻辑损失函数支持二分类；通过前缀分解将多个节点和边属性融入路径特征空间；基于类别属性多样性自动选择锚点节点，无需用户指定路径起点。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上，PathBoost在半数数据集上取得优于图神经网络和图核方法的结果，其余数据集上性能相当；在节点数较多的图上表现更好。

Conclusion: 基于路径的梯度提升方法能够与更复杂的黑盒模型（如图神经网络）相竞争，展示了路径特征在图级别任务中的有效性。

Abstract: We propose PathBoost, a gradient tree boosting method for graph-level classification and regression that learns discriminative path-based features directly from the input graph structure. Building on a previous work, which was tailored to a specific chemistry application, PathBoost introduces three key extensions: (i) adaptation to binary classification through gradient boosting with a logistic loss, (ii) incorporation of multiple node and edge attributes into the path feature space via a prefix-based decomposition, and (iii) automatic anchor node selection based on categorical attribute diversity, eliminating the need for the user to specify the starting point of the considered path features. We compared PathBoost to graph neural networks and graph kernel approaches on several benchmark datasets, obtaining better results in half of them, and comparable results in the rest. PathBoost shows better performances on graphs with larger average node counts. Overall, the results demonstrate that path-based boosting methods can be competitive with more complex black-box approaches.

</details>


### [65] [Distributional Reinforcement Learning via the Cramér Distance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08104)
*Vanya Aziz,Ivo Nowak,E. M. T Hendrix*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出C-DSAC算法，将Soft Actor-Critic与分布强化学习结合，使用Cramér距离进行分布学习，在复杂机器人任务中超越基线方法，并通过置信度驱动的Q值更新机制解释了其性能优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索SAC算法在分布强化学习中的应用，解决传统方法在复杂环境中性能不足的问题，并深入理解分布强化学习的算法机制。

Method: 采用Cramér-based分布强化学习来表示状态-动作值，最小化平方Cramér距离进行分布学习，并结合SAC框架实现C-DSAC算法。

Result: 在多个机器人基准测试中，C-DSAC超越了基线SAC和现有的分布方法，且在高度复杂环境中性能优势更为显著。

Conclusion: C-DSAC的优越性能部分源于置信度驱动的Q值更新机制：高方差目标分布（低置信度）导致更保守的模型更新，减少过高估计的影响，加深了对分布强化学习中收敛性和值估计机制的理解。

Abstract: This paper explores the application of the Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) algorithm within a Distributional Reinforcement Learning setting and introduces an implementation of such algorithm named Cramér-based Distributional Soft Actor-Critic (C-DSAC). The novel approach employs distributional reinforcement learning to represent state-action values, and minimizes the squared Cramér distance for learning the distribution. Empirical results across various robotic benchmarks indicate that our algorithm surpasses the performance of baseline SAC and contemporary distributional methods, with the performance advantage becoming increasingly pronounced in high-complexity environments. To explain the efficiency of the new approach, we conduct an analysis showing that its superior performance is partly due to \textit{confidence-driven} Q-value updates: High-variance target distributions (low confidence in target) lead to more conservative model updates, thereby attenuating the impact of overestimated values. This work deepens the understanding of distributional reinforcement learning, offering insights into the algorithmic mechanisms governing convergence and value estimation.

</details>


### [66] [Geometry-free prediction of inertial lift forces in microfluidic devices using deep learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08109)
*Jesse Ward-Bond,Ali Mashadian,Timothy C. Y. Chan,Edmond W. K. Young*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种不依赖显式几何参数的神经网络模型，用于预测惯性微流控器件中的粒子升力，该模型能有效泛化到未见过的通道几何形状，并可用于粒子追踪模拟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器学习模型虽能加速惯性微流控器件模拟，但需要为每种通道截面类型单独训练模型，将计算负担从模拟阶段转移到了训练阶段，缺乏泛化能力。

Method: 提出一种不含显式几何参数的新参数集，训练神经网络模型来预测粒子升力，使模型能够泛化到未见过的通道几何形状。

Result: 所提模型在训练集上的性能与现有模型相当，但在未见过的通道几何形状上具有更强的泛化能力；可轻松迁移到粒子追踪模拟软件中，预测结果与文献一致。

Conclusion: 该方法消除了对不同通道截面类型单独训练的需求，实现了跨几何形状的迁移能力，为惯性微流控模拟提供了更高效、更具泛化性的解决方案。

Abstract: Inertial microfluidic devices (IMDs) offer low-cost, high-throughput alternative techniques for many traditional particle- (or cell-) manipulation tasks, but simulating them requires being able to predict particle migration, and thus particle lift forces, under a variety of possible channel geometries. Recent work has demonstrated that machine learning models can be used to drastically speed up these numerical simulations, but doing so required training individual models for every unique channel cross-section type (e.g., rectangular, triangular) -- shifting the burden from the simulation step to the training step. In this paper, we develop a novel approach for predicting particle lift forces that contains no explicit geometric parameters. We train a neural network model using a new parameter set and show that while it performs comparably to existing models on channel geometries in the training set, it is able to generalize to unseen channel geometries far more effectively. We show that the lift force model developed herein can be easily transferred to particle tracing simulation software, where it is capable of predicting particle migration patterns consistent with the literature across a variety of channel designs.

</details>


### [67] [BaLoRA: Bayesian Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Scale Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08110)
*Dario Coscia,Sindy Löwe,Max Welling*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BaLoRA 是一种贝叶斯扩展的 LoRA 方法，通过输入自适应的贝叶斯参数化引入少量参数和计算，不仅提升了预测准确性、缩小了与全参数微调的差距，还能提供良好校准的不确定性估计，在MOF带隙预测任务中优于LoRA集成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LoRA 作为低秩点估计方法，表达能力有限，与全参数微调存在精度差距，且缺乏内置的不确定性量化，无法应用于对可靠性要求高的场景。

Method: 在 LoRA 矩阵上引入贝叶斯参数化，采用输入自适应的方式，以极少的额外参数和计算开销实现贝叶斯推断，通过自适应噪声注入提升预测性能。

Result: 在自然语言推理和视觉任务上缩小了与全参数微调的精度差距；在MOF带隙预测任务中，零样本测试时不确定性估计与模型误差的相关性优于训练后的LoRA集成，且随计算量单调改善，不牺牲准确性。

Conclusion: 贝叶斯扩展不仅带来了良好校准的不确定性估计，其背后的自适应噪声注入机制还能显著提升预测精度，使 LoRA 在可靠性和准确性之间取得更好的平衡。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become the standard for fine-tuning large pre-trained models at reduced computational cost. However, its low-rank point-estimate updates limit expressiveness, leave a persistent gap relative to full fine-tuning accuracy, and provide no built-in uncertainty quantification, limiting its applicability in settings where reliability matters as much as accuracy. We introduce BaLoRA, a Bayesian extension of LoRA with a novel input-adaptive Bayesian parameterization of LoRA matrices that adds minimal parameters and compute. Surprisingly, not only does the Bayesian extension yield well-calibrated uncertainty estimates, but the adaptive noise injection underlying our approach also significantly improves prediction accuracy, narrowing the gap with full fine-tuning across both natural language reasoning and vision tasks. When applied to band gap prediction in metal-organic frameworks, BaLoRA produces zero-shot test-time uncertainty estimates that correlate more strongly with model error than a trained ensemble of LoRA models, and improve monotonically with compute without sacrificing accuracy.

</details>


### [68] [TTCD:Transformer Integrated Temporal Causal Discovery from Non-Stationary Time Series Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08111)
*Omar Faruque,Sahara Ali,Xue Zheng,Jianwu Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TTCD框架，一种基于Transformer的端到端方法，用于从非平稳时间序列中学习同期和滞后因果关系，通过重构引导的因果信号蒸馏和因果结构学习器，在合成、基准和真实数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果发现方法在处理非平稳、非线性、噪声大的时间序列数据时存在局限：基于约束的方法依赖条件独立检验，在有限样本下表现不佳；基于评分的方法统计假设过强；近期方法只能处理特例（如变化点检测）而缺乏统一解决方案。

Method: 提出TTCD框架，包含三个核心组件：1）非平稳特征学习器，融合时域和频域注意力机制与动态非平稳性分析；2）重构引导的因果信号蒸馏，通过Transformer解码器的重构过程过滤噪声和虚假相关；3）因果结构学习器，对蒸馏后的重构信号进行因果图推断，无需对噪声分布或数据生成过程施加严格假设。

Result: 在合成、基准测试和真实世界数据集上的实验表明，TTCD在准确性和与领域知识的一致性方面持续优于现有最先进基线方法。

Conclusion: TTCD为具有挑战性的真实世界非平稳时间序列因果发现提供了有效且统一的解决方案。

Abstract: The widespread availability of complex time series data in various domains such as environmental science, epidemiology, and economics demands robust causal discovery methods that can identify intricate contemporaneous and lagged relationships in non-stationary, nonlinear, and noisy settings. Existing constraint-based methods often rely heavily on conditional independence tests that degrade for limited data samples and complex distributions, while score-based methods impose strong statistical assumptions. Recent methods address special cases such as change point detection or distribution shifts, but struggle to provide a unified solution. We propose the Transformer Integrated Temporal Causal Discovery (TTCD) Framework, a novel end-to-end approach that learns contemporaneous and lagged causal relations from non-stationary time series. TTCD introduces a Non-Stationary Feature Learner integrating temporal and frequency-domain attention with dynamic non-stationarity profiling, and a custom Causal Structure Learner. A key innovation is reconstruction-guided causal signal distillation, to distill essential causal signals through the reconstruction process of the transformer decoder, which mitigates noise and spurious correlations while preserving meaningful dependencies. The Causal Structure Learner operates on distilled reconstructed signals to infer the underlying causal graph without restrictive assumptions on noise distributions or data generation processes. Experiments on synthetic, benchmark, and real world datasets show that TTCD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both accuracy and consistency with domain knowledge, demonstrating the approach's effectiveness for causal discovery in challenging real world contexts.

</details>


### [69] [Do Foundation Model Embeddings Improve Cross-Country Crop Yield Generalisation? A Leave-One-Country-Out Evaluation in Sub-Saharan Africa](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08113)
*Yaw Osei Adjei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文评估了地理空间基础模型（Prithvi-EO-1.0-100M 和 ViT-Base）在跨国小农玉米产量预测中的泛化能力。基于五个非洲国家的 6,404 个田间观测数据，采用留一国交叉验证方法，结果显示所有特征集在跨国预测中均表现不佳（R² 负值），冻结的 Prithvi-EO 嵌入相比传统光谱特征无优势，主要局限在于国家间的产量分布偏移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有小农玉米产量预测基准多基于国内交叉验证，高估了模型在跨国场景下的泛化能力，而撒哈拉以南非洲的粮食安全规划依赖准确的跨国预测。

Method: 采用留一国交叉验证方案，在五个非洲国家共 6,404 个玉米田块观测数据上，比较 Prithvi-EO-1.0-100M、ViT-Base 两种地理空间基础模型嵌入与传统 Sentinel-2 光谱特征的预测性能。

Result: 国内随机交叉验证取得中等 R²，但所有特征集在跨国测试中均表现极差（R² 为负值）。冻结的 Prithvi-EO 嵌入相比传统光谱特征无显著优势。

Conclusion: 跨国预测的主要限制在于国家间的产量分布偏移，而非表示质量；本文发布了一个可复现的负面基准，供未来研究参考。

Abstract: Accurate predictions of smallholder maize yields across national boundaries are critical for food security planning in sub-Saharan Africa, yet most published benchmarks report within-country performance that overstates true generalisability. This paper evaluates whether geospatial foundation model embeddings, specifically Prithvi-EO-1.0-100M and ViT-Base, outperform traditional Sentinel-2 spectral features under a Leave-One-Country-Out cross-validation scheme on 6,404 maize field observations from five African countries. The results show a clear generalisability gap: within-country random cross-validation yields moderate R^2 values, but all feature sets perform poorly under cross-country testing, with universally negative R^2. Frozen Prithvi-EO embeddings provide no meaningful advantage over engineered spectral features for cross-country prediction in this setting. The paper argues that the main limitation is a shift in yield distribution between countries rather than representation quality and releases a reproducible negative benchmark for future work.

</details>


### [70] [Statistical Inference and Quality Measures of KV Cache Quantisations Inspired by TurboQuant](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08114)
*Paolo D'Alberto*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文在公平比特预算下分析了三种KV缓存量化方案，发现n=4时KQV方案全面最优，揭示了K-V非对称性，并解释了预算相关的交叉现象源于Jensen机制通过softmax的非线性放大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在LLM推理中，KV缓存量化至关重要。已有方案（如KQV、QKQV）各有优劣，但缺乏在统一公平比特预算下的系统对比和理论解释。本文旨在通过统计推断和信息度量，揭示不同量化策略的内在差异及其根源。

Method: 在公平比特预算下比较三种方案：KV（标量MSE基线）、KQV（对K用WHT+MSE，对V用WHT+MSE+QJL）、QKQV（对K和V均用WHT+MSE+QJL）。从超球面上的Beta分布出发，分析QJL对K内积方差的膨胀因子π/2，以及softmax通过Jensen不等式对非线性放大效应。使用KL散度、几何K误差、6D距离等指标进行实证评估。

Result: (1) n=4时KQV在所有指标上全面最优；(2) K-V非对称性无条件成立，QKQV在KL散度上始终劣于KQV；(3) 存在预算相关交叉：QKQV在n∈{2,3,5}时几何K重建更好，KQV在n∈{4,6}时更好。KL散度（仅与K相关）将K方向误差与路由退化和输出坍缩联系起来。

Conclusion: 提出了Jensen机制通过softmax超线性放大的充分条件。n∈{2,3,5}时QKQV几何胜出是因为该条件未生效；n=4时QKQV的K误差和KL散度升高强烈表明Jensen机制是交叉现象的操作性原因，为此提供了新的视角和解释。

Abstract: We analyse three KV cache quantization schemes under a fair bit budget: \textbf{KV} (scalar MSE baseline), \textbf{KQV} (WHT + MSE on $K$; WHT + MSE + QJL on $V$), and \textbf{QKQV} (WHT + MSE + QJL on both). Starting from the Beta distribution on the hypersphere, we trace how QJL on $K$ inflates inner product variance by $π/2$, which softmax amplifies nonlinearly via Jensen's inequality, and we present statistical inference and information metrics to highlight practical differences.
  Three empirical findings emerge. (1)~At $n=4$ (the practically dominant budget), KQV wins on every measure -- KL divergence, geometric $K$ error, and 6D distance -- across all distributions and ranks tested. (2)~The K--V asymmetry is unconditional: QKQV is consistently worse than KQV in KL divergence at every budget and distribution. (3)~A budget-dependent crossover exists: QKQV achieves better geometric $K$ reconstruction at $n \in \{2,3,5\}$, KQV at $n \in \{4,6\}$, invariant to rank and tail weight -- an open rate-distortion problem.
  $\mathrm{KL}(p_{\mathrm{ref}} \| p_{\mathrm{quant}})$, K-only by construction, bridges K direction error to routing corruption and output collapse. We present a sufficient condition when the Jensen mechanism amplifies superlinearly through the softmax. At $n \in \{2,3,5\}$, QKQV wins geometrically because this assumption does not bind. At $n=4$, elevated K error and KL divergence for QKQV strongly suggest the Jensen mechanism is the operative cause of the crossover, providing a new perspective and explanation.

</details>


### [71] [The Safety-Aware Denoiser for Text Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08116)
*Amman Yusuf,Zhejun Jiang,Mijung Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出安全感知去噪器（SAD），通过在文本扩散模型的去噪过程中引入安全引导，将最终文本生成导向可证明的安全区域，无需重新训练模型即可有效降低不安全生成，同时保持生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文本扩散模型在非自回归生成方面有潜力，但现有安全方法主要针对自回归模型，采用事后过滤或推理时干预，无法有效应对文本扩散模型的安全风险。

Method: 提出Safety-Aware Denoiser (SAD)，在迭代去噪过程中修改采样路径，将最终文本样本引导至可证明安全的文本空间区域，是一种推理时方法，无需重新训练扩散模型。

Result: 在危害分类、记忆化和越狱攻击等评估中，SAD显著减少了不安全生成，同时保持了生成质量、多样性和流畅性，优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 去噪过程中的安全引导为文本扩散模型提供了一种有效且可扩展的安全约束机制。

Abstract: Recent work on text diffusion models offers a promising alternative to autoregressive generation, but controlling their safety remains underexplored. Existing safety approaches are geared toward autoregressive models and typically rely on post-hoc filtering or inference-time interventions. These are inadequate for effectively addressing safety risks in text diffusion models. We propose the Safety-Aware Denoiser (SAD), a safety-guidance framework in text diffusion models. The SAD modifies the iterative denoising process such that the text sample at the final denoising step is steered toward provably safe regions of the text space. This inference-time method can integrate safety constraints into the denoiser, avoiding computationally expensive retraining of the underlying diffusion model and enabling flexible, lightweight safety guidance. We evaluate the safety of the generated text using the SAD, with respect to hazard taxonomy, memorization, and jailbreak. Experimental results show that SAD substantially reduces unsafe generations while preserving generation quality, diversity, and fluency, outperforming existing methods. These results demonstrate that our safety guidance during denoising provides an effective and scalable mechanism for enforcing safety in text diffusion models.

</details>


### [72] [Feature Repulsion and Spectral Lock-in: An Empirical Study of Two-Layer Network Grokking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08119)
*Yongzhong Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文验证了Tian (2025)提出的排斥定理在模加法任务中的可观测性，发现特征排斥的符号结构普遍成立，但其谱特征强烈依赖于激活函数：x²激活下可检测到清晰的谱信号（秩2），而ReLU下无效（秩1），揭示了"结构-机制"的解离现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Tian (2025)的理论虽预言了特征排斥机制，但未明确其在实验中何时可观测，也未说明该机制是否会在参数更新中留下可测量的谱特征。本文旨在通过实验填补这一空白。

Method: 在Tian的模加法实验设置（M=71, K=2048, MSE损失）上，分别使用x²和ReLU激活函数，分析前200个最相似特征对的符号匹配率，并监控参数更新ΔW的滚动特征间隙σ₂/σ₃。

Result: 符号结构：两种激活函数下均高度吻合（x²: 0.865→0.985, ReLU: 饱和至1.000）；谱特征：x²下检测器在15/15个grokking种子中于epoch 174触发（秩2），非grokking控制组0/15触发；ReLU下从未触发（秩1）。

Conclusion: 特征排斥的符号结构依赖$\widetilde{F}^\top\widetilde{F}$，普适成立；但排斥力能否转化为可观测的谱信号，关键取决于激活函数的导数σ'。这揭示了"结构"（符号规则）与"机制"（谱特征）之间的解离，验证了Tian关于聚焦（幂律）与扩散（ReLU）记忆的理论区分。

Abstract: Tian (2025) proves a repulsion theorem (Theorem 6) for the matrix $ B = (\widetilde{F}^\top \widetilde{F} + ηI)^{-1} $ during the interactive feature-learning stage of grokking: similar features have negative off-diagonal entries $ B_{j\ell} $, producing an effective repulsive force that drives them apart. However, the theorem does not specify when this mechanism becomes empirically observable, nor whether it leaves a measurable spectral signature in the parameter updates. We test this directly on Tian's modular addition setup ($ M = 71 $, $ K = 2048 $, MSE loss) and observe a clear structure-mechanism dissociation. The predicted sign rule holds robustly on the top-200 most-similar feature pairs across activations (empirical sign-match rising from 0.865 to 0.985 on $ σ= x^2 $ across 5 seeds, and saturating at 1.000 on $ σ= \operatorname{ReLU} $). However, the spectral signature in the parameter updates is strongly activation-dependent. With $ σ= x^2 $, a simple slope detector on the rolling eigengap $ σ_2 / σ_3 $ of $ ΔW $ fires in 15/15 grokking seeds at epoch 174 (IQR [173,174]) and in 0/15 non-grokking controls, with 229$ \times $ late-stage magnitude separation; the spectrum is rank-2. In contrast, with $ σ= \operatorname{ReLU} $, the detector never fires and the spectrum remains effectively rank-1. This dissociation aligns with Tian's Theorem 5 distinction between focused (power-law) and spreading (ReLU) memorization: while the sign structure of $ B $ depends only on $ \widetilde{F}^\top \widetilde{F} $, how feature repulsion translates into weight updates critically depends on the activation derivative $ σ' $.

</details>


### [73] [Block-Wise Differentiable Sinkhorn Attention: Tail-Refinement Gradients with a Gap-Aware Dustbin Bridge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08123)
*Dylan Forde*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在TPU上实现长上下文平衡熵最优传输(OT)注意力的方法，通过固定深度尾细化代理实现高效后向传播。理论证明了R=2情况下的精确调度，在Pfam数据集上实现了端到端训练，重构损失从3.17降至0.99。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决长上下文场景下平衡熵最优传输注意力在TPU硬件上的高效计算问题，特别是后向传播的精确性和计算效率。

Method: 采用停止基步+固定深度尾细化代理方法：先进行T步Sinkhorn求解后停止，再展开短细化尾并精确微分该代理。针对R=2生产情况，证明后向传播包含四个阶梯规划因子，并推导出精确的单参考块调度方案。

Result: 在TPU v6e-8上，Pfam屏幕任务端到端完成，平衡R=2运行在三小时预算内达到约8.5样本/秒（step 1437）。测试分片重构从3.17提升至0.99，稀疏交叉熵从5.86降至5.69。合成掩码问题上的优化核与精确自动微分误差在10^-5至10^-10之间。

Conclusion: 验证了精确固定深度后向传播理论、与理论匹配的gap感知桥接路径，以及生产路径的可训练性。

Abstract: We study long-context balanced entropic optimal transport (OT) attention on TPU hardware through a stopped-base, fixed-depth tail-refinement surrogate. After a stopped $T$-step Sinkhorn solve, we unroll a short refinement tail and differentiate that surrogate exactly. For the production $R=2$ case, the backward pass contains four staircase plan factors. We prove an exact one-reference-tile schedule: the $R=2$ score cotangent is a single reference plan tile times an explicit modifier field built from vector cotangents and dual differences. This yields block-wise cost $O((T+R)LW)$, $O(Ld)$ input storage, and $O(L)$ additional HBM usage for fixed head dimension $d$ and band width $W$. We also formalize the current \texttt{dustbin\_block} path as the same balanced surrogate on an augmented support, so the schedule lifts to the gap-aware transport path used in our TPU runs. We provide a local surrogate-bias bound, an a posteriori bias certificate, and a projective contraction certificate for strictly positive active blocks. On synthetic masked problems, the optimized kernel matches exact autodiff of the same centered surrogate to within $10^{-5}$--$10^{-10}$. On TPU v6e-8, a four-configuration Pfam screen completes end-to-end, and a promoted balanced $R=2$ run sustains roughly $8.5$ examples per second through a three-hour budget, reaching step $1437$. Held-out Pfam test shards improve reconstruction from $3.17$ to $0.99$ and sparse CE from $5.86$ to $5.69$ relative to step $0$. These results support exact fixed-depth backward theory, a theorem-matching gap-aware bridge, and trainability evidence for the production path.

</details>


### [74] [Towards Universal Gene Regulatory Network Inference: Unlocking Generalizable Regulatory Knowledge in Single-cell Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08128)
*Jiaxin Qi,Hang Li,Yan Cui,Yuhua Zheng,Jianqiang Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现现有单细胞基础模型在基因调控网络推断中表现不佳，原因是重建式预训练目标未能捕捉调控信号。作者提出了新的基准测试和两种方法（虚拟值扰动、梯度轨迹），从模型中蒸馏调控知识，显著超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单细胞基础模型虽在转录组编码上有突破，但在GRN推断任务中表现远不如预期，主要因为标准预训练目标无法显式捕获潜在的调控信号。作者希望解锁基础模型中隐含的调控知识。

Method: 1. 提出GRN泛化基准测试，评估模型在未见基因和数据集上的零样本预测能力；2. 提出Virtual Value Perturbation（虚拟值扰动）和Gradient Trajectory（梯度轨迹）两种方法，从预训练模型中蒸馏可泛化的基因间特征。

Result: 所提方法在跨基因、跨数据集的GRN推断中显著优于现有方法，建立了利用单细胞基础模型进行通用GRN推断的新范式。

Conclusion: 通过专门设计的蒸馏方法可以有效解锁单细胞基础模型中的调控知识，为通用GRN推断提供了新的可行路径。

Abstract: Gene Regulatory Network (GRN) inference is essential for understanding complex cellular mechanisms, rendered tractable through single-cell transcriptomic data. With the emergence of single-cell Foundation Models (scFMs), enhanced transcriptomic encoding is widely expected to revolutionize GRN inference.
