Abstract: Generative modelling is a demanding test of foundation models, because it requires robust, holistic representation learning for a given data modality, rather than optimisation for a supervised prediction target alone. While recent work on tabular foundation models has achieved remarkable progress in predictive modelling, generative tabular foundation models remain underexplored. Existing tabular foundation generators, in particular, have not yet consistently matched strong dataset-specific generators in synthetic data quality. A key reason is their misalignment with the distinctive causal structural prior of heterogeneous tabular data. In this paper, we address this gap by introducing a novel tabular foundation model, \textbf{TabFORGE}, built on pretrained \textbf{Tab}ular \textbf{FO}undational \textbf{R}epresentations for \textbf{GE}neration. TabFORGE is designed to utilise the implicitly learned causal information underlying diverse tabular datasets in a unified latent space induced by a pretrained causality-aware feature encoder. It further decouples latent modelling from decoding through a two-stage design: we first pretrain a score-based diffusion transformer, and then pretrain a denoising-aligned decoder using the denoised latent embeddings. This design elegantly mitigates the distribution shifts in latent embeddings that typically arise between training and inference. We evaluate TabFORGE comprehensively against 22 benchmark methods on 45 real-world datasets. Our results show that TabFORGE effectively learns and leverages generalisable tabular representations, enabling efficient generation of high-quality synthetic tabular data, particularly with strong structural fidelity.

</details>


### [330] [FedCIGAR: A Personalized Reconstruction Approach for Federated Graph-level Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09428)
*Yunfeng Zhao,Yixin Liu,Qingfeng Chen,Shiyuan Li,Yue Tan,Shirui Pan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种联邦图级异常检测方法FedCIGAR，通过基于正常图的重建范式、客户端节点贡献门控机制和服务器端滑动窗口聚类策略，解决了现有方法依赖合成异常和数据异构性导致的泛化性差、个性化不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦图级异常检测方法存在两大问题：(1) 依赖不真实的合成异常数据，导致模型泛化能力差；(2) 在数据异构场景下个性化能力不足。

Method: (1) 采用基于正常图的重建范式，避免使用合成异常数据；(2) 客户端引入节点贡献门控机制；(3) 服务器端设计基于滑动窗口的聚类策略，以应对数据异构性。

Result: 在大量实验上，FedCIGAR相比现有最先进方法展现出更优的性能和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: FedCIGAR有效解决了联邦图级异常检测中的泛化性和个性化挑战，为隐私保护下的分布式图异常检测提供了新的有效方案。

Abstract: Graph-level anomaly detection (GLAD) is crucial for ensuring the reliability of graph-driven applications by identifying abnormal graphs that deviate from the majority. Considering the privacy concerns in distributed scenarios, federated graph-level anomaly detection (FedGLAD) has emerged as a promising solution to enable collaborative detection without sharing raw data. However, existing methods suffer from poor generalization due to the reliance on unrealistic synthetic anomalies and insufficient personalization capabilities under data heterogeneity. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Federated graph-level anomaly detection approach with Cluster-adaptIve GAted Reconstruction (FedCIGAR). Specifically, we design a reconstruction-based paradigm trained on normal graphs to avoid synthetic data. Furthermore, we introduce a client-side node contribution gating mechanism and a server-side sliding window-based clustering strategy to tackle data heterogeneity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedCIGAR achieves superior performance and robustness in contrast to state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [331] [fmxcoders: Factorized Masked Crosscoders for Cross-Layer Feature Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09438)
*Andreas D. Demou,Panagiotis Koromilas,James Oldfield,Yannis Panagakis,Mihalis A. Nicolaou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现标准Crosscoders未能有效提取跨层特征（每个潜变量平均仅由1-2层驱动），并提出了fmxcoders：通过低秩张量分解和随机层掩码正则化，在多个大模型上将探测F1提升10-30点、MSE降低25-50%、功能连贯性翻倍，并恢复3-13倍语义连贯的潜变量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练Transformer中的许多特征跨越多个层（通过推理阶段涌现、在残差流中持续存在或由并行MLP共同构建），标准Crosscoders因参数化和正则化两方面的结构限制，未能有效恢复这些跨层特征，其学习到的潜变量主要被单层或两层驱动。

Method: 提出fmxcoders，包含两个改进：(i) 用低秩张量分解替换编码器和解码器，将每个潜变量的逐层权重从共享的跨层基中提取；(ii) 应用随机层掩码（stochastic layer masking）作为沿层轴的去噪正则化，惩罚那些在单层被掩码时贡献崩溃的潜变量。

Result: 在GPT2-Small、Pythia-410M、Pythia-1.4B和Gemma2-2B上：探测F1提升10-30点，超越标准Crosscoders无法达到的逐层SAE基线；重建MSE降低25-50%；功能连贯性均值翻倍；LLM-as-a-judge评估显示恢复3-13倍语义连贯的潜变量。

Conclusion: 标准Crosscoders因结构限制（无约束的跨层参数化和未正则化的跨层依赖）无法有效提取跨层特征，而fmxcoders通过低秩张量分解和随机层掩码正则化成功克服了这些限制，显著提升了跨层特征提取的质量和可解释性。

Abstract: Many features in pretrained Transformers span multiple layers: they emerge through stages of inference, persist in the residual stream, or are built jointly by parallel MLPs. Crosscoders (namely, sparse dictionaries trained jointly across layers) aim to recover these cross-layer features in a single shared latent space. We show that standard crosscoders largely fail at this purpose. Although their decoder weight norms spread evenly across layers, a functional coherence metric we introduce reveals that each latent's activation is effectively driven by only one or two layers on average. While functionally coherent latents act as human-interpretable concept detectors (e.g., US states and cities), the layer-localized latents that crosscoders predominantly learn collapse onto surface-level patterns such as digit detectors. We trace this failure to two structural limitations: unconstrained cross-layer parameterization and unregularized cross-layer dependence. We address both by introducing fmxcoders, which (i) replace the encoder and decoder with low-rank tensor factorizations that draw every latent's per-layer weights from a shared cross-layer basis, and (ii) apply stochastic layer masking, a denoising regularizer along the layer axis that penalizes latents whose contribution collapses when a single layer is masked. Across GPT2-Small, Pythia-410M, Pythia-1.4B, and Gemma2-2B, fmxcoders lift mean probing F1 by 10-30 points, surpassing per-layer SAE baselines that standard crosscoders fail to reach, reduce reconstruction MSE by 25-50%, and roughly double mean functional coherence. An LLM-as-a-judge evaluation further shows that fmxcoders recover 3-13$\times$ more semantically coherent latents than standard crosscoders across all four base LLMs.

</details>


### [332] [Inverse Design for Conditional Distribution Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09439)
*Ori Meidler,Shaul Tolkovsky,Or Zuk*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出条件分布匹配（CDM）框架，解决生成模型中输入的条件分布与目标分布匹配的问题，并设计MLGD-F算法，无需额外训练即可实现高效的推理时分布匹配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统逆设计方法只针对点输出（pointwise）目标，但许多设计任务的目标是分布式的（distributional），即希望输入x诱导出的条件分布P(Y|X=x)与某个目标分布G(Y)匹配。现有方法无法处理这类分布级匹配问题。

Method: 提出CDM问题形式化定义（CDMS和CDMO两个变体），并设计MLGD-F算法：结合预训练的基于分数的扩散模型与预训练的快速条件采样器，通过单步条件采样实现可导的梯度计算，无需额外训练或微调。

Result: 在合成基准、结构化图像变换和生成编辑优化任务上验证，MLGD-F能可靠地恢复输入，使其条件分布匹配多种用户指定的目标分布（包括离散混合分布和连续低秩支撑分布）。

Conclusion: CDM框架拓展了逆设计问题的范畴，MLGD-F提供了一种高效、即插即用的推理时解决方案，在分布匹配任务上表现良好。

Abstract: Generative models are powerful tools for sampling from a learned distribution $\mathcal{P}(Y \mid X)$, and inverse-design methods invert this map to find an input $x$ that produces a desired point output $y^*$. However, many design goals are naturally distributional rather than pointwise, incorporating the inherent uncertainty of $Y$ and targeting a specific form for it, a task not addressed by standard inverse design. To address this issue we introduce Conditional Distribution Matching (CDM), a new inverse-design problem class in generative modeling: given a joint distribution $\mathcal{P}(X, Y)$ and a target distribution $\mathcal{G}(Y)$, find an input $x^*$ whose induced conditional distribution $\mathcal{P}(Y \mid X = x^*)$ matches $\mathcal{G}$. We formally define two variants: Conditional Distribution Matching Sampling (CDMS) and Conditional Distribution Matching Optimization (CDMO). To solve these problems, we propose MLGD-F (Matching-Loss Guided Diffusion with a Fast inner sampler), a plug-and-play inference-time algorithm that combines a pretrained score-based diffusion model with a pretrained fast conditional sampler, requiring no additional training or fine-tuning. By leveraging single-step conditional sampling, MLGD-F enables tractable gradient computation, making the estimation of $\mathcal{P}(Y \mid X)$ both memory-efficient and computationally lightweight. We validate MLGD-F on synthetic benchmarks, structured image transformations, and generative editing optimization, demonstrating reliable recovery of inputs whose conditional distributions match diverse user-specified targets, including discrete mixtures and continuous low-rank supports.

</details>


### [333] [Learning to Bid with Unknown Private Values in Budget-Constrained First-Price Auctions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09448)
*Zihao Hu,Yuxiao Wen,Yuan Yao,Jiheng Zhang,Zhengyuan Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种统一的原对偶框架，用于解决具有预算约束和投资回报率目标的首次价格拍卖（FPA）中的出价问题。该框架能同时学习潜在线性处理效应（LTE）估值参数和竞争对手出价分布，并通过强Slater条件和自适应预热过程实现近最优后悔界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究通常假设可以访问估值预言机，忽略了实际中估值需从被审查数据推断的现实。虽然LTE模型能学习价值提升，但尚未适应带有预算约束或投资回报率目标的真实场景。

Method: 提出统一原对偶框架，同时学习LTE估值参数和竞争对手出价分布；利用强Slater条件和自适应预热过程稳定对偶变量，解决估计误差被拉格朗日乘子动态放大导致的无界后悔问题。

Result: 实现了近最优的后悔保证，为具有潜在估值的约束竞价提供了首个理论上有依据的解决方案。

Conclusion: 该工作填补了约束FPA中潜在估值学习的理论空白，为数字广告中的实际竞价问题提供了理论保障。

Abstract: The transition to First-Price Auctions (FPA) in digital advertising has spurred significant research, yet existing work typically assumes access to a valuation oracle, ignoring the reality that values must be inferred from censored data. While Linear Treatment Effect (LTE) models address this by learning value uplift, they have not been adapted to realistic settings with hard Budget constraints or Return-on-Spend (RoS) targets requiring regret and violation control. In this work, we propose a unified primal-dual framework for constrained FPAs that jointly learns the latent LTE valuation parameters and the competitor's bid distribution. This simultaneous learning introduces a critical technical challenge: the estimation error is dynamically scaled by the Lagrangian multiplier, potentially leading to unbounded regret. We resolve this by leveraging a strong Slater condition and a novel adaptive burn-in procedure to stabilize the dual variables. Our approach achieves near-optimal regret guarantees, providing the first theoretically grounded solution for constrained bidding with latent valuations.

</details>


### [334] [RAwR: Role-Aware Rewiring via Approximate Equitable Partition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09457)
*Riccardo Porcedda,Giuseppe Squillace,Bastian Epping,Andrea Vandin,Michael Schaub,Mirco Tribastone,Francesca Chiaromonte*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出RAwR框架，利用等价划分的商图对图神经网络进行重连，以缓解长程交互中的过挤压问题，通过角色感知的拓扑重构实现高效通信，在多种基准上达到SOTA，并理论推导出SRL指标用于最优划分选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GNN在依赖局部邻域的节点分类任务上表现良好，但当预测需要长程交互时性能下降，原因在于过挤压现象（oversquashing）导致结构瓶颈限制了信号传播。现有重连方法存在计算效率低或无法保留结构角色信息的问题。

Method: RAwR通过等价划分（equitable partition）的商图来增强原始图，等价划分基于Weisfeiler-Lehman图着色识别结构角色相同的节点，加速它们之间的通信并降低系统的总有效电阻。同时引入近似等价划分实现可控的商图约简，最紧凑形式还原为Master Node重连技术。

Result: 在同质、异质及合成长程数据集等多种基准上取得SOTA结果。通过线性GNN的教师-学生模型进行理论分析，提出Spectral Role Lift (SRL)指标用于识别最优近似等价划分以最大化预测性能。

Conclusion: RAwR有效缓解了GNN在长程交互任务上的过挤压问题，通过角色驱动的重连策略兼顾了计算效率与性能提升，SRL指标为最优划分选择提供了理论指导。

Abstract: While Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have demonstrated significant efficacy in node classification tasks, where predictions rely on local neighborhood information, the performance of GNNs often drops when prediction tasks depend on long-range interactions. These limitations are attributed to phenomena such as oversquashing, where structural bottlenecks restrict signal propagation across the network topology. To address this challenge, we introduce RAwR, a computationally efficient rewiring framework that augments the input graph with a quotient graph derived from equitable partitions. This approach facilitates accelerated communication between nodes that share identical structural roles, as identified by the Weisfeiler-Leman graph coloring, and thereby reduces the total effective resistance of the system. Furthermore, by employing an approximate definition of the equitable partition, RAwR enables a controllable reduction of the quotient graph, which, in its most condensed state, recovers the conventional Master Node rewiring technique. Empirical evaluations across a diverse suite of benchmarks -- including homophilic, heterophilic, and synthetic long-range datasets -- demonstrate that RAwR achieves state-of-the-art results. Our contribution is further supported by an analytical investigation using a teacher-student model of linear GNNs, which elucidates the theoretical foundations of role-based rewiring. This analysis leads to the formulation of Spectral Role Lift (SRL), a metric designed to identify the optimal approximate equitable partition for maximizing predictive performance.

</details>


### [335] [Positional LSH: Binary Block Matrix Approximation for Attention with Linear Biases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09472)
*Daniel Wolfson,Tal Wagner*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过局部敏感哈希（LSH）视角研究了ALiBi位置偏置注意力机制，证明ALiBi偏置矩阵是连续块对角二值掩码的期望，基于此提出了一种近似定理，可将长上下文的ALiBi注意力近似为一系列短上下文无偏注意力的组合，实现近线性时间计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Transformer的位置编码方法包括位置嵌入、注意力掩码和偏置项，但这些机制之间缺乏形式化的联系。作者希望通过LSH的视角建立这些机制之间的统一理论框架。

Method: 证明了ALiBi偏置矩阵是"位置LSH"方案产生的连续块对角二值掩码的期望。基于此，通过随机采样掩码对ALiBi注意力进行近似，并给出了谱范数和最大范数的近似保证。

Result: 近似定理保证了在查询-键-值输入上，近似注意力输出同时对所有输入一致准确，且计算复杂度为关于上下文长度的近线性时间。

Conclusion: 建立了位置偏置、掩码和位置嵌入的统一形式化框架，提供了高效计算ALiBi注意力的新思路，并在大语言模型上验证了理论结果。

Abstract: Positional encoding in transformers is commonly implemented through positional embeddings, attention masks, or bias terms, but formal connections between these mechanisms remain limited. We study attention with positional bias through the lens of locality-sensitive hashing (LSH), focusing on Attention with Linear Biases (ALiBi). We show that the ALiBi bias matrix is the expectation of contiguous block-diagonal binary masks induced by a ``positional LSH'' scheme. The empirical mean of masks sampled from this scheme yields spectral norm and max-norm approximation guarantees with bounded block sizes with high probability. This structural theorem implies a uniform approximation theorem for ALiBi-biased attention: with high probability over the sampled masks, the approximate attention output is accurate simultaneously for all query-key-value inputs and can be computed in near-linear time in the context length, reducing long-context ALiBi to a collection of randomized short-context regular (positionally unbiased) attention operations. Conceptually, this connects positional bias, masks, and positional embeddings in a single formal framework and suggests an approach to efficient ALiBi-biased attention. Experiments on large language models validate our theoretical findings.

</details>


### [336] [SEMASIA: A Large-Scale Dataset of Semantically Structured Latent Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09485)
*Mario Edoardo Pandolfo,Enrico Grimaldi,Lorenzo Marinucci,Leonardo Di Nino,Simone Fiorellino,Sergio Barbarossa,Paolo Di Lorenzo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了SEMASIA，一个包含约1700个预训练视觉模型潜在表征的大规模基准数据集，并展示了其在分析潜在空间组织、评估对齐方法以及研究预训练因素与嵌入几何关系三个方面的应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有潜在空间对齐方法因缺乏大规模、模型多样、元数据丰富的基准而进展受限，亟需一个标准化的评估平台来推动该领域研究。

Method: 从约1700个预训练视觉模型中提取潜在表征，覆盖8个标准图像分类基准，并配以结构化元数据（架构、训练策略、预训练来源、模型规模等）。

Result: 三个应用：(1) 发现潜在空间中存在一致的原型聚类和层次化语义邻域；(2) 建立了监督对齐映射的基准；(3) 通过大规模回归分析揭示了预训练数据复杂度、专业化、迁移学习、数据增强和模型规模与嵌入几何及探测性质的关系。

Conclusion: SEMASIA将表征规模与标准化元数据相结合，为研究潜在几何、评估对齐方法以及开发下一代异构可互操作AI系统提供了可复现的基础。

Abstract: Latent representations learned by neural networks often exhibit semantic structure, where concept similarity is reflected by geometric proximity in embedding space. However, comparing such spaces across models remains difficult: changes in architecture, pretraining data, objective, or random seed can yield embeddings with similar content but incompatible geometry. This latent space alignment problem is central to interpretability, transfer and multimodal learning, federated systems, and semantic communication; however, progress remains limited by the lack of large-scale, model-diverse, and metadata-rich benchmarks. To address this gap, we introduce SEMASIA, a large-scale collection of latent representations extracted from approximately 1,700 pretrained vision models across eight standard image-classification benchmarks. SEMASIA pairs embeddings with structured metadata describing architectures, training regimes, pretraining sources, and model scale. We demonstrate three applications of the resource. First, we analyze the conceptual organization of individual latent spaces, showing consistent prototype-like clustering and hierarchical semantic neighborhoods across models and datasets. Second, we benchmark supervised alignment mappings between latent spaces using reconstruction error and downstream task performance. Third, we perform a large-scale regression analysis of how pretraining-data complexity, specialization, transfer learning, augmentation, and model scale relate to geometric and probing properties of embeddings. By coupling representational scale with standardized metadata, SEMASIA provides a reproducible foundation for studying latent geometry, evaluating alignment methods, and developing next-generation heterogeneous and interoperable AI systems.

</details>


### [337] [CTQWformer: A CTQW-based Transformer for Graph Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09486)
*Zhan Li,Wuqing Yu,Yusen Wu,Chuan Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CTQWformer提出了一个混合图学习框架，将连续时间量子游走（CTQW）与GNN和Transformer结合，通过可训练的哈密顿量融合图拓扑和节点特征，利用CTQW提取的结构信息分别注入Graph Transformer的注意力机制和Graph Recurrent Module进行时序建模，在图分类任务上超越了传统图核和GNN方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GNN和Transformer方法难以同时捕获全局结构依赖和建模动态信息传播过程，缺乏物理启发的图表示学习机制。

Method: 1) 设计可训练哈密顿量融合图拓扑与节点特征，驱动CTQW进行量子游走动力学建模；2) Graph Transformer模块将最终时刻传播概率作为结构偏置注入自注意力；3) Graph Recurrent Module用双向循环网络捕获时序演化模式。

Result: 在多个图分类基准数据集上，CTQWformer超越了图核方法和GNN方法，验证了量子动力学集成到可训练深度学习框架的有效性。

Conclusion: CTQWformer是首个将CTQW衍生的结构偏置与时序演化建模结合的混合Transformer，为量子启发的图表示学习开辟了新方向。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNN) and Transformer-based architectures have achieved remarkable progress in graph learning, yet they still struggle to capture both global structural dependencies and model the dynamic information propagation. In this paper, we propose CTQWformer, a hybrid graph learning framework that integrates continuous-time quantum walks (CTQW) with GNN. CTQWformer employs a trainable Hamiltonian that fuses graph topology and node features, enabling physically grounded modeling of quantum walk dynamics that captures rich and intricate graph structure information. The extracted CTQW-based representations are incorporated into two complementary modules:(i) a Graph Transformer module that embeds final-time propagation probabilities as structural biases in the self-attention mechanism, and (ii) a Graph Recurrent Module that captures temporal evolution patterns with bidirectional recurrent networks. Extensive experiments on benchmark graph classification datasets demonstrate that CTQWformer outperforms graph kernel and GNN-based methods, demonstrating the potential of integrating quantum dynamics into trainable deep learning frameworks for graph representation learning. To the best of our knowledge, CTQWformer is the first hybrid CTQW-based Transformer, integrating CTQW-derived structural bias with temporal evolution modeling to advance graph learning.

</details>


### [338] [Kintsugi: Learning Policies by Repairing Executable Knowledge Bases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09487)
*Teng Cao,Yu Deng,Hikaru Shindo,Quentin Delfosse,Lanxi Wen,Suli Wang,Jannis Blüml,Christopher Tauchmann,Kristian Kersting*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Kintsugi是一个白盒策略学习框架，将具身策略改进视为经过验证器门控的可执行知识库构建过程。它使用类型化可组合条目表示任务知识，通过工具约束的编辑循环从交互数据中学习局部更新，最终推理时零LLM调用，在长程文本智能体和物体操作任务上取得良好性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有具身智能体将任务知识存储在神经网络权重、隐状态或提示绑定记忆中，导致个体策略知识难以检查、验证、重组和复用。

Method: 提出Kintsugi框架，将策略知识表示为类型化可组合的知识库条目（谓词、算子、策略模式、监控器、恢复规则、经验记录和目标），通过工具约束的智能体编辑循环诊断轨迹失败、定位可编辑知识层并提出候选编辑，经确定性验证门控（类型检查、执行验证、指标改进和回归检查）后接受编辑，最终由确定性符号执行器执行。

Result: 在长程文本智能体基准和物体操作任务上，Kintsugi取得了强大的端到端性能，同时保持可检查性、局部可编辑性和验证器门控部署能力。

Conclusion: 具身策略改进可以围绕可执行的任务知识来组织，而非依赖测试时的语言模型推理。

Abstract: Modern embodied agents achieve impressive performance, but their task knowledge is often stored in neural weights, latent state, or prompt-bound memory, making individual policy knowledge difficult to inspect, validate, recombine, and reuse. We introduce \textbf{Kintsugi}, a white-box policy-learning framework that treats embodied policy improvement as verifier-gated construction of a typed executable Knowledge Base (KB). Kintsugi represents task-level policy knowledge as composable typed entries -- predicates, operators, policy schemas, monitors, recovery rules, experience records, and goals -- and improves this artifact through localized typed edits induced from rollout evidence, rather than relying on test-time language-model reasoning. Between rollouts, a tool-constrained agentic editing loop diagnoses trajectory failures, localizes them to editable KB layers, and proposes candidate edits. A deterministic verification gate admits an edit only when the candidate type-checks, the resulting KB executes, and focused validation success or trajectory-health metrics improve without violating protected-regression checks. At inference, the accepted KB is executed by a deterministic symbolic executor with zero LLM calls. Across long-horizon text-agent benchmarks and representative object-centric manipulation settings, Kintsugi achieves strong endpoint performance while preserving inspectability, local editability, and verifier-gated deployment. These results suggest that embodied policy improvement can be organized around executable task knowledge.

</details>


### [339] [Spectral Transformer Neural Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09498)
*Xianhe Chen,Hao Chen,Yingzhen Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Spectral Transformer Neural Processes (STNPs)，通过引入频谱聚合器将频域信息注入Transformer Neural Processes，有效建模周期性/准周期性数据，在合成与真实数据集上 outperforms 现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Neural Processes方法在处理强周期性和准周期性数据时存在欠拟合问题，且泛化能力差，无法有效建模周期结构。

Method: 提出Spectral Aggregator（频谱聚合器），估计经验上下文频谱→压缩为频谱混合→采样任务自适应频谱特征→与时域嵌入拼接，注入频谱混合核偏置，重塑相似性几何以捕捉周期流形。

Result: 在合成回归、真实时间序列和图像数据集上，STNPs一致优于现有基线，有效将Neural Processes从平移等变扩展到周期性/准周期建模。

Conclusion: STNPs通过频域-时域融合显著提升了Neural Processes对周期结构的建模能力，扩展了其适用范围。

Abstract: Time series, spatial data, and images are natural applications of Neural Processes. However, when such data exhibit strong periodicity and quasi-periodicity, existing methods often suffer from underfitting and generalise poorly beyond the training distribution. In this work, we propose Spectral Transformer Neural Processes (STNPs), a frequency-aware extension of Transformer Neural Processes (TNPs). STNPs introduce a Spectral Aggregator that estimates an empirical context spectrum, compresses it into a spectral mixture, samples task-adaptive spectral features, and concatenates them with time-domain embeddings, thereby injecting a spectral-mixture-kernel bias into TNPs. This design reshapes the similarity geometry, allowing inputs that are distant in Euclidean space to remain close in an induced periodic manifold while enhancing time-frequency interactions. Extensive experiments on synthetic regression tasks, real-world time-series datasets, and an image dataset demonstrate that STNPs consistently improve predictive performance over existing baselines, extending Neural Processes beyond translation equivariance towards effective modelling of periodicity and quasi-periodicity.

</details>


### [340] [Doubly Robust Proxy Causal Learning with Neural Mean Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09514)
*Bariscan Bozkurt,Alexandre Galashov,Dimitri Meunier,Zikai Shen,Arthur Gretton,Houssam Zenati*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种神经双稳健代理因果学习框架，用于处理连续和结构化治疗下的未观测混杂问题。该方法结合神经均值嵌入治疗桥和神经结果桥，通过双稳健纠错和分阶段训练策略，实现了对人群、异质性和条件剂量反应函数的完整估计，在合成和图像基准上优于现有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代理因果学习方法中，双稳健估计器依赖固定核函数或低维半参数模型，灵活性不足；而神经代理方法虽然更灵活，但多为单桥估计器。作者希望结合两者的优势，开发一个既灵活又具有双稳健性质的神经框架，以应对连续和结构化治疗下的未观测混杂问题。

Method: 提出神经双稳健代理因果学习框架：1）使用神经均值嵌入估计器学习治疗桥函数；2）结合神经结果桥；3）通过最终回归阶段估计双稳健纠错项。算法采用两阶段训练每个桥函数，并通过历史感知更新最终线性层来稳定随机多阶段训练。框架覆盖人群、异质性和条件剂量反应函数，生成完整的响应曲线而非二值治疗效果。

Result: 在合成和图像基准上，所提方法优于现有基线和单桥神经估计器。理论证明一致性：双稳健误差由最终平均和回归误差以及结果桥与治疗桥中较小的弱范数误差共同控制。

Conclusion: 结合学习得到的结果桥和治疗桥构建双稳健估计器是有益的，验证了神经双稳健框架在代理因果学习中的有效性。

Abstract: Unobserved confounding prevents standard covariate adjustment from identifying causal response functions in observational studies. Proxy causal learning addresses this problem through bridge equations involving treatment- and outcome-inducing proxies, avoiding direct recovery of the latent confounder. Existing doubly robust proxy estimators combine outcome and treatment bridges, but typically rely on fixed kernels, sieves, or low-dimensional semiparametric models; existing neural proxy methods are more flexible, but are largely single-bridge estimators. We develop a neural doubly robust framework for proxy causal learning with continuous and structured treatments. Our method introduces a neural mean-embedding estimator for the treatment bridge, combines it with a neural outcome bridge, and estimates the doubly robust correction through a final regression stage. The framework covers population, heterogeneous, and conditional dose-response functions, yielding full response-curve estimators rather than binary-treatment effects. The algorithms use two stages for each bridge and history-aware updates of the final linear layers to stabilize stochastic multi-stage training. We prove consistency of the algorithms showing that the doubly robust error is controlled by the final averaging and regression errors together with the smaller of the outcome- and treatment-side weak-norm bridge errors. Across synthetic and image-valued benchmarks, the proposed estimators outperform existing baselines and single-bridge neural estimators, showing the benefit of combining learned outcome and treatment bridges in a doubly robust construction. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/BariscanBozkurt/DRPCL-Neural-Mean-Embedding.

</details>


### [341] [Mixture of Layers with Hybrid Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09516)
*Ivan Ternovtsii,Yurii Bilak*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Mixture of Layers (MoL)，用多个薄层块替代标准Transformer中的全宽度块，通过混合注意力机制解决注意力覆盖问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准MoE Transformer虽然路由token到不同专家子网络，但层结构本身仍然是整体的。作者希望打破这种整体层结构，通过更细粒度的层级路由来提升模型效率。

Method: 将全宽度Transformer块替换为K个并行薄块（d_thin << d_model），通过学习的降维/升维投影连接，采用top-k块路由。针对注意力覆盖问题，提出混合注意力：一个共享softmax块用于全局上下文，Gated DeltaNet线性注意力用于路由块。

Result: 未在摘要中明确给出具体实验结果，但提出了解决注意力覆盖问题的混合注意力方法。

Conclusion: MoL通过层级路由和混合注意力，在保持效率的同时解决了稀疏块路由带来的注意力覆盖问题。

Abstract: Standard Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) transformers route tokens to expert subnetworks within each layer, but the layer structure itself remains monolithic. We introduce Mixture of Layers (MoL), which replaces full-width transformer blocks (d_model) with K parallel thin blocks at reduced dimensionality (d_thin << d_model), connected via learned down/up projections and composed via top-k block routing. Scaling sparse block routing to many blocks creates an attention coverage problem, as each block sees fewer tokens. We address this by introducing hybrid attention, which pairs one shared softmax block for global context with Gated DeltaNet linear attention in routed blocks.

</details>


### [342] [LLM-Driven Performance-Space Augmentation for Meta-Learning-Based Algorithm Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09518)
*Darren Zhu,Daren Ler*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出利用大语言模型生成合成回归数据集来增强元数据集，以解决算法选择的元学习中真实数据集稀疏的问题。实验发现均匀采样策略优于边界采样策略，在Hamming loss等指标上取得显著提升，并提出了"性能流形"假说。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的元学习用于算法选择依赖于元数据集，但真实世界数据集数量有限，导致元数据集稀疏，限制了元学习器的泛化能力。

Method: 使用大语言模型生成合成回归数据集来增广元数据集。设计了两种采样策略：(1)均匀采样——在性能空间均匀分布合成数据集；(2)基于边界的采样——集中在决策边界附近。采用二维几何设定，以两种锚定算法（landmarkers）的交叉验证R²分数定义性能空间。

Result: 在42个真实UCI回归数据集和730个合成数据集上，两种策略均显著优于未增广基线。其中均匀采样表现更优：Hamming loss降低17.47%，子集准确率提升100.41%，池化out-of-fold R²提升6.09%。

Conclusion: 提出核心论点：算法性能位于低维性能流形上，通过用户引导的LLM最大化均匀ε覆盖，可以最小化重构偏差，从而改进元学习进行算法选择。

Abstract: Meta-learning for algorithm selection relies on a meta-dataset in which each row corresponds to a supervised learning dataset described by meta-features and labelled with a target value that is associated with algorithm choice (typically, some function of algorithm performance). A persistent limitation is that the number of curated real-world datasets is small, resulting in sparse meta-datasets that constrain meta-learner generalisation. In this paper, we address this problem by augmenting the meta-dataset with synthetic regression datasets produced via a large language model (LLM), with generation steered toward target regions of a low-dimensionality performance space. In our experiments, we adopt a two-dimensional geometric setting defined by the cross-validated $R^2$ scores of two anchor algorithms, known as landmarkers. We compare two augmentation strategies: (1) uniform sampling, which distributes synthetic datasets across the performance space; and (2) margin-based sampling, which concentrates them near the decision boundary where landmarker preference is most ambiguous. Across 42 real-world UCI regression datasets and 730 synthetic datasets, both strategies substantially improve meta-learner performance over the unaugmented baseline under regression and multi-label evaluation formulations. However, uniform augmentation consistently outperforms margin-based augmentation, achieving a 17.47% relative reduction in Hamming loss, a 100.41% relative improvement in subset accuracy, and a +6.09% relative gain in pooled out-of-fold $R^2$. These results lead us to postulate a central thesis: the performance of algorithms resides on a low-dimensional performance manifold, whose reconstruction bias may be minimised by user-guided LLMs that seek to maximise uniform $ε$-cover, and consequently, lead to improved meta-learning for algorithm selection.

</details>


### [343] [HS-FNO: History-Space Fourier Neural Operator for Non-Markovian Partial Differential Equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09523)
*Lennon J. Shikhman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出历史空间傅里叶神经算子(HS-FNO)，通过将延迟方程和记忆驱动PDE建模在提升的历史状态空间上，并利用精确的移位-追加传输结构替代完全学习历史坐标，在五个基准问题上相比基线方法取得了更低的误差（聚合滚动误差从0.241降至0.094），表明强制离散移位结构作为归纳偏置对非马尔可夫PDE代理建模有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准神经算子在时间依赖PDE中假设瞬时场u(t,·)为完整状态，但该假设对延迟方程、分布式记忆系统等非马尔可夫动力学失效——两个轨迹在时刻t一致但历史不同可能导致不同未来。因此需要一种能处理历史依赖的神经算子。

Method: HS-FNO将状态提升为历史状态u_t(θ,x)=u(t+θ,x), θ∈[-τ,0]。其核心计算步骤将一次历史状态更新分解为两部分：(1) 学习一个预测器用于新暴露的未来切片；(2) 对历史窗口中已有部分执行精确的移位-追加传输（shift-append transport），从而避免学习确定性的历史坐标、减少学习输出维度、强制自然离散历史更新结构。

Result: 在延迟反应扩散、空间流行病学、非局部神经场动力学、延迟波和分布式记忆闭合五个基准上，HS-FNO在单步误差、历史空间误差和滚动预测误差上均取得最低。滚动聚合误差从当前状态算子的0.241、滞后堆叠的0.188、无约束历史的0.185降至0.094，且参数量更少。

Conclusion: 强制离散历史状态演化的移位结构是一种有效的归纳偏置，能够显著提升非马尔可夫PDE代理建模的预测精度与参数效率。

Abstract: Neural operators provide fast surrogate models for time-dependent partial differential equations, but their standard autoregressive use usually assumes that the instantaneous field $u(t,\cdot)$ is a complete state. This assumption fails for delay equations, distributed-memory systems, and other non-Markovian dynamics: two trajectories may agree at time $t$ and nevertheless have different futures because their histories differ. We introduce the History-Space Fourier Neural Operator (HS-FNO), a neural operator for delay and memory-driven PDEs formulated on the lifted state $u_t(θ,x)=u(t+θ,x)$, $θ\in[-τ,0]$. The key computational step is to decompose one history-state update into a learned predictor for the newly exposed future slice and an exact shift-append transport for the portion of the history window already known from the previous state. This avoids learning deterministic history coordinates, reduces the learned output dimension, and enforces the natural discrete history update. We test HS-FNO on five benchmark families covering delayed reaction--diffusion, spatial epidemiology, nonlocal neural-field dynamics, delayed waves, and distributed-memory closures. Across ten random seeds, HS-FNO attains the lowest aggregate one-step, history-space, and rollout errors among the principal baselines. The largest gain occurs in autoregressive prediction, where aggregate rollout error decreases from $0.241$, $0.188$, and $0.185$ for current-state, lag-stack, and unconstrained history-to-history operators, respectively, to $0.094$. The same model uses fewer parameters than unconstrained history prediction. These results indicate that enforcing the discrete shift structure of history-state evolution is an effective inductive bias for non-Markovian PDE surrogate modeling.

</details>


### [344] [When Adaptation Fails: A Gradient-Based Diagnosis of Collapsed Gating in Vision-Language Prompt Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09549)
*Yunxuan Fang,Ziwei Zhang,Xinhe Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统揭示了在冻结少样本提示学习中，自适应门控和提示选择模块常出现“崩塌”现象——输出恒定、梯度微弱、性能不如固定提示。通过诊断实验，作者归纳出两个核心失败模式：梯度幅度不平衡和门控退化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管自适应提示机制被广泛用于增强视觉-语言模型，但在冻结少样本提示学习场景下，自适应门控和提示选择模块往往失效。作者希望系统性地探究这种“适应失败”的根本原因和条件。

Method: 通过控制实验，在多个数据集和多种提示学习架构上进行诊断研究，系统观察梯度信号、门控输出等指标，识别出两2种反复出现的失败模式：梯度幅度不平衡（gradient magnitude imbalance）和门控退化（gate degradation）。

Result: 自适应门控模块输出几乎恒定，贡献的梯度信号可忽略不计，且经常不如固定提示的表现。梯度幅度不平衡和门控退化是导致适应失败的两大核心机制。

Conclusion: 本文呼吁重新审视在参数高效学习中不加区分地增加架构复杂性的做法，并明确了在冻结少样本提示学习场景下，自适应门控何时有效、何时无效。

Abstract: Adaptive prompting mechanisms have been proposed to enhance vision-language models by dynamically tailoring prompts to inputs. However, in frozen few-shot prompt learning with CLIP-style backbones, we systematically observe that adaptive gates and prompt-selection modules often collapse: they produce nearly constant outputs, contribute negligible gradient signals, and frequently fail to outperform fixed prompts. To further explore this issue, we present a systematic diagnostic study to uncover the underlying causes and conditions of adaptation failure. Through controlled experiments across datasets and multiple prompt learning architectures, we identify two recurring failure modes: gradient magnitude imbalance and gate degradation. Our findings invite a re-examination of indiscriminately adding architectural complexity in parameter-efficient learning and clarify when prompt-level adaptive gating is, and is not, effective in this regime.

</details>


### [345] [Online Set Learning from Precision and Recall Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09565)
*Lee Cohen,Yishay Mansour,Shay Moran,Han Shao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究在线环境下学习未知子集的问题，提出了一种结合精确率反馈和召回率反馈的在线学习框架。研究发现，与经典PAC学习类似，可学习性由VC维决定，但反馈的部分信息特性使得经验风险最小化（ERM）失效，需要更复杂的算法来处理反馈依赖问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的在线学习研究多关注分类或回归问题，而实际应用中（如信息检索、推荐系统等）常需要同时考虑预测结果是否"精准"（precision）和是否"全面"（recall）。作者希望建立一个统一的在线集合学习框架，探索在这种混合反馈模式下学习的理论基础。

Method: 每轮学习器预测一个子集，然后以等概率接收两种反馈：精确率反馈（从预测集中随机选一个样本，告知是否属于目标集）或召回率反馈（从目标集中随机选一个样本，告知是否属于预测集）。作者分析VC维与可学习性的关系，并针对部分反馈带来的依赖性问题设计算法，分别在可实现和不可知两种场景下给出遗憾界保证。

Result: 证明了假设类在该设置下可学习的充要条件是VC维有限，与PAC学习一致。但发现部分反馈模型会导致ERM失效甚至破坏所有"适当学习规则"（proper learning rules）。作者设计的算法能够处理反馈带来的依赖关系，并在可实现和不可知两种设置下获得遗憾界保证。

Conclusion: 该研究为在线集合学习提供了定性刻画，揭示了与经典PAC学习既有联系又有本质差异的图景。同时提出了若干开放问题，如最优遗憾率的确定等。

Abstract: We consider the problem of learning an unknown subset $N_\text{target}$ of a domain in an online setting. In each round $t$, the learner predicts a set of items ${N}_t$ and receives one of two types of feedback, each with equal probability: precision feedback, in which a randomly chosen item from the predicted set $N_t$ is revealed and the learner is told whether it belongs to $N_\text{target}$ (incurring a reward if it does), or recall feedback, in which a randomly chosen item from the target set $N_\text{target}$ is revealed and the learner is told whether it belongs to $N_t$ (incurring a reward if it does). The goal is to maximize the cumulative reward over time. This simple online set learning problem abstracts a variety of learning scenarios with precision- and recall-type feedback.
  We show that a hypothesis class (a family of subsets of the domain) is learnable in this setting if and only if it has finite Vapnik-Chervonenkis (VC) dimension, mirroring the classical PAC characterization. However, the resulting algorithmic structure is markedly more intricate: in contrast to standard Probably Approximately Correct (PAC) learning -- where the algorithmic landscape is governed by the simple principle of Empirical Risk Minimization (ERM) -- our partial feedback model can invalidate ERM and even all proper learning rules. We develop algorithms to address the dependencies induced by the feedback, obtaining regret guarantees in both the realizable and agnostic settings. Our results provide a qualitative characterization of learnability in this model, addressing its most basic question, while pointing to a range of natural and intriguing open questions, including the determination of optimal regret rates.

</details>


### [346] [End-to-End Keyword Spotting on FPGA Using Graph Neural Networks with a Neuromorphic Auditory Sensor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09570)
*Wiktor Matykiewicz,Piotr Wzorek,Kamil Jeziorek,Tomás Muñoz,Antonio Rios-Navarro,Angel Jiménez-Fernández,Tomasz Kryjak*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次在单FPGA上实现端到端关键词检测系统，集成神经形态听觉传感器与图神经网络，直接处理事件流音频，实现35us内延迟和1.12W低功耗，准确率87.43%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着移动机器人和嵌入式智能的发展，需要在边缘平台上高效处理数据。传统方法依赖信号预处理，能耗和延迟较高。神经形态传感器产生稀疏事件数据，有望解决此问题。

Method: 设计端到端FPGA实现，集成神经形态听觉传感器(NAS)和图神经网络(GNN)，采用计算-近-存储架构，直接处理事件流音频数据，无需传统信号预处理。

Result: 在Google Speech Commands v2数据集上量化后准确率87.43%，端到端延迟低于35微秒，平均功耗1.12W。

Conclusion: 该系统证明神经形态传感器结合GNN在FPGA上可实现高效、低延迟、低功耗的关键词检测，为边缘设备上的实时音频处理提供了可行方案。

Abstract: With the rapid growth of mobile robotics and embedded intelligence, there is an increasing demand for efficient on-device data processing on edge platforms. A promising research direction is the use of neuromorphic sensors inspired by human sensory systems, which generate sparse, event-based data encoding changes in the environment. In this work, we present the first end-to-end FPGA implementation of a keyword spotting system that integrates a Neuromorphic Auditory Sensor (NAS) and a graph neural network (GNN) on a single FPGA device, enabling real-time processing of raw audio data. The proposed architecture eliminates conventional signal preprocessing and operates directly on event-based audio streams. Leveraging a compute-near-memory network architecture, the system achieves efficient inference with low latency and low power consumption. Experimental results demonstrate an accuracy of 87.43% after quantization on the Google Speech Commands v2 dataset processed through the neuromorphic sensor, with end-to-end latency below 35 us and average power consumption of 1.12 W. The processed datasets, software models, and hardware modules are available at https://github.com/vision-agh/NAS-GNN-KWS.

</details>


### [347] [Biosignal Fingerprinting: A Cross-Modal PPG-ECG Foundation Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09579)
*Zhangdaihong Liu,Chang Liu,Fenglin Liu,Yixuan Chen,Yang Yang,David A. Clifton,Xiao Gu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出生物信号指纹（biosignal fingerprints），基于跨模态基础模型M2AE（多模态掩码自编码器），从超过340万对ECG和PPG信号中学习紧凑的潜在表征，实现无需重新训练即可跨模态、跨设备部署，在7个下游任务中取得优异性能（如五类CVD分类AUROC达0.974）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 心血管疾病是全球主要死因，但可扩展的心脏监测受限于诊断丰富的ECG与普适的穿戴式PPG之间的鸿沟，亟需一种紧凑、跨模态、跨设备且无需任务特定重新训练的表征方法。

Method: 提出M2AE（多模态掩码自编码器），包含模态特定编码器、共享瓶颈和双解码器，联合优化重构损失和跨模态对比损失，生成通用化的生物信号指纹，保留模态内和跨模态特征。

Result: 在7个下游任务中（跨模态重构、CVD分类、高血压检测、死亡率预测、人口统计推断），生物信号指纹在冻结设置下达到或超越领域专家基础模型，五类CVD分类AUROC为0.974，高血压检测AUROC为0.877，在5个分类任务中AUROC最大提升27.7%。

Conclusion: 生物信号指纹以模态无关、隐私保护的形式编码个体心血管状态，在仅单模态输入时仍保持强性能，适用于资源受限的单传感器可穿戴监测场景，对临床和消费级连续心血管监测具有直接意义。

Abstract: Cardiovascular disease remains the leading cause of global mortality, yet scalable cardiac monitoring is hindered by the gap between diagnostic-rich ECG and ubiquitous wearable PPG. Bridging this gap requires representations that are compact, transferable across modalities and devices, and deployable without task-specific retraining. Here we introduce biosignal fingerprints: compact latent representations of cardiovascular state derived from a cross-modal foundation model, the Multi-modal Masked Autoencoder (M2AE), trained on over 3.4 million paired ECG and PPG signals. M2AE integrates modality-specific encoders with a shared bottleneck and dual decoders, jointly optimized using reconstruction and cross-modal contrastive objectives, yielding generalizable fingerprints that retain intra- and inter-modality features. Like a biometric fingerprint, these representations uniquely encode an individual's cardiovascular state in a modality-agnostic, privacy-preserving form reusable across clinical tasks without exposing raw waveform data or requiring model retraining. Across 7 downstream tasks, spanning cross-modal reconstruction, cardiovascular disease classification, hypertension detection, mortality prediction, and demographic inference, biosignal fingerprints achieve competitive or superior performance compared to leading domain-specialist foundation models in frozen settings, including an AUROC of 0.974 for five-class CVD classification and 0.877 for hypertension detection, with a maximum improvement of 27.7% in AUROC across 5 classification tasks. Critically, strong performance is maintained with only a single modality, enabling deployment in resource-constrained, single-sensor environments typical of real-world wearable monitoring, with direct implications for continuous cardiovascular monitoring across clinical and consumer health settings.

</details>


### [348] [Geometry Conflict: Explaining and Controlling Forgetting in LLM Continual Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09608)
*Yuanyi Wang,Yifan Yang,Su Lu,Yanggan Gu,Pengkai Wang,Wenjun Wang,Zhaoyi Yan,Congkai Xie,Jianmin Wu,Jialun Cao,Shing-Chi Cheung,Hongxia Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究大语言模型持续后训练中的遗忘机制，发现遗忘源于任务协方差几何与模型状态几何的不匹配，并提出基于几何冲突的Wasserstein合并方法（GCWM），在无需回放数据的情况下有效提升模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法缺乏判断新知识何时有益（能力迁移）或有害（灾难性遗忘）的准则，有必要从几何角度揭示遗忘的成因并设计可控的更新集成策略。

Method: 将每个后训练任务表示为其参数更新，研究更新诱导的协方差几何与模型状态几何的关系；提出GCWM方法，通过高斯Wasserstein重心构建共享度量，并用几何冲突信号门控几何感知校正。

Result: 在Qwen3 0.6B-14B模型上的域持续与能力持续场景中，GCWM无需回放数据，在保留性能和最终性能上持续优于其他无数据基线方法。

Conclusion: 几何冲突既是遗忘的解释性信号，也是LLM持续后训练中实用的控制信号。

Abstract: Continual post-training aims to extend large language models (LLMs) with new knowledge, skills, and behaviors, yet it remains unclear when sequential updates enable capability transfer and when they cause catastrophic forgetting. Existing methods mitigate forgetting through sequential fine-tuning, replay, regularization, or model merging, but offer limited criteria for determining when incorporating new updates is beneficial or harmful. In this work, we study LLM continual post-training through three questions: What drives forgetting? When do sequentially acquired capabilities transfer or interfere? How can compatibility be used to control update integration? We address these questions through task geometry: we represent each post-training task by its parameter update and study the covariance geometry induced by the update. Our central finding is that: forgetting can be considered as a state-relative update-integration failure, it arises when the covariance geometries induced by tasks misalign with the geometry of the evolving model state. Sequential updates transfer when they remain compatible with the model state shaped by previous updates, and interfere when state-relative geometry conflict becomes high. Motivated by this finding, we propose Geometry-Conflict Wasserstein Merging (GCWM), a data-free update-integration method that constructs a shared Wasserstein metric via Gaussian Wasserstein barycenters and uses geometry conflict to gate geometry-aware correction. Across Qwen3 0.6B--14B on domain-continual and capability-continual settings, GCWM consistently outperforms data-free baselines, improving retention and final performance without replay data. These results identify geometry conflict as both an explanatory signal for forgetting and a practical control signal for LLM continual post-training.

</details>


### [349] [Minimal Filling Architectures of Polynomial Neural Networks: Counterexamples, Frontier Search, and Defects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09609)
*Kevin Dao,Jose Israel Rodriguez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过一个反例推翻了关于多项式神经网络（PNN）最小填充架构的“单峰宽度猜想”。该反例通过前沿搜索发现，并利用递归维度界和符号计算验证。与传统表现为小缺陷的案例不同，该反例中的子架构存在大缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证并挑战“多项式神经网络的最小填充架构中，隐藏层宽度呈单峰分布”这一猜想（即最小单峰猜想），以检验其普遍有效性。

Method: 采用前沿搜索（frontier search）寻找反例，并利用递归维度界（recursive dimension bounds）和符号计算（symbolic computation）对反例进行严格验证和确认。

Result: 成功找到了一个违反最小单峰猜想的具体反例，且该反例的若干子架构表现出大缺陷（large defect），与以往以微小缺陷为主的案例形成鲜明对比。

Conclusion: 最小单峰猜想不成立，存在非单峰的最小填充架构，且这类架构可能伴随着较大的结构缺陷，为神经网络架构设计提供了新的限制性认识。

Abstract: We provide a counterexample to the minimal unimodal conjecture for polynomial neural networks (PNNs) with power activation functions. Fixing the input and output widths, the conjecture states that any minimal filling architecture has unimodal widths for the hidden layers. We found a counterexample via a frontier search and certified it using recursive dimension bounds and symbolic computation. Notably, several subarchitectures of this example exhibit large defect, in contrast with the predominantly small-defect behavior observed in prior examples.

</details>


### [350] [Plan2Cleanse: Test-Time Backdoor Defense via Monte-Carlo Planning in Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09638)
*Sze-Ann Chen,Zhi-Yi Chin,Kui-Yuan Chen,Chi-Yu Li,Ping-Chun Hsieh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Plan2Cleanse 是一个基于蒙特卡洛树搜索的测试时检测与缓解框架，用于在无需重训练的情况下识别和消除强化学习模型中的后门攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习模型在第三方训练和部署中存在后门攻击风险，现有方法缺乏测试时的有效检测与缓解手段。

Method: 将后门检测重新定义为规划问题，利用蒙特卡洛树搜索在保持黑盒访问条件下系统探索时序扩展的触发序列，并基于检测结果实现树搜索预防性重规划以缓解攻击。

Result: 在 MuJoCo、O-RAN 无线网络和 Atari 游戏中，Plan2Cleanse 在隐蔽 O-RAN 场景下触发检测成功率提升超 61.4 个百分点，在竞争性 Humanoid 环境中胜率从 35% 提升至 53%。

Conclusion: Plan2Cleanse 作为测试时防御方法有效应对 RL 后门威胁，强调了主动防御的重要性。

Abstract: Ensuring the security of reinforcement learning (RL) models is critical, particularly when they are trained by third parties and deployed in real-world systems. Attackers can implant backdoors into these models, causing them to behave normally under typical conditions, but execute malicious behaviors when specific triggers are activated. In this work, we propose Plan2Cleanse, a test-time detection and mitigation framework that adapts Monte Carlo Tree Search to efficiently identify and neutralize RL backdoor attacks without requiring model retraining. Our approach recasts backdoor detection as a planning problem, enabling systematic exploration of temporally extended trigger sequences while maintaining black-box access to the target policy. By leveraging the detection results, Plan2Cleanse can further achieve efficient mitigation through tree-search preventive replanning. We evaluated our method in competitive MuJoCo environments, simulated O-RAN wireless networks, and Atari games. Plan2Cleanse achieves substantial improvements, increasing trigger detection success rates by more than 61.4 percentage points in stealthy O-RAN scenarios and improving win rates from 35\% to 53\% in competitive Humanoid environments. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of our test-time defense approach and highlight the importance of proactive defenses against backdoor threats in RL deployments. Our implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/rl-bandits-lab/RL-Backdoor.

</details>


### [351] [Make Each Token Count: Towards Improving Long-Context Performance with KV Cache Eviction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09649)
*Ngoc Bui,Hieu Trung Nguyen,Arman Cohan,Rex Ying*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于全局保留的KV缓存驱逐方法，通过学习每个token的未来效用，在统一内存预算下实现跨层、跨头、跨模态的全局驱逐策略，不仅能压缩缓存，还能通过减少注意力稀释来提升长上下文推理质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文推理中KV缓存是主要瓶颈，现有驱逐方法虽降低开销但通常牺牲性能。作者发现全缓存注意力并非最优——无关token会稀释对有用证据的注意力，因此可学习的驱逐不仅能近似全缓存，还能提升生成质量。

Method: 1) 全局保留门：学习每个缓存KV条目的未来效用分数；2) 共享最终评分投影：跨所有层和头校准分数，实现统一的全局驱逐策略；3) 理论分析：优先保留有用token可减少注意力稀释，几何保留作为查询无关的未来效用代理。

Result: 在长上下文语言、视觉-语言推理和多轮对话基准上，该方法显著降低KV内存使用，同时匹配或超越全缓存推理的性能。

Conclusion: 学习型、全局校准的KV驱逐不仅是压缩技术，更是改进长上下文推理的机制。

Abstract: The key-value (KV) cache is a major bottleneck in long-context inference, where memory and computation grow with sequence length. Existing KV eviction methods reduce this cost but typically degrade performance relative to full-cache inference. Our key insight is that full-cache attention is not always optimal: in long contexts, irrelevant tokens can dilute attention away from useful evidence, so selective, learnable eviction can improve generation rather than merely approximate the full cache. We introduce a global retention-based KV eviction method that learns each token's future utility under a unified memory budget. Lightweight retention gates assign utility scores to cached KV entries, and a shared final scoring projection calibrates these scores across all layers and heads. This enables a single global eviction policy in which tokens from different layers, heads, and modalities compete directly for cache capacity. We further provide theoretical analysis showing that preferentially retaining useful tokens reduces attention dilution, and we justify geometric retention as a query-agnostic proxy for future utility. Across diverse long-context language and vision-language reasoning, and multi-turn dialogue benchmarks, our method substantially reduces KV memory while matching or surpassing full-cache inference. These results suggest that learned, globally calibrated KV eviction is not only a compression technique, but also a mechanism for improving long-context reasoning.

</details>


### [352] [Causal Parametric Drift Simulation: A Digital Twin Framework for Classifier Robustness Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09663)
*Julien Lafrance,Richard Khoury,Véronique Tremblay*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于结构因果模型（SCM）作为数字孪生的框架，通过因果参数漂移模拟对分类器进行压力测试，在保持结构依赖的同时进行精确因果干预，揭示传统统计监控无法发现的潜在脆弱性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态环境中的机器学习分类器面临概念漂移问题，现有方法（静态测试集、噪声扰动、SHAP/LIME等）无法保留表格数据的因果依赖关系，导致评估缺乏因果有效性，难以反映模型失效的真实因果机制。

Method: 利用结构因果模型（SCM）作为数据生成过程的"数字孪生"，在保持结构依赖的前提下执行精确因果干预；提出因果参数漂移模拟（Causal Parametric Drift Simulation）技术，对分类器进行部署前的压力测试。

Result: 在OSMH数据集上的实验表明，该方法能够暴露标准统计监控器无法发现的潜在脆弱性。

Conclusion: 该框架可作为现有漂移检测方法的补充，通过因果视角提升分类器在动态环境中的鲁棒性评估能力。

Abstract: Machine learning classifiers in dynamic environments face concept drift -- changes in the data-generating process that degrade performance. Conventional evaluation via static test sets or noise perturbations fails to preserve causal dependencies in tabular data, often producing causally invalid assessments. Post-hoc tools like SHAP and LIME offer correlational insights that may not reflect the causal mechanisms driving model failure.
  We propose a framework that complements existing drift detection by leveraging Structural Causal Models as "Digital Twins" of data-generating processes, enabling precise causal interventions while preserving structural dependencies. Our technique, Causal Parametric Drift Simulation, stress-tests classifiers to identify vulnerabilities before deployment. Experiments on the Open Sourcing Mental Illness (OSMH) dataset demonstrate that this approach exposes latent vulnerabilities invisible to standard statistical monitors.

</details>


### [353] [Learning Multi-Indicator Weights for Data Selection: A Joint Task-Model Adaptation Framework with Efficient Proxies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09665)
*Jingze Song,Zihao Chen,Wenqing Chen,Zibin Zheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于上下文学习的多指标权重学习框架，能同时适配下游任务和模型特性，在仅用30%数据的情况下达到或超越全量微调的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据筛选方法采用静态、任务无关和模型无关的加权方案，忽略了不同下游任务和模型能力差异的需求。

Method: 利用上下文学习信号在紧凑小验证集上作为性能代理，在不进行完整微调的情况下识别最优的多指标权重配置。

Result: 在Mistral、Qwen、Llama等多个模型和基准上，仅用GSM8K中30%的训练样本即可达到或超越全量微调的性能。

Conclusion: 推理任务中语义多样性与逻辑复杂度之间存在权衡，联合任务-模型自适应是必要的。

Abstract: Data selection is a key component of efficient instruction tuning for large language models, as recent work has shown that data quality often matters more than data quantity. Accordingly, prior studies have introduced various multi-dimensional heuristics to evaluate and filter instruction data. However, most existing methods rely on static task-agnostic and model-agnostic weighting schemes, which overlook the varying requirements of specific downstream tasks and the differing pre-existing capabilities of models. In this paper, we propose a framework for learning multi-indicator weights that jointly adapts data selection to both the downstream task and the specific model. Our method identifies optimal weight configurations without full-scale fine-tuning by utilizing in-context learning (ICL) signals on compact tiny-validation sets. These signals serve as efficient performance proxies that ensure high-fidelity evaluation at minimal computational cost. Experiments across multiple benchmarks and model families, including Mistral, Qwen, and Llama, show that the approach achieves performance comparable to or exceeding full-dataset tuning while using only 30\% of the training samples on GSM8K. Furthermore, our analysis reveals a trade-off between semantic diversity and logical complexity in reasoning tasks, highlighting the necessity of joint task-model adaptation.

</details>


### [354] [ChaosNetBench: Benchmarking Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Networks on Chaotic Lattice Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09676)
*Henok Tenaw Moges,Charalampos Skokos,Deshendran Moodley*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了ChaosNetBench (CNB)，一个基于耦合标准映射格点的合成基准数据集和评估框架，用于在受控混沌动力学条件下系统比较STGNN架构的性能。通过96个系统实例和9600条轨迹，揭示了不同混沌水平下STGNN与非图基线模型的性能差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有STGNN评估使用单领域真实数据集和固定划分，难以跨不同动力学机制比较架构性能，缺乏对模型处理混沌动力学能力的系统理解。

Method: 基于耦合标准映射格点构建合成基准，独立调控局部混沌(K)、耦合强度(ε)和系统规模(N)三个参数，生成96个系统实例、9600条轨迹。引入混沌指标、评估指标和分析协议，对13种架构（5种STGNN和8种非图基线）进行系统评估。

Result: 发现存在依赖于动力学机制的转折点：低局部混沌下非图基线（TCN、N-BEATS、iTransformer）表现具有竞争力；高局部和全局混沌下STGNN（Graph WaveNet、D2STGNN、STAEformer）通常更具韧性。

Conclusion: CNB提供了一个实用可复用的测试平台，能够系统地比较和分析STGNN架构处理不同混沌水平的能力。

Abstract: Spatio-temporal graph neural networks (STGNNs) are widely used for short-term forecasting in dynamic physical systems such as traffic and weather. However, the prevailing evaluation practice uses real world benchmark data sets in a single domain with a single fixed holdout splits, making it difficult to compare architectures across different dynamical regimes. We introduce ChaosNetBench (CNB), a synthetic benchmark dataset and evaluation framework for studying STGNN performance under controlled multidimensional chaotic dynamics. CNB is built on a lattice of coupled standard maps with independently tunable local chaos ($K$), coupling strength ($\varepsilon$), and system size ($N$), providing known topology and known dynamics across 96 system instances and 9{,}600 trajectories. We introduce chaos indicators, evaluation metrics and a protocol to analyze and compare the capacity of STGNN architectures to deal with different levels of local and global chaos. We illustrate the usage of the framework by analyzing 13 architectures (5 STGNNs and 8 non-graph baselines). The results reveal a regime dependent transition in which non-graph baselines (TCN, N-BEATS, iTransformer) remain competitive when there is low local chaos, while STGNNs (e.g., Graph WaveNet, D2STGNN, STAEformer) are generally more resilient to higher levels of local and global chaos. CNB provides a practical, reusable testbed for systematically comparing and analyzing the capacity of STGNN architectures to handle different levels of local and global chaos.

</details>


### [355] [Learning Unified Representations of Normalcy for Time Series Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09685)
*Prithul Sarker,Sushmita Sarker,Nicholas G. Murray,Alireza Tavakkoli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为U²AD的统一无监督异常检测框架，利用基于分数的生成模型学习正常数据分布，通过时间依赖分数网络和统一训练目标来刻画正常数据流形，并使用常微分方程求解器进行确定性采样重构，在多元时间序列异常检测中实现了更高的检测准确率和更早的异常识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的无监督异常检测方法难以学习正常数据分布的鲁棒表示，尤其难以区分正常模式与异常模式之间的差异。

Method: 1) 利用基于分数的生成模型学习正常样本的数据分布；2) 提出时间依赖分数网络（time-dependent score network）；3) 设计统一训练目标，同时考虑局部和全局时间上下文；4) 通过常微分方程（ODE）求解器进行确定性采样实现重构。

Result: 在检测准确率上超越当前最先进方法，并且能够在异常发生的更早阶段识别出异常。

Conclusion: U²AD框架通过基于分数的生成模型和统一训练目标，有效解决了多元时间序列中无监督异常检测的难题，兼具高检测精度和早期异常发现能力。

Abstract: The core challenge in unsupervised anomaly detection is identifying abnormal patterns without prior knowledge of their characteristics. While existing methods have addressed aspects of this problem, they often struggle to learn a robust representation of the normal data distribution that is distinct from anomalous patterns. In this paper, we present a novel framework, Unified Unsupervised Anomaly Detection ($\text{U}^2\text{AD}$), that comprehensively addresses anomaly detection in multivariate time series. Our approach learns the underlying data distribution of normal samples by utilizing score-based generative modeling. We introduce a novel time-dependent score network and a unified training objective that together delineate the manifold of normal data while considering both local and global temporal contexts. Reconstruction is then performed via a deterministic sampling process using an ordinary differential equation solver. Our extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate that $\text{U}^2\text{AD}$ not only outperforms current state-of-the-art methods in detection accuracy but also identifies anomalies at significantly earlier stages of their occurrence.

</details>


### [356] [Quantum Circuit Simulation of Compartmental Drug Dynamics: Leveraging Variational Algorithms for Nonlinear Mixed-Effects Population Pharmacokinetics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09691)
*Isshaan Singh,Nandan Patel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文将经典药代动力学/药效学（PK/PD）房室模型重构为开放量子系统，使用12个量子比特编码四个药理学房室，并采用量子增强的SAEM方法进行参数估计。与经典实现相比，量子模型在保持参数估计一致性的同时，显著提高了对数似然值，迭代收敛更快，但总运行时间因模拟开销而增加。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PK/PD建模依赖经典常微分方程，而量子计算有望通过量子叠加和纠缠特性更高效地模拟随机药物动力学过程，提高统计拟合能力。

Method: 将四房室PK/PD模型（中央室、外周室、效应室、响应室）编码为12量子比特的开放量子系统，通过受控量子操作模拟房室间随机转移，使用PennyLane构建量子电路，并采用量子增强的随机近似期望最大化（SAEM）方法进行参数优化。

Result: 量子模型相比经典模型显著提高了对数似然值，参数估计结果一致；量子优化在迭代次数上收敛更快，但总运行时间因当前模拟开销而增加；大规模模拟性能稳定。

Conclusion: 混合量子-经典方法能够在保持生物学解释性的同时提升统计建模能力，为PK/PD建模提供了新的量子计算范式。

Abstract: Population pharmacokinetic/pharmacodynamic (PK/PD) modeling traditionally relies on classical ordinary differential equations to simulate drug dynamics. In this work, we reformulate a compartmental PK/PD model as an open quantum system and implement it using quantum circuits developed in PennyLane. Four pharmacological compartments (central, peripheral, effect-site, and response) are encoded using twelve qubits, with inter-compartmental transitions represented through controlled quantum operations that emulate stochastic dynamics. The framework is evaluated on Phase 1 clinical data using a quantum-enhanced stochastic approximation expectation-maximization (SAEM) approach. Compared with the classical implementation, the quantum model achieves substantially improved log-likelihood values, indicating stronger statistical fit while preserving identical parameter estimates, thereby validating numerical consistency and model interpretability. The quantum-based optimization converges faster in terms of iterations, although total runtime is increased due to current simulation overhead. The study demonstrates stable large-scale simulation performance and establishes a hybrid quantum-classical approach that maintains biological fidelity while improving statistical modeling capacity. The dataset and problem statement originate from the Quantum Innovation Challenge 2025, and additional details are provided via the associated link.

</details>


### [357] [Discovery of Nonlinear Dynamics with Automated Basis Function Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09696)
*Mohammad Amin Basiri,Charles Nicholson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AutoSINDy 是一种结合符号回归与 SINDy 的混合框架，通过三步流程自动发现控制方程，在高噪声下实现 92.8% 的真实方程恢复率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统 SINDy 需要预定义候选基函数，易因遗漏关键项导致模型失败；纯符号回归虽灵活但对噪声敏感且易生成复杂不稳定方程。为克服两者局限，需一种自动构建完备函数库的混合方法。

Method: 三步混合框架：(1) 利用 PySR 对自助采样数据块进行符号回归，发现候选函数形式；(2) 通过共线性分析对表达式进行分解、扩展和过滤，构建最小而完备的函数库；(3) 使用 SINDy 从定制库中识别稀疏控制方程。

Result: 在典型非线性系统实验中，AutoSINDy 在高观测噪声下达到 92.8% 的真实方程恢复率；相比标准 SINDy 和纯符号回归，具有更高的预测精度、更强的泛化能力和更低的符号复杂度。

Conclusion: AutoSINDy 通过"先发现再求解"的策略，有效解决了传统方法在函数库构建上的瓶颈，在噪声环境下实现了准确且简洁的方程发现。

Abstract: Discovering governing equations from observational data remains a fundamental challenge in scientific modeling, particularly when the underlying mathematical structure is unknown. Traditional sparse identification methods like SINDy excel at discovering parsimonious models but require researchers to specify candidate basis functions a priori, a limitation that often leads to model failure when critical terms are omitted or when systems exhibit unconventional dynamics. Purely symbolic regression approaches offer unlimited flexibility but struggle with noise sensitivity and frequently produce overly complex, unstable equations. We present AutoSINDy, a hybrid Discovery-then-Solve framework that combines the exploratory power of symbolic regression with the robust sparsity-promoting capabilities of SINDy. Our method operates in three stages: (1) PySR-based symbolic regression discovers candidate functional forms from bootstrapped data chunks; (2) a curation pipeline decomposes, expands, and filters these expressions using collinearity analysis to construct a minimal yet comprehensive library; and (3) SINDy identifies sparse governing equations from this custom-tailored library. Extensive experiments across canonical nonlinear systems demonstrate that AutoSINDy consistently recovers ground-truth equations even under high observational noise, achieving a ground-truth recovery rate of 92.8% across all trials. Compared with standard SINDy using enriched libraries and standalone symbolic regression, AutoSINDy achieves higher predictive accuracy, superior generalization to unseen trajectories, and substantially lower symbolic complexity.

</details>


### [358] [Adaptive Data Harvesting for Efficient Neural Network Learning with Universal Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09707)
*Siteng Kang,Xinhua Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出用强化学习动态调整训练样本，以提升神经网络在连续域上满足通用约束的效果和效率，在Lyapunov神经网络和物理信息神经网络上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于样本的约束训练方法多依赖固定启发式规则或手工策略，效率低下且次优，因此需要一种能动态自适应调整样本选择的方法。

Method: 利用强化学习训练一个策略，该策略能根据模型当前的学习表现，动态、迭代地调整训练样本的分布，以优化约束满足效果。

Result: 在Lyapunov神经网络和物理信息神经网络上，该方法显著提升了经验约束满足率，同时大幅提高了训练效率。

Conclusion: 所提出的强化学习驱动的自适应采样策略比固定启发式方法更优，且可推广到任何需要自适应输入选择的训练场景中。

Abstract: Training neural networks to satisfy universal constraints over continuous domains poses unique challenges. Common examples include Lyapunov Neural Networks (Lyapunov NNs) and Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), where analytical solutions are generally either unavailable or overly restrictive. Sample-based methods are therefore commonly used to enforce these constraints, and the choice of samples has a substantial impact on convergence speed, stability, and solution quality. Most existing methods rely on fixed heuristics or handcrafted rules, and are suboptimal in practice. In this paper, we aim to improve upon them by learning, from data and experience, how to dynamically and iteratively adjust the samples in response to the model's evolving learning performance. Trained by reinforcement learning, the learned policy improves empirical constraint satisfaction on test problems while significantly improving efficiency. We validate the approach on both Lyapunov NNs and PINNs, and demonstrate its broader applicability to domains where adaptive input selection is essential for effective training.

</details>


### [359] [Benchmarking Transformer and xLSTM for Time-Series Forecasting of Heat Consumption](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09722)
*Marja Wahl,Daniel R. Bayer,Sven Rausch,Marco Pruckner*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对比了基于Transformer和xLSTM的架构在短期热需求预测中的表现。使用25栋德国建筑的小时级数据，发现xLSTM在RMSE上最优，Temporal Fusion Transformer在MAE上最优。但研究表明，传统全连接网络在资源消耗远低于新模型的情况下，也能取得良好的预测结果，新模型的精度提升以巨大计算资源消耗为代价。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 获取准确的短期热需求预测对于区域供热网络的经济高效和可靠运行至关重要。建筑级热负荷时间序列高度依赖外生变量（如室外温度）和个体使用模式，这使得预测任务极具挑战性。此外，新型深度学习模型（Transformer、xLSTM）的计算可持续性存疑，需要评估其精度与资源消耗的权衡。

Method: 本文对基于Transformer和xLSTM的新型架构进行基准测试，使用2017-2025年德国25栋建筑的小时级数据，比较了3小时和24小时两种预测窗口。建立了多建筑基准，测试模型在异构建筑数据上的泛化能力，并进一步评估预测精度与计算资源需求之间的权衡。

Result: xLSTM在RMSE上表现最优（3小时：19.88 kWh；24小时：21.47 kWh），Temporal Fusion Transformer在MAE上最优（3小时：9.16 kWh）。但xLSTM和Transformer训练时间长、参数量大。传统全连接网络在参数量极低的情况下也能取得良好预测结果，新型模型带来的边际精度提升以显著增加资源消耗为代价。

Conclusion: 在该应用场景下，新型预测模型（xLSTM、Transformer）带来的精度增益有限，但资源消耗巨大。传统低参数模型（如全连接网络）在预测性能与计算效率之间达到了更好的平衡，其可持续性更强。研究启示：不应盲目追求复杂模型，需根据实际需求权衡精度与成本。

Abstract: Obtaining an accurate short-term forecasting for heat demand is an essential part of operating district heating networks cost-efficient and reliable. Heat consumption time series at the building level are highly dependent on exogenous variables such as outdoor temperature and individual usage patterns, making forecasting in this context a challenging task. Thus, this paper benchmarks novel Transformer-based and xLSTM architectures for short-term heat-demand forecasting. Using hourly data from 25 German buildings (2017-2025), we compare three-hour and 24-hour forecasting horizons relevant for intraday control and day-ahead scheduling. We establish a multi-building benchmark that tests whether models trained on pooled, heterogeneous building data are able to generalize across diverse building stock. The results show that the xLSTM achieves the lowest RMSE (19.88 kWh for three-hour, 21.47 kWh for 24-hour forecasts), while the Temporal Fusion Transformer attains the best MAE (9.16 kWh for three-hour forecasts). As xLSTMs and Transformers require long training times and have a huge number of trainable parameters, their sustainability remains questionable. Therefore, this paper further investigates the trade-off between predictive accuracy and computational resource demand of the evaluated forecasting models. The findings indicate that also low-parameter models like a traditional fully-connected network achieve good predictive results, highlighting that marginal accuracy gains of the novel prediction models come at substantial resource expense for this use case.

</details>


### [360] [Model Capacity Determines Grokking through Competing Memorisation and Generalisation Speeds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09724)
*Yiding Song,Hanming Ye*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从信息论角度解释模型容量如何影响"顿悟"（grokking）现象，提出顿悟产生于记忆速度与泛化速度之间的竞争，当两者在参数规模上相交时发生顿悟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究虽已发现grokking与模型大小有关，但模型容量如何塑造grokking的机制尚未明确。

Method: 基于Morris等人(2025)的信息容量框架，分别估计随机标签数据上的记忆速度T_mem(P)和模运算任务上的泛化速度T_gen(P)，研究两者随参数量的变化关系。

Result: 顿悟发生在记忆速度与泛化速度两条时间尺度曲线相交的参数规模附近；较大模型记忆速度更快，与已有经验观察一致。

Conclusion: 不同学习时间尺度的形式化有助于理解模型容量如何在算法任务上塑造grokking现象。

Abstract: Existing accounts of grokking explain the phenomena in terms of mechanistic frameworks such as circuit efficiency or lazy-to-rich transitions. However, despite a known dependence between grokking and model size, how model capacity shapes grokking remains an open question. We give an information-theoretic account of this relationship on the task of modular arithmetic, showing that grokking does not immediately occur when a model becomes large enough to memorise the training set, but rather emerges as the outcome of a competition between two measurable timescales: a memorisation speed $T_{\text{mem}}(P)$ and a generalisation speed $T_{\text{gen}}(P)$, both of which are functions of model parameter count $P$. Adapting the information capacity framework of Morris et al. (2025), we estimate $T_{\text{mem}}(P)$ on random-label data of equivalent complexity and $T_{\text{gen}}(P)$ on the modular task itself, and show that grokking emerges close to the parameter scale where these timescales intersect. The framework also suggests an empirical model for predicting memorisation speed given model capacity and dataset complexity, recovering the previously reported empirical observation that larger models memorise faster. Overall, we motivate the formalisation of different learning timescales as important abstractions to study when explaining how model capacity shapes grokking on algorithmic tasks.

</details>


### [361] [One for All: A Non-Linear Transformer can Enable Cross-Domain Generalization for In-Context Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09727)
*Bowen He,Juncheng Dong,Lin Lin,Xiang Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从核方法视角建立非线性Transformer与基于核的时序差分学习之间的联系，证明不同领域的值函数若在同一再生核希尔伯特空间中可由共享权重表示，从而支持强化学习中的泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习中的核心挑战是让模型在训练任务之外也能泛化，传统方法通过多任务和元强化学习实现，近期Transformer通过上下文学习无需参数更新即可适应新任务。本文旨在从核方法角度理解和设计Transformer的这种泛化能力。

Method: 将Transformer解释为在再生核希尔伯特空间中进行回归的算子，建立非线性Transformer与核方法时序差分学习之间的理论联系，并证明不同域的值函数若位于同一RKHS中可由共享权重表示。

Result: 在多个MetaWorld域上进行的实验支持了这一理论解释，验证了时序差分目标函数的收敛性。

Conclusion: 从核方法视角揭示了Transformer在强化学习中实现泛化的理论基础，为设计更强的泛化算子提供了新思路。

Abstract: A central challenge in reinforcement learning (RL) is to learn models that generalize beyond the tasks on which they are trained, a goal traditionally pursued through multi-task and meta RL. Recently, transformer architectures have emerged as a promising approach, enabling adaptation to new tasks via in-context learning without explicit parameter updates. From a functional perspective, a transformer can be viewed as a functional operator that maps a context to a task-specific function. It is thus fundamental to understand and design this operator to support stronger generalization in RL. In this work, we address this resulting question of generalization from a kernel-based perspective by establishing a connection between non-linear transformers and kernel-based temporal difference learning. By interpreting the transformer as performing regression in a Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS), we show that value functions from different domains can be represented using a shared set of weights, provided they lie within the same RKHS. Experiments on multiple MetaWorld domains support this interpretation, demonstrating convergence of the temporal-difference objective.

</details>


### [362] [RubricRefine: Improving Tool-Use Agent Reliability with Training-Free Pre-Execution Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09730)
*Will LeVine,Brendan Evers,Sam Saltwick,Abhay Venkatesh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出RubricRefine，一种无需训练的预执行可靠性层，通过生成任务特定的评估标准(rubrics)并基于契约检查迭代修复代码，在无需执行的情况下显著提升多工具调用场景的可靠性（M3ToolEval上0.86 vs 基线0.65），且延迟降低2.6倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有迭代自优化方法在代码模式工具使用中效果有限：无结构批评帮助不稳定，即使加入真实执行反馈提升也有限（0.75 vs 0.65）。主要失败模式是工具间契约违反（输出形状错误、工具路由错误、参数溯源断裂），这些错误能顺利执行完毕而不报错，使运行时反馈不足。

Method: RubricRefine是一个无需训练的预执行可靠性层，包含三个步骤：(1) 生成任务特定和注册表特定的评估标准(rubrics)；(2) 对候选代码进行明确的契约检查评分；(3) 在任何执行发生前迭代修复失败项。

Result: 在M3ToolEval上，7个模型平均达到0.86，优于所有先前的推理时基线方法，且延迟比最强的非迭代替代方案低2.6倍。在单步为主的API-Bank上效果持平，验证了该方法依赖工具间契约结构的特性。还进行了rubric类别消融和校准分析。

Conclusion: RubricRefine通过预执行契约检查有效解决了工具间契约违反问题，在不执行代码的情况下显著提升了多工具调用场景的可靠性，且效率更高。方法效果依赖于工具间契约结构的存在。

Abstract: Iterative self-refinement is a popular inference-time reliability technique, but its effectiveness in code-mode tool use depends heavily on the structure of the feedback signal: unstructured critique helps inconsistently across models, and even revision with real execution feedback improves only modestly ($0.75$ vs. $0.65$ baseline). The dominant failures are inter-tool contract violations - wrong output shape, incorrect tool routing, broken argument provenance - that run to completion without raising errors, making runtime feedback insufficient. We introduce RubricRefine, a training-free pre-execution reliability layer that generates task- and registry-specific rubrics, scores candidate code against explicit contract checks, and iteratively repairs failures before any execution occurs. With zero execution attempts, RubricRefine reaches $0.86$ on M3ToolEval averaged across seven models-improving over prior inference-time baselines on every model tested on this benchmark, at $2.6X$ lower latency than the strongest non-iterative alternative - and remains flat on the predominantly single-step API-Bank, consistent with the method's reliance on inter-tool contract structure. A rubric-category ablation and calibration analysis further characterize when and why the method works.

</details>


### [363] [CALYREX: Cross-Attention LaYeR EXtended Transformers for System Prompt Anchoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09737)
*Li Lixing*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CALYREX架构，通过交叉注意力机制将系统提示与用户输入在结构上隔离，提升指令遵循能力并降低提示注入攻击的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准因果自注意力机制将系统提示和用户内容放在相同的结构优先级下处理，导致模型容易受到提示注入攻击，且在长上下文中指令会逐渐衰减。

Method: CALYREX利用交叉注意力在输入与系统提示之间建立结构性隔离，并通过消融实验确定在1.5B骨干网络的最后八分之一层插入效果最佳。

Result: 在8B规模下，IFEval指令遵循提升7.4%，多轮指令遵循提升16.3%，多轮越狱攻击成功率降低13%，且优势随模型规模扩大而增加。

Conclusion: 结构化的系统提示路由机制能显著提升指令遵循安全性，且大模型能更有效地利用这种专用路径。

Abstract: Modern large language models (LLMs) rely on system prompts to establish behavioral constraints and safety rules. Standard causal self-attention treats privileged instructions and untrusted user content with equal structural priority -- a mismatch that leaves models vulnerable to prompt injection and instruction erosion over extended contexts. We propose CALYREX (Cross-Attention LaYeR EXtended transformers), which utilizes cross-attention between input and system prompt to structurally isolate and anchor the rule. A placement ablation on a 1.5B backbone identifies insertion at the final eighth of layers as optimal, confirmed by mechanistic activation analysis showing behavioral constraints are naturally concentrated there. At 8B scale, controlling for training data, backbone, and parameter budget, CALYREX yields $+7.4\%$ on instruction-following (IFEval) and $+16.3\%$ on multi-turn instruction adherence, while reducing many-shot jailbreaking attack success rate by $13\%$. This advantage appears to widen with model scale, consistent with larger models more effectively utilizing the dedicated routing pathway.

</details>


### [364] [TIDES: Implicit Time-Awareness in Selective State Space Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09742)
*Taylan Soydan,Miguel A. Bessa,Dirk Mohr,Rui Barreira*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TIDES是一种新型选择性状态空间模型，通过将输入依赖性从步长转移到对角状态矩阵，在保留步长物理意义的同时实现了输入依赖性和连续时间建模的统一，在时间序列分类和ODE回归基准上取得了最优结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SSM存在两难：Mamba等选择性SSM通过使步长Δ成为输入的函数获得强表达能力，但丧失了物理采样间隔的意义，无法处理不规则时间序列；而S5等连续时间SSM保留了Δ的物理意义，能原生处理不规则时间戳，但其线性时不变动力学限制了每个token的表达能力。作者旨在调和这两种架构的矛盾。

Method: TIDES将输入依赖性从步长Δ转移至对角状态矩阵上，使得Δ保留其物理意义（与状态离散化绑定），从而既能原生处理不规则时间戳，又不牺牲选择性SSM的逐token表达能力。

Result: 在Fading Flash诊断基准上证明了TIDES能避免现有SOTA架构的失败模式；在UEA时间序列分类和Physiome-ODE回归基准上取得了新的平均排名SOTA。

Conclusion: TIDES成功调和了选择性与连续时间SSM的矛盾，为不规则时间序列建模提供了兼具表达能力和物理可解释性的有效方案。

Abstract: Selective state space models (SSMs), such as Mamba, achieve strong per-token expressivity by making the time discretization step $\TildeΔ$ a learned function of the input. However, in doing so, $\TildeΔ$ ceases to represent a physical sampling interval, limiting its irregular time series modeling capability. Continuous-time SSMs, such as S5, preserve the physical meaning of $\TildeΔ$ and handle irregular timestamps natively ($\TildeΔ\equivΔ)$, but their dynamics remain linear time-invariant (LTI), limiting per-token expressivity. We propose \textbf{TIDES}, a selective SSM variant that reconciles selective and continuous architectures by moving input-dependence off the step size and onto the diagonal state matrix. As a result, $\TildeΔ$ retains its physical meaning, tied to the state discretization, allowing the model to handle irregular timestamps natively without sacrificing the per-token expressivity that makes selective SSMs effective. We show this on a novel \emph{Fading Flash} experimental benchmark, a compact controlled diagnostic for sequence models that jointly tests input-dependence and extrapolation to out-of-distribution $Δ$ values, and isolates the distinct failure modes of current state-of-the-art architectures that TIDES avoids by construction. On large-scale benchmarks, TIDES sets the new state-of-the-art average rank on UEA time-series classification and the Physiome-ODE regression benchmark. Code available at: https://github.com/TaylanSoydan/TIDES.

</details>


### [365] [Entropy-informed Decoding: Adaptive Information-Driven Branching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09745)
*Benjamin Patrick Evans,Sumitra Ganesh,Leo Ardon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出EDEN解码框架，根据模型输出token分布的熵自适应分配计算资源，在高熵区域增加分支、低熵区域采用贪心策略，从而以更少扩展达到更优生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有解码策略存在局限：采样方法（如top-k、nucleus）通常只走单一路径；搜索方法（如beam search、best-of-n）无论任务复杂度都消耗大量计算。需要一种能根据模型自身不确定性自适应分配计算资源的解码框架。

Method: EDEN（Entropy-informed decoding）：在每个生成步骤估计输出token分布的熵，根据熵值单调调整分支因子——高熵区域扩展更多候选，低熵区域走贪心路径。理论证明在相同总扩展预算下，熵单调的分支因子比固定分支因子能找到更好的延续，并给出了遗憾率。

Result: 在数学推理、代码生成、科学问答等复杂任务上，EDEN一致优于现有解码策略，实现了比固定宽度束搜索更好的准确率-扩展权衡。

Conclusion: EDEN是一种即插即用、模型无关的自适应解码框架，通过熵引导的计算分配，有效解决了采样方法的单路径局限和搜索方法的计算浪费问题。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve remarkable generative performance, yet their output quality is dependent on the decoding strategy. While sampling-based methods (e.g., top-k, nucleus) and search-and-select based methods (e.g., beam search, best-of-n, majority voting) can improve upon greedy decoding, both approaches suffer from limitations: sampling generally commits to a single path, while search often expends excessive computation regardless of task complexity. To address these, we introduce Entropy-informed decoding (EDEN), a plug-and-play, model-agnostic decoding framework that adaptively allocates computation based on the model's own uncertainty, approximating higher-width beam search with fewer expansions. At each generation step, EDEN estimates the entropy of the output token distribution and adjusts the branching factor monotonically with the entropy, expanding more candidates in high-entropy regions and following a greedier path in low-entropy regions, improving token efficiency. Experiments across complex tasks, including mathematical reasoning, code generation, and scientific questions, demonstrate that EDEN consistently improves output quality over existing decoding strategies, achieving better accuracy-expansion trade-offs than fixed-width beam search. By treating next-token selection as a noisy maximisation problem, we prove that branching factors monotone in entropy are guaranteed to find better (i.e. more probable) continuations than any fixed branching factor within the same total expansion budget, and derive explicit regret rates characterising the benefit of the adaptive allocation.

</details>
